	playing{unknown} := 0
	theme_display.close{UserDefined, None}
	options_display.close{UserDefined, None}
	file_browser{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_scan_animation{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	UI_preset_browser{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown}]{unknown}
	btn_preset_browser_bg{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown}]{unknown}
	btn_preset_browser_front{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown}]{unknown}
	btn_presetBrowser{unknown} := Boolean{unknown}
	UI_preset_save_dialog{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	gui_animation.show_side_panels(ne(Boolean{unknown}){UserDefined, None}){UserDefined, None}
end function

function update.preset_browser
	if(search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}] = - 1)
	preset.idx{unknown} := 0
	end if
	btn_scan_presets{unknown} := 0
	call on_btn_scan_presets{UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{unknown}, tag_button_array{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	call update.btn_active_status{UserDefined, None}
	call on_button_tag{UserDefined, None}
end function

function clear_tags
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[tag_button_array{unknown}] - 1
	tag_button_array[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 0
	end for
	floatmask.clear(bit_list{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
end function

function get_category_idx(tag_idx : unknown) -> result : unknown
	i{unknown} := 0
	while((i{unknown} < num_elements[category_accum{unknown}]) and (category_accum[i{unknown}]{unknown} <= tag_idx{unknown})) 
	inc(i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	result{unknown} := max(0, i{unknown} - 1){UserDefined, None}
end function

function update.btn_active_status
	if(preset.idx{unknown} # - 1)
	btn_presetBrowser{unknown} -> text := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}
	btn_current_favorite{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_current_favorite{unknown} -> value := lead_favorite_presets_array[preset.idx{unknown}]{unknown}
	end if
	btn_clear_tags{unknown} -> picture := btn_clear_pics[floatmask.equal(bit_list{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, None}]{unknown}
	floatmask.load(presetmask{unknown}, preset_tags0[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}, preset_tags1[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	btn_edit_tags{unknown} -> picture := btn_edit_pics[abs(is_user_preset(presetmask{unknown}){UserDefined, None} - 1){Builtin, None}]{unknown}
	btn_delete_preset{unknown} -> picture := btn_delete_pics[abs(is_user_preset(presetmask{unknown}){UserDefined, None} - 1){Builtin, None}]{unknown}
	saving_disabled{unknown} := abs(is_user_preset(presetmask{unknown}){UserDefined, None} - 1){Builtin, None}
	tag_button_array[24 - 1]{unknown} -> picture := btn_favorite_pics[0]{unknown}
	if((search[final_lead_favorite_presets_array{unknown}, 1] = - 1) and (floatmask.get(bit_list{unknown}, 24 - 1){UserDefined, None} = 0))
	tag_button_array[24 - 1]{unknown} -> picture := btn_favorite_pics[1]{unknown}
	end if
end function

function update.scrollarea
	call repaint.scrollarea{UserDefined, None}
	sli_scrollbar{unknown} := 1000000 - ((1000000 / (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} - 12)) * scroll.up{unknown})
end function

function repaint.scrollarea
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 12 - 1
	btn_preset_button[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := "      " & final_preset_title_array[i{unknown} + scroll.up{unknown}]{unknown}
	lbl_preset_info[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := final_preset_info[i{unknown} + scroll.up{unknown}]{unknown}
	btn_preset_button[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := btn_preset_onoff[i{unknown} + scroll.up{unknown}]{unknown}
	lbl_preset_info[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.smaller_font[btn_preset_button[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value]{unknown}
	btn_preset_favorite[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := final_lead_favorite_presets_array[i{unknown} + scroll.up{unknown}]{unknown}
	btn_preset_button[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[end_of_presets_array[i{unknown} + scroll.up{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	lbl_preset_info[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[end_of_presets_array[i{unknown} + scroll.up{unknown}]{unknown} * 1]{unknown}
	btn_preset_favorite[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[end_of_presets_array[i{unknown} + scroll.up{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	if(floatmask.equal(bit_list{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, None} = 1)
	scroll.up_origin{unknown} := scroll.up{unknown}
	end if
	lbl_scrollhandle{unknown} -> y := sli_scrollbar{unknown} -> y + ((249 - handle_size{unknown}) - ((sli_scrollbar{unknown} * (249 - handle_size{unknown})) / 1000000))
end function

function on_button_tag override

	bit_list2[0]{unknown} := bit_list[0]{unknown}
	bit_list2[1]{unknown} := bit_list[1]{unknown}
	if((saving_preset{unknown} = 0) and (tag_button_pressed{unknown} = 0))
	tag_button_pressed{unknown} := 1
	call filter_presets{UserDefined, None}
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} = 0)
	p{unknown} := 24 - 1
	while((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} = 0) and (p{unknown} >= 0)) 
	if(floatmask.get(bit_list{unknown}, p{unknown}){UserDefined, None} = 1)
	tag_button_array[p{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 0
	floatmask.set(bit_list{unknown}, p{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, None}
	call filter_presets{UserDefined, None}
	wait(5){Builtin, None}
	end if
	dec(p{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	end if
	call tag_state_handling{UserDefined, None}
	if(preset_scan{unknown} = 0)
	lbl_presetcount{unknown} -> text := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} & "/" & NUM_PRESETS{unknown}
	end if
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[end_of_presets_array{unknown}] - 1
	end_of_presets_array[i{unknown}]{unknown} := is_in_range(i{unknown}, 0, NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} - 1){UserDefined, None}
	end for
	scroll.up{unknown} := real_to_int(round(scale.range(int_to_real(scroll.up{unknown}){Builtin, None}, 0, int_to_real(max(1, NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD{unknown} - 12){UserDefined, None}){Builtin, None}, 0, int_to_real(max(1, NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} - 12){UserDefined, None}){Builtin, None}){UserDefined, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	call update.preset_button_focus{UserDefined, None}
	if(btn_clear_tags{unknown} -> value = 1)
	if(preset.idx{unknown} # - 1)
	if(floatmask.equal(bit_list{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, None} = 1)
	scroll.up{unknown} := scroll.up{unknown}
	else
	scroll.up{unknown} := search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]
	end if
	else
	scroll.up{unknown} := scroll.up_origin{unknown}
	end if
	btn_clear_tags{unknown} := 0
	end if
	if(btn_presetBrowser{unknown} = 1)
	call repaint.scrollarea{UserDefined, None}
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} > 12)
	sli_scrollbar{unknown} := 1000000 - ((1000000 / (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} - 12)) * scroll.up{unknown})
	sli_scrollbar{unknown} -> mouse_behaviour := - (((508 - 249) * 12) + (2 * (NUM_PRESETS{unknown} - NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown})))
	handle_size{unknown} := real_to_int(round(int_to_real(249){Builtin, None} / (int_to_real(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown}){Builtin, None} / int_to_real(12){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	if(handle_size{unknown} < 30)
	handle_size{unknown} := 30
	end if
	else
	sli_scrollbar{unknown} := 1000000
	handle_size{unknown} := 249
	end if
	lbl_scrollhandle{unknown} -> height := handle_size{unknown}
	lbl_scrollhandle{unknown} -> POS_Y := sli_scrollbar{unknown} -> POS_Y + ((249 - handle_size{unknown}) - ((sli_scrollbar{unknown} * (249 - handle_size{unknown})) / 1000000))
	end if
	tag_button_pressed{unknown} := 0
	end if
end function

function update.preset_button_focus
	if((search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}] # - 1) and (preset.idx{unknown} # - 1))
	btn_preset_onoff[search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown} := 1
	if((scroll.up{unknown} > search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]) and (scroll.up{unknown} <= (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} - 12)))
	scroll.up{unknown} := search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}] + (ge(scroll.up{unknown} - 3, 0){UserDefined, None} * - 3)
	if(scroll.up{unknown} > (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} - 12))
	scroll.up{unknown} := search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]
	end if
	else
	if(((search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}] - scroll.up{unknown}) > 12) and (scroll.up{unknown} <= (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} - 12)))
	scroll.up{unknown} := ((search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}] - 12) + 1) + (le(scroll.up{unknown} + 3, NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown}){UserDefined, None} * 3)
	end if
	end if
	if((search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}] > (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} - 12)) and (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} > 12))
	scroll.up{unknown} := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} - 12
	end if
	scroll.up{unknown} := ge(scroll.up{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, None} * scroll.up{unknown}
	else
	if(preset.idx{unknown} = - 1)
	scroll.up{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end if
	if(scroll.up{unknown} > (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} - 12))
	scroll.up{unknown} := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} - 12
	end if
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} < 12)
	scroll.up{unknown} := 0
	end if
end function

function filter_presets override

	declare local escape : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local allowed : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local bit_count : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[final_lead_favorite_presets_array{unknown}] - 1
	final_preset_numbers_array[i{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1
	final_lead_favorite_presets_array[i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end for
	floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{unknown}, tag_button_array{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 6 - 1
	floatmask.get_range(bit_list{unknown}, category_accum[i{unknown}]{unknown}, category_accum[i{unknown} + 1]{unknown}, bitlist_return{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	activeTagsPerCategory[i{unknown}]{unknown} := floatmask.count(bitlist_return{unknown}, 1){UserDefined, None}
	end for
	z{unknown} := 0
	for i{unknown} := 0 to NUM_PRESETS{unknown} - 1
	floatmask.load(presetmask{unknown}, preset_tags0[i{unknown}]{unknown}, preset_tags1[i{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.set(presetmask{unknown}, 24 - 1, lead_favorite_presets_array[preset_numbers_array[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	v{unknown} := 0
	while((v{unknown} < 6) and (escape{unknown} = 0)) 
	if(filtermethodPerCategory[v{unknown}]{unknown} = filter.ADDITIVE{unknown})
	floatmask.get_range(presetmask{unknown}, category_accum[v{unknown}]{unknown}, category_accum[v{unknown} + 1]{unknown}, bitlist_return{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.and(bitlist_return{unknown}, bit_list{unknown}, bitlist_return{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	bit_count{unknown} := floatmask.count(bitlist_return{unknown}, 1){UserDefined, None}
	allowed{unknown} := allowed{unknown} + ((bool(bit_count{unknown}){UserDefined, None} .or. ne(bool(activeTagsPerCategory[v{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}){UserDefined, None}) * category_elements[v{unknown}]{unknown})
	escape{unknown} := ne(bool(bit_count{unknown}){UserDefined, None} .or. abs(bool(activeTagsPerCategory[v{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None} - 1){Builtin, None}){UserDefined, None}
	else
	if((filtermethodPerCategory[v{unknown}]{unknown} = filter.SUBTRACTIVE{unknown}) or (filtermethodPerCategory[v{unknown}]{unknown} = filter.TOGGLE{unknown}))
	floatmask.not(bit_list{unknown}, bitlist_return{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.or(bitlist_return{unknown}, presetmask{unknown}, bitlist_return{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.get_range(bitlist_return{unknown}, category_accum[v{unknown}]{unknown}, category_accum[v{unknown} + 1]{unknown}, bitlist_return{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	bit_count{unknown} := floatmask.count(bitlist_return{unknown}, 1){UserDefined, None}
	allowed{unknown} := allowed{unknown} + bit_count{unknown}
	end if
	end if
	inc(v{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	tags_wait{UserDefined, None}
	end while
	if(allowed{unknown} = 24)
	final_preset_title_array[z{unknown}]{unknown} := preset_title_array[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	final_preset_numbers_array[z{unknown}]{unknown} := preset_numbers_array[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	final_preset_info[z{unknown}]{unknown} := preset_info[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	final_lead_favorite_presets_array[z{unknown}]{unknown} := lead_favorite_presets_array[preset_numbers_array[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(z{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	escape{unknown} := 0
	allowed{unknown} := 0
	end_of_presets_array[i{unknown}]{unknown} := i{unknown}
	btn_preset_onoff[i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	bit_count{unknown} := 0
	end for
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} # 0)
	NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD{unknown} := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown}
	end if
	NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} := z{unknown}
end function

function tags_wait
	wait(1){Builtin, None}
end function

function tag_state_handling override

	floatmask.clear(bit_list2{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.clear(presetmask{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.clear(tagmask{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} - 1
	declare idx : unknown := search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, final_preset_numbers_array[i{unknown}]{unknown}] {Reuses: 0}
	floatmask.load(presetmask{unknown}, preset_tags0[idx{unknown}]{unknown}, preset_tags1[idx{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.set(presetmask{unknown}, 24 - 1, lead_favorite_presets_array[final_preset_numbers_array[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.or(tagmask{unknown}, presetmask{unknown}, tagmask{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	end for
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 6 - 1
	if((filtermethodPerCategory[ii{unknown}]{unknown} = filter.TOGGLE{unknown}) or (filtermethodPerCategory[ii{unknown}]{unknown} = filter.ADDITIVE{unknown}))
	bit_list2[0]{unknown} := bit_list[0]{unknown}
	bit_list2[1]{unknown} := bit_list[1]{unknown}
	floatmask.set_range(bit_list2{unknown}, category_accum[ii{unknown}]{unknown}, 24 - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 6 - 1
	if(filtermethodPerCategory[iii{unknown}]{unknown} # filter.SUBTRACTIVE{unknown})
	if(activeTagsPerCategory[iii{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	floatmask.set_range(bit_list2{unknown}, category_accum[iii{unknown}]{unknown}, category_accum[iii{unknown} + 1]{unknown}, 1){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	end for
	i{unknown} := 0
	while(i{unknown} < NUM_PRESETS{unknown}) 
	floatmask.load(presetmask{unknown}, preset_tags0[i{unknown}]{unknown}, preset_tags1[i{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.set(presetmask{unknown}, 24 - 1, lead_favorite_presets_array[preset_numbers_array[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.get_range(presetmask{unknown}, 0, category_accum[ii{unknown}]{unknown}, bitlist_return{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.and(bit_list2{unknown}, bitlist_return{unknown}, bitlist_return{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	u{unknown} := 0
	v{unknown} := 0
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to ii{unknown} - 1
	if(filtermethodPerCategory[iii{unknown}]{unknown} # filter.SUBTRACTIVE{unknown})
	floatmask.get_range(bitlist_return{unknown}, category_accum[iii{unknown}]{unknown}, category_accum[iii{unknown} + 1]{unknown}, bitlist_return1{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	if(floatmask.count(bitlist_return1{unknown}, 1){UserDefined, None} >= 1)
	inc(u{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	inc(v{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end for
	if((u{unknown} = v{unknown}) or (floatmask.equal(bitlist_return{unknown}, bit_list2{unknown}){UserDefined, None} = 1))
	floatmask.get_range(presetmask{unknown}, category_accum[ii{unknown}]{unknown}, category_accum[ii{unknown} + 1]{unknown}, bitlist_return1{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.or(tagmask{unknown}, bitlist_return1{unknown}, tagmask{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	inc(i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	end if
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 24 - 1
	tag_mask_array[i{unknown}]{unknown} := floatmask.get(tagmask{unknown}, i{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	end for
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to (6 - 1) - 1
	floatmask.get_range(tagmask{unknown}, category_accum[ii{unknown}]{unknown}, category_accum[ii{unknown} + 1]{unknown}, bitlist_return{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	category_active[ii{unknown}]{unknown} := ne(bool(floatmask.count(bitlist_return{unknown}, 1){UserDefined, None}){UserDefined, None}){UserDefined, None}
	lbl_categories[ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.category_font[category_active[ii{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	for i{unknown} := category_accum[ii{unknown}]{unknown} to category_accum[ii{unknown} + 1]{unknown} - 1
	for u{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[font.types{unknown}] - 1
	set_control_par(tag_button_array[i{unknown}]{unknown}, font.types[u{unknown}]{unknown}, fonts.base_font[u{unknown} * tag_mask_array[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (eq(tag_mask_array[i{unknown}]{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, None} * 6)){Builtin, None}
	end for
	end for
	end for
end function

function doubleclick_start(ui_control : unknown, double_click_control : unknown)
	set_bounds(double_click_control{unknown}, ui_control{unknown} -> x, ui_control{unknown} -> y, ui_control{unknown} -> width, ui_control{unknown} -> height){Property, None}
	double_click_control{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	double_click_control{unknown} := 0
	clicktime[0]{unknown} := get_ui_id(ui_control{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	clicktime[1]{unknown} := ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown}
end function

function doubleclick_check(double_click_control : unknown)
	wait((CLICKK_INTERVAL{unknown} * 1000) + 2000){Builtin, None}
	if((ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} - clicktime[1]{unknown}) > CLICKK_INTERVAL{unknown})
	double_click_control{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	clicktime[2]{unknown} := 0
	end if
end function

function get_preset_info
	return ("")
end function

function extract_preset_info
	return (get_preset_info{UserDefined, None})
end function

function update.preset_situation
	ii{unknown} := 0
	NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} := search[lead_user_preset_tags0{unknown}, 0]
	set_preset_numbers{UserDefined, None}
	if(NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} > 0)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} - 1
	if(lead_user_deleted_presets[i{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	lead_user_preset_titles[ii{unknown}]{unknown} := lead_user_preset_titles[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	lead_user_preset_tags0[ii{unknown}]{unknown} := lead_user_preset_tags0[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	lead_user_preset_tags1[ii{unknown}]{unknown} := lead_user_preset_tags1[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	lead_user_preset_numbers[ii{unknown}]{unknown} := lead_user_preset_numbers[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	lead_user_preset_info[ii{unknown}]{unknown} := lead_user_preset_info[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(ii{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end for
	NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} := ii{unknown}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} - 1
	preset_title_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} + i{unknown}]{unknown} := lead_user_preset_titles[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	final_preset_title_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} + i{unknown}]{unknown} := lead_user_preset_titles[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	file_name_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} + i{unknown}]{unknown} := lead_user_preset_titles[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	preset_tags0[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} + i{unknown}]{unknown} := lead_user_preset_tags0[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	preset_tags1[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} + i{unknown}]{unknown} := lead_user_preset_tags1[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	preset_numbers_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} + i{unknown}]{unknown} := lead_user_preset_numbers[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	final_preset_numbers_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} + i{unknown}]{unknown} := lead_user_preset_numbers[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	preset_info[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} + i{unknown}]{unknown} := lead_user_preset_info[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	end if
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[lead_user_deleted_presets{unknown}] - 1
	if(i{unknown} < NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown})
	lead_user_deleted_presets[i{unknown}]{unknown} := 1
	else
	lead_user_deleted_presets[i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	lead_user_preset_titles[i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	lead_user_preset_tags0[i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	lead_user_preset_tags1[i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	lead_user_preset_numbers[i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	lead_user_preset_info[i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end for
	NUM_PRESETS{unknown} := NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} + NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown}
	file_browser{unknown} -> basepath := base_path{string}
end function

function set_preset_numbers
	for i{unknown} := NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} to 1499 - 1
	preset_numbers_array[i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end for
end function

function save.favorite_array
	save_array(lead_favorite_presets_array{unknown}, 1){Builtin, None}
end function

function save.resource_arrays
	save_array(lead_user_deleted_presets{unknown}, 1){Builtin, None}
	save_array(lead_user_preset_tags0{int[]}, 1){Builtin, None}
	save_array(lead_user_preset_tags1{int[]}, 1){Builtin, None}
	save_array(lead_user_preset_titles{string[]}, 1){Builtin, None}
	save_array(lead_user_preset_numbers{unknown}, 1){Builtin, None}
	save_array(lead_user_preset_info{string[]}, 1){Builtin, None}
end function

function check.preset_overwrite
	i{unknown} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}
	preset.load_id{unknown} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & txt_presetname{string} -> text & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & txt_presetname{string} -> text & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	if(saving_preset{unknown} = user.EDITS_TAGS{unknown})
	if(i{unknown} = preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown})
	preset.load_id{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end if
	if(((preset.load_id{unknown} = - 1) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown}]{unknown} # 0)) and (preset.overwrite{unknown} = 1))
	txt_presetname{string} -> font_type := fonts.current_preset_font[0]{unknown}
	btn_overwrite{unknown} -> text := "File already exists. Overwrite?"
	btn_overwrite{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	else
	txt_presetname{string} -> font_type := fonts.current_preset_font[0]{unknown}
	btn_overwrite{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	preset.overwrite{unknown} := 0
	end if
end function

function visibility.preset.save.dialog(Boolean : unknown)
	lbl_save_dialog{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown}]{unknown}
	btn_save_confirm{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown}]{unknown}
	btn_save_cancel{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown}]{unknown}
	txt_presetname{string} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown}]{unknown}
	btn_scan_presets{unknown} := 0
	on_btn_scan_presets{UserDefined, None}
	btn_disable_input{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown}]{unknown}
	btn_save{unknown} := Boolean{unknown}
	lbl_warning{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown}]{unknown}
	btn_prevPreset{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[ne(Boolean{unknown}){UserDefined, None}]{unknown}
	btn_nextPreset{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[ne(Boolean{unknown}){UserDefined, None}]{unknown}
	btn_presetBrowser{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[ne(Boolean{unknown}){UserDefined, None}]{unknown}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[btn_preset_button{unknown}] - 1
	btn_preset_favorite[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := btn_favorite_pics[Boolean{unknown}]{string[]}
	if(Boolean{unknown} = 1)
	btn_preset_button[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.base_font_blurred[0]{unknown}
	btn_preset_button[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> font_type_on := fonts.base_font_blurred[1]{unknown}
	lbl_preset_info[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.smaller_font[2]{unknown}
	else
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[font.types{unknown}] - 1
	set_control_par(btn_preset_button[i{unknown}]{unknown}, font.types[ii{unknown}]{unknown}, fonts.base_font[ii{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	lbl_preset_info[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.smaller_font[0]{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	if(in_range(search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}] - scroll.up{unknown}, 0, 12 - 1){Builtin, None})
	lbl_preset_info[search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}] - scroll.up{unknown}]{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.smaller_font[ne(Boolean{unknown}){UserDefined, None} + (Boolean{unknown} * 3)]{unknown}
	end if
end function

function on_saving_preset_dialog
	visibility.preset.save.dialog(1){UserDefined, None}
	UI_preset_save_dialog{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[1]{unknown}
	if(preset.idx{unknown} # - 1)
	floatmask.load(presetmask{unknown}, preset_tags0[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}, preset_tags1[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	select(saving_preset{unknown})
	case user.EDITS_TAGS{unknown}
	txt_presetname{string} -> text := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}
	case user.SAVES_NEW{unknown}
	if(is_user_preset(presetmask{unknown}){UserDefined, None} = 0)
	txt_presetname{string} -> text := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown} & " (User)"
	else
	txt_presetname{string} -> text := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}
	end if
	end select
	lbl_warning{unknown} -> text := "Choose a selection of tags"
	add_text_line(lbl_warning{unknown}, "that apply to your preset"){Builtin, None}
	lbl_warning{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.base_font[1]{unknown}
	floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{unknown}, tag_button_array{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	bit_list2[0]{unknown} := bit_list[0]{unknown}
	bit_list2[1]{unknown} := bit_list[1]{unknown}
	floatmask.load(bit_list{unknown}, preset_tags0[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}, preset_tags1[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.set(bit_list{unknown}, 24 - 1, lead_favorite_presets_array[preset.idx{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	ii{unknown} := get_category_idx(2){UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.set_range(bit_list{unknown}, category_accum[ii{unknown}]{unknown}, category_accum[ii{unknown} + 1]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	floatmask.set(bit_list{unknown}, 2, 1){UserDefined, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to (24 - 1) - 1
	tag_button_array[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := floatmask.get(bit_list{unknown}, i{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	for u{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[font.types{unknown}] - 1
	set_control_par(tag_button_array[i{unknown}]{unknown}, font.types[u{unknown}]{unknown}, fonts.base_font[u{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	end for
	btn_current_favorite{unknown} -> value := lead_favorite_presets_array[preset.idx{unknown}]{unknown}
	end if
end function

function save.preset
	preset.usr_name{string} := txt_presetname{string} -> text
	if(saving_preset{unknown} = user.EDITS_TAGS{unknown})
	preset.usr_name{string} := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}
	end if
	preset.load_id{unknown} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{unknown}, tag_button_array{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{unknown}]{unknown} := bit_list[0]{unknown}
	preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{unknown}]{unknown} := bit_list[1]{unknown}
	lead_user_deleted_presets[NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown}]{unknown} := 1
	if((preset.load_id{unknown} = - 1) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown}]{unknown} # 0))
	lead_user_preset_tags0[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{unknown}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} := preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}
	lead_user_preset_tags1[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{unknown}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} := preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}
	lead_user_preset_titles[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{unknown}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}]]{string[]} := preset.usr_name{string}
	lead_user_deleted_presets[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{unknown}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} := 1
	lead_user_preset_info[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{unknown}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} := get_preset_info{UserDefined, None}
	else
	lead_user_preset_tags0[NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown}]{unknown} := preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}
	lead_user_preset_tags1[NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown}]{unknown} := preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}
	lead_user_preset_titles[NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown}]{string[]} := preset.usr_name{string}
	preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown} := validate.user_preset_idx(NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} + 999){UserDefined, None}
	lead_user_preset_numbers[NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown}]{unknown} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}
	lead_user_preset_info[NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown}]{unknown} := get_preset_info{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{unknown}]{unknown} := PRODUCT_PRESET_VERSION{unknown}
	preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown}]{unknown} := 1
	call save_preset{UserDefined, None}
	save_array_str(preset.array{unknown}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	preset.last_idx{unknown} := preset.idx{unknown}
	call update.preset_situation{UserDefined, None}
	if(saving_preset{unknown} = user.SAVES_NEW{unknown})
	preset.idx{unknown} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}
	call filter_presets{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	save.resource_arrays{UserDefined, None}
	btn_save{unknown} := 0
	call off_saving_preset_dialog{UserDefined, None}
	message("preset.idx: " & preset.idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	browser.load_preset{UserDefined, None}
	instrument.reload_all{UserDefined, None}
end function

function validate.user_preset_idx(idx : unknown) -> result : unknown
	declare local preset_exists : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	preset_exists{unknown} := 0
	if(search[lead_user_preset_numbers{unknown}, idx{unknown}] # - 1)
	preset.count{unknown} := 0
	preset_exists{unknown} := 1
	while(preset_exists{unknown} = 1) 
	if(search[lead_user_preset_numbers{unknown}, preset.count{unknown} + 999] # - 1)
	inc(preset.count{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	preset_exists{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end while
	result{unknown} := preset.count{unknown} + 999
	else
	result{unknown} := idx{unknown}
	end if
end function

function edit.tags
	preset.usr_name{string} := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}
	message("@preset.usr_name: " & preset.usr_name{string}){Builtin, None}
	preset.load_id{unknown} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	save_array_str(preset.array{unknown}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(save_array_str(preset.array{unknown}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[preset.array{unknown}] - 1
	preset.arrayBuffer[i{unknown}]{unknown} := preset.array[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	preset.arrayBuffer[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown}]{unknown} := 1
	floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{unknown}, tag_button_array{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS0_IDX{unknown}]{unknown} := bit_list[0]{unknown}
	preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS1_IDX{unknown}]{unknown} := bit_list[1]{unknown}
	preset.load_id{unknown} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & txt_presetname{string} -> text & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & txt_presetname{string} -> text & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	lead_user_deleted_presets[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{unknown}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} := 0
	lead_user_deleted_presets[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{unknown}, preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} := 1
	lead_user_preset_tags0[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{unknown}, preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} := preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS0_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}
	lead_user_preset_tags1[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{unknown}, preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} := preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS1_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}
	lead_user_preset_titles[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{unknown}, preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}]]{string[]} := txt_presetname{string} -> text
	lead_user_preset_info[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{unknown}, preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} := get_preset_info{UserDefined, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[preset.array{unknown}] - 1
	preset.array[i{unknown}]{unknown} := preset.arrayBuffer[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	preset.arrayBuffer[i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end for
	save_array_str(preset.array{unknown}, base_path{string} & txt_presetname{string} -> text & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	message("SAVED AS: " & base_path{string} & txt_presetname{string} -> text & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	call update.preset_situation{UserDefined, None}
	preset.idx{unknown} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}
	save.resource_arrays{UserDefined, None}
	btn_save{unknown} := 0
	call off_saving_preset_dialog{UserDefined, None}
	browser.load_preset{UserDefined, None}
	instrument.reload_all{UserDefined, None}
end function

function delete.preset
	preset.load_id{unknown} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & final_preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & final_preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	lead_user_deleted_presets[search[lead_user_preset_numbers{unknown}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} := 0
	save_array_str(preset.array{unknown}, base_path{string} & final_preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	for i{unknown} := search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}] to num_elements[lead_favorite_presets_array{unknown}] - 1
	if(i{unknown} < (num_elements[lead_favorite_presets_array{unknown}] - 1))
	lead_favorite_presets_array[i{unknown}]{unknown} := lead_favorite_presets_array[i{unknown} + 1]{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	save.favorite_array{UserDefined, None}
	preset.idx{unknown} := preset_numbers_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}] - 1]{unknown}
	call update.preset_situation{UserDefined, None}
	save.resource_arrays{UserDefined, None}
	saving_preset{unknown} := 0
	call on_button_tag{UserDefined, None}
	if(search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}] # - 1)
	preset.idx{unknown} := final_preset_numbers_array[search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}] mod NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown}]{unknown}
	else
	preset.idx{unknown} := preset.idx{unknown}
	end if
	btn_preset_onoff[search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown} := 1
	if(in_range(search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}] - scroll.up{unknown}, 0, 12 - 1){Builtin, None})
	btn_preset_button[search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}] - scroll.up{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 1
	end if
	call update.preset_button_focus{UserDefined, None}
	call update.scrollarea{UserDefined, None}
	call update.btn_active_status{UserDefined, None}
	if(search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.last_idx{unknown}] = - 1)
	message("loaded preset has been deleted"){Builtin, None}
	browser.load_preset{UserDefined, None}
	instrument.reload_all{UserDefined, None}
	end if
end function

function off_saving_preset_dialog
	saving_disabled{unknown} := 1
	saving_preset{unknown} := 0
	btn_save{unknown} := 0
	btn_edit_tags{unknown} := 0
	preset.overwrite{unknown} := 0
	txt_presetname{string} -> font_type := fonts.current_preset_font[0]{unknown}
	btn_overwrite{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	visibility.preset.save.dialog(0){UserDefined, None}
	UI_preset_save_dialog{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[0]{unknown}
	bit_list[0]{unknown} := bit_list2[0]{unknown}
	bit_list[1]{unknown} := bit_list2[1]{unknown}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 24 - 1
	tag_button_array[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := floatmask.get(bit_list{unknown}, i{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	end for
	btn_scan_presets{unknown} := 0
	call on_btn_scan_presets{UserDefined, None}
	call on_button_tag{UserDefined, None}
	call update.btn_active_status{UserDefined, None}
end function

function on_btn_scan_presets
	lbl_scan_animation{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[btn_scan_presets{unknown}]{unknown}
	set_bounds(lbl_scan_animation{unknown}, btn_scan_presets{unknown} -> x + 1, btn_scan_presets{unknown} -> y + 1){Property, None}
	btn_scan_presets{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_scan_presets{unknown}){UserDefined, None}]{unknown}
	btn_disable_input{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[btn_scan_presets{unknown}]{unknown}
	lbl_scan_info{unknown} -> hide := hide_state[btn_scan_presets{unknown}]{unknown}
	lbl_scan_info{unknown} -> text := "Scanning files..."
	if(btn_scan_presets{unknown} -> value = 0)
	file_browser{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_scan_info{unknown} -> text := ""
	end if
end function

function scanning_automation
	if((preset_scan_info{unknown} = 0) and (btn_scan_presets{unknown} -> value = 1))
	if(preset_scan{unknown} = 1)
	lbl_scan_animation{unknown} -> picture_state := preset.frame_count{unknown}
	end if
	if((preset_scan{unknown} = 0) and in_range(preset.frame_count{unknown}, 1, 50){Builtin, None})
	lbl_scan_animation{unknown} -> picture_state := preset.frame_count{unknown}
	if(preset.frame_count{unknown} >= 50)
	preset_scan_info{unknown} := 1
	preset.frame_count{unknown} := 0
	btn_scan_presets{unknown} -> value := 0
	call on_btn_scan_presets{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	preset.frame_rate{unknown} := (preset.frame_rate{unknown} + 1) mod real_to_int(round((1 / int_to_real(30){Builtin, None}) / (int_to_real(MS_SIGNAL{unknown}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	preset.frame_count{unknown} := (preset.frame_count{unknown} + (sh_right(- preset.frame_rate{unknown}, 31){Builtin, None} + 1)) mod 51
	else
	if((preset_scan_info{unknown} = 1) and (preset_scan{unknown} = 0))
	preset.frame_rate{unknown} := (preset.frame_rate{unknown} + 1) mod real_to_int(round((1 / int_to_real(30){Builtin, None}) / (int_to_real(MS_SIGNAL{unknown}){Builtin, None} / 1e+06)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	preset.frame_count{unknown} := (preset.frame_count{unknown} + (sh_right(- preset.frame_rate{unknown}, 31){Builtin, None} + 1)) mod 100
	if(preset.frame_count{unknown} >= 99)
	preset_scan_info{unknown} := 0
	lbl_scan_info{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_presetcount{unknown} -> text := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} & "/" & NUM_PRESETS{unknown}
	else
	if(btn_scan_presets{unknown} -> key_alt = 0)
	lbl_scan_info{unknown} -> text := "User Presets found: " & preset.usr_display_num{unknown}
	else
	lbl_scan_info{unknown} -> text := "Files recovered: " & preset.usr_display_num{unknown}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
end function

function save_scanned_preset_vars
	lead_user_preset_titles[preset.usr_count{unknown}]{unknown} := fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{unknown}){Builtin, None}, 0){Builtin, None}
	lead_user_preset_tags0[preset.usr_count{unknown}]{int[]} := (bool(preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None} * preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}) + (eq(preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, None} * - 1)
	lead_user_preset_tags1[preset.usr_count{unknown}]{int[]} := (bool(preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None} * preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}) + (eq(preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, None} * - 1)
	lead_user_deleted_presets[preset.usr_count{unknown}]{unknown} := preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}
	preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown} := validate.user_preset_idx(preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	lead_user_preset_numbers[preset.usr_count{unknown}]{unknown} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}
	lead_user_preset_info[preset.usr_count{unknown}]{unknown} := extract_preset_info{UserDefined, None}
	inc(preset.usr_count{unknown}){Builtin, None}
end function

function get_user_preset_after_scan
	floatmask.load(presetmask{unknown}, preset_tags0[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}, preset_tags1[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	if(is_user_preset(presetmask{unknown}){UserDefined, None} = 1)
	preset.load_id{unknown} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	message(base_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	if(preset.load_id{unknown} = - 1)
	load_new{unknown} := 0
	preset.idx{unknown} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown}]{unknown}
	else
	preset.idx{unknown} := preset_numbers_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} - 1]{unknown}
	load_new{unknown} := 1
	end if
	preset.idx{unknown} := preset.idx{unknown}
	end if
end function

function browser.load_preset
	if((preset.is_loading{unknown} = 0) and (preset.idx{unknown} # - 1))
	if(preset.idx{unknown} # preset.last_idx{unknown})
	preset.last_idx{unknown} := preset.idx{unknown}
	load_preset_array{UserDefined, None}
	if(preset.load_id{unknown} = - 1)
	call load_preset{UserDefined, None}
	init.instrument{UserDefined, None}
	call nks.update_all_labels{UserDefined, None}
	update.purge.state{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	end if
end function

function update.purge.state
end function

function is_user_preset(float_mask : unknown)
	return (floatmask.get(float_mask{unknown}, 2){UserDefined, None} * preset.allow_user{unknown})
end function

function is_user_preset_save
	return (saving_preset{unknown} * preset.allow_user{unknown})
end function

function load_preset_array override

	message(preset_numbers_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown} & ", " & preset.idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	floatmask.load(presetmask{unknown}, preset_tags0[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}, preset_tags1[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	if(is_user_preset(presetmask{unknown}){UserDefined, None} = 1)
	preset.load_id{unknown} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	message("loading user_preset" & ", " & base_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	else
	preset.load_id{unknown} := load_array_str(preset.array{unknown}, preset_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	message("loading factory_preset" & ", " & preset_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	while(preset.load_id{unknown} > 0) 
	wait(10){Builtin, None}
	end while
end function

function save_preset
	preset.n{unknown} := 0 + (is_user_preset_save{UserDefined, None} * preset.CONTENT_IDX{unknown})
	preset.array.add(PRODUCT_PRESET_VERSION{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[slot.loaded_sound{unknown}] - 1
	preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown} := slot.loaded_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[sli_volume{unknown}] - 1
	preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown} := sli_volume[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}

	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for

	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}

function load_preset
	preset.is_loading{unknown} := 1
	floatmask.load(presetmask{unknown}, preset_tags0[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}, preset_tags1[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown}, preset.idx{unknown}]]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	preset.n{unknown} := 0 + (is_user_preset(presetmask{unknown}){UserDefined, None} * preset.CONTENT_IDX{unknown})
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	playing{unknown} := 0
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[slot.loaded_sound{unknown}] - 1
	slot.loaded_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown} := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[sli_volume{unknown}] - 1
	sli_volume[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[sli_volume_min{unknown}] - 1
	sli_volume_min[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[sli_volume_max{unknown}] - 1
	sli_volume_max[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[_solo_mute_states{unknown}] - 1
	_solo_mute_states[i{unknown}]{unknown} := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[sli_oct{unknown}] - 1
	sli_oct[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[sli_pan{unknown}] - 1
	sli_pan[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[sli_rev_send{unknown}] - 1
	sli_rev_send[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[mnu_output{unknown}] - 1
	mnu_output[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[_fx_bypass{unknown}] - 1
	_fx_bypass[i{unknown}]{unknown} := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[_delay_sync{unknown}] - 1
	_delay_sync[i{unknown}]{unknown} := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[_loaded_fx_types{unknown}] - 1
	_loaded_fx_types[i{unknown}]{unknown} := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[_loaded_fx_subtypes{unknown}] - 1
	_loaded_fx_subtypes[i{unknown}]{unknown} := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[_sli_fxrack_control{unknown}] - 1
	_sli_fxrack_control[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[eq_position{unknown}] - 1
	eq_position[i{unknown}]{unknown} := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[eq_bypass{unknown}] - 1
	eq_bypass[i{unknown}]{unknown} := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[_eq.sli_freq{unknown}] - 1
	_eq.sli_freq[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[_eq.sli_gain{unknown}] - 1
	_eq.sli_gain[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[_eq.sli_q{unknown}] - 1
	_eq.sli_q[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[sli_attack{unknown}] - 1
	sli_attack[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[sli_release{unknown}] - 1
	sli_release[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	if(btn_global_fx_lock{unknown} = 0)
	mnu_reverb_type{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	mnu_ir{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	sli_reverb_length{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	sli_reverb_output{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	btn_comp_bypass{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	sli_comp_threshold{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	sli_comp_gain{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[btn_lfo_bypass{unknown}] - 1
	btn_lfo_bypass[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[sli_lfo_freq{unknown}] - 1
	sli_lfo_freq[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[btn_lfo_sync{unknown}] - 1
	btn_lfo_sync[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[mnu_lfo_type{unknown}] - 1
	mnu_lfo_type[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	end if
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[motion.sli_min{unknown}] - 1
	motion.sli_min[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[motion.sli_max{unknown}] - 1
	motion.sli_max[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[motion.btn_enable{unknown}] - 1
	motion.btn_enable[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[motion.mnu_source{unknown}] - 1
	motion.mnu_source[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	sli_volume.previous[i{unknown}]{unknown} := sli_volume[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	solo_mute_states[0, i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	solo_mute_states[1, i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end for
	call main_display.update{UserDefined, None}
	call execute_morph_faders{UserDefined, None}
	call execute_shape_controls{UserDefined, None}
	call global_fx.reload{UserDefined, None}
	call fxRack.update_allround{UserDefined, None}
	call motion.apply_modwheel{UserDefined, None}
	call set_solo_mute{UserDefined, None}
	call note_offset.update{UserDefined, None}
	preset.is_loading{unknown} := 0
end function

function init.instrument
end function

function preset.array.add(value : unknown)
	preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown} := value{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
end function

function preset.array.load(value : unknown)
	value{unknown} := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
end function

function preset.array.loadControlValue(uiControl : unknown)
	uiControl{unknown} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(preset.n{unknown}){Builtin, None}
end function

	development[0]{unknown} := - 1
	_id{unknown} := load_array_str(development{int[]}, development_path{string}){Builtin, None}
	if(_id{unknown} = - 1)
	end if
end function

	disable_logging(NI_LOG_WARNING{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	disable_logging(NI_LOG_WATCHING{unknown}){Builtin, None}

	if(_id{unknown} = - 1)
	end if
end function

function find_nka(array : unknown, nka : unknown, search_depth : unknown) -> result : unknown
	declare local parent : string {Reuses: 0}
	declare local it : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	it{unknown} := 0
	parent{string} := ""
	_id{unknown} := load_array_str(array{unknown}, get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown}){Builtin, None} & parent{unknown} & nka{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	while((_id{unknown} # - 1) and (it{unknown} < search_depth{unknown})) 
	parent{unknown} := parent{unknown} & "../"
	_id{unknown} := load_array_str(array{unknown}, get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown}){Builtin, None} & parent{unknown} & nka{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	inc(it{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	result{unknown} := get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown}){Builtin, None} & parent{unknown} & nka{unknown} & ".nka"
end function

function find_key_nka(array : unknown, nka : unknown, key : unknown, parent_folder : unknown, search_depth : unknown) -> result : unknown
	declare local path : string {Reuses: 0}
	declare local it : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	array[0]{unknown} := - 1
	it{unknown} := 0
	path{string} := ""
	_id{unknown} := load_array_str(array{unknown}, get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown}){Builtin, None} & path{unknown} & parent_folder{unknown} & nka{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	while(((_id{unknown} # - 1) and (it{unknown} < search_depth{unknown})) and (array[0]{unknown} # key{unknown})) 
	array[0]{unknown} := - 1
	path{unknown} := path{unknown} & "../"
	_id{unknown} := load_array_str(array{unknown}, get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown}){Builtin, None} & path{unknown} & parent_folder{unknown} & nka{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}
	inc(it{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	result{unknown} := get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown}){Builtin, None} & path{unknown} & nka{unknown} & ".nka"
end function

function timed_display.trigger(control_id : unknown, text : unknown, time : unknown)
	declare _id : unknown := search[timed_display.controls{unknown}, control_id{unknown}] {Reuses: 0}
	if(_id{unknown} # - 1)
	timed_display.times[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := time{unknown}
	if(time{unknown} = 0)
	timed_display.times[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := 1200
	end if
	timed_display.texts[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := text{unknown}
	timed_display.properties[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	timed_display.counters[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	else
	_id{unknown} := search[timed_display.controls{unknown}, - 1]
	if(_id{unknown} # - 1)
	timed_display.controls[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := control_id{unknown}
	timed_display.times[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := time{unknown}
	if(time{unknown} = 0)
	timed_display.times[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := 1200
	end if
	timed_display.texts[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := text{unknown}
	timed_display.counters[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	timed_display.properties[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	else
	control_id{unknown} -> text := text{unknown}
	end if
	end if
end function

function timed_display.trigger_with_bg_ani(control_id : unknown, text : unknown, time : unknown, frames : unknown)
	declare _id : unknown := search[timed_display.controls{unknown}, control_id{unknown}] {Reuses: 0}
	if(_id{unknown} # - 1)
	timed_display.times[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := time{unknown}
	if(time{unknown} = 0)
	timed_display.times[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := 1200
	end if
	timed_display.texts[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := text{unknown}
	timed_display.properties[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := frames{unknown}
	timed_display.counters[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	else
	_id{unknown} := search[timed_display.controls{unknown}, - 1]
	if(_id{unknown} # - 1)
	timed_display.controls[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := control_id{unknown}
	timed_display.times[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := time{unknown}
	if(time{unknown} = 0)
	timed_display.times[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := 1200
	end if
	timed_display.texts[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := text{unknown}
	timed_display.counters[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	timed_display.properties[_id{unknown}]{unknown} := frames{unknown}
	none{unknown} := animation.picture.start(control_id{unknown}, 0, frames{unknown} - 1, frames{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, None}
	else
	control_id{unknown} -> text := text{unknown}
	end if
	end if
end function

function animation.position.start(ui_id : unknown, start_pos_x : unknown, start_pos_y : unknown, end_pos_x : unknown, end_pos_y : unknown, length : unknown, mode : unknown) -> result : unknown
	declare id : unknown := search[animation.controls{unknown}, - 1] {Reuses: 0}
	if(id{unknown} # - 1)
	animation.controls[id{unknown}]{unknown} := ui_id{unknown}
	animation.time_left[id{unknown}]{unknown} := length{unknown}
	animation.length[id{unknown}]{unknown} := length{unknown}
	animation.type[id{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	animation.start_pos[id{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := start_pos_x{unknown}
	animation.start_pos[id{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := start_pos_y{unknown}
	animation.end_pos[id{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := end_pos_x{unknown}
	animation.end_pos[id{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := end_pos_y{unknown}
	animation.mode[id{unknown}]{unknown} := mode{unknown}
	else
	message("***Error in animation.ksp *** too many animations at the same time. Increase value of MAX_ANIMATIONS"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	result{unknown} := id{unknown}
	message("started animation"){Builtin, None}
end function

function animation.picture.start(ui_id : unknown, start_pos : unknown, end_pos : unknown, length : unknown, mode : unknown) -> result : unknown
	declare id : unknown := search[animation.controls{unknown}, - 1] {Reuses: 0}
	if(id{unknown} # - 1)
	animation.controls[id{unknown}]{unknown} := ui_id{unknown}
	animation.time_left[id{unknown}]{unknown} := length{unknown}
	animation.length[id{unknown}]{unknown} := length{unknown}
	animation.type[id{unknown}]{unknown} := 1
	animation.start_pos[id{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := start_pos{unknown}
	animation.end_pos[id{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := end_pos{unknown}
	animation.mode[id{unknown}]{unknown} := mode{unknown}
	else
	message("***Error in animation.ksp *** too many animations at the same time. Increase value of MAX_ANIMATIONS"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	result{unknown} := id{unknown}
end function

function animation.abort(animation_id : unknown)
	if(animation_id{unknown} > - 1)
	if(animation.controls[animation_id{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)
	animation.controls[animation_id{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1
	end if
	end if
end function

function motion.apply_modwheel
	for motion.iterator{unknown} := 0 to 28 - 1
	if(((motion.btn_enable[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value = 1) and (motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value = 0)) and ((btn_midi_mode{unknown} = 0) or (current_controller_channel{unknown} = motion.slot[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown})))
	motion.value{unknown} := motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value + real_to_int(int_to_real((motion.sli_max[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value - motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value) * motion.modwheel{unknown}){Builtin, None} / 127){Builtin, None}
	motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := scale.range.slider(int_to_real(motion.value{unknown}){Builtin, None}, int_to_real(motion.min[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}, int_to_real(motion.max[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){UserDefined, None}
	s{unknown} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if(s{unknown} # - 1)
	fxRack.value{unknown} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{unknown}]{unknown} -> value
	fxRack.slot{unknown} := s{unknown} / (4 * 3)
	fxRack.fx_slot{unknown} := (s{unknown} / 4) mod 3
	fxRack.control{unknown} := s{unknown} mod 4
	fxRack.ui_id{unknown} := motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{unknown}, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown}]{unknown} # 6)
	call fxRack.execute_slider{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{unknown} := search[sli_attack{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if((s{unknown} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1))
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(s{unknown} = active_slot{unknown})
	lbl_attack{unknown} -> text := string_buffer{string}
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{unknown}){Builtin, None}, "Attack", 0){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	s{unknown} := search[sli_release{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if((s{unknown} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1))
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(s{unknown} = active_slot{unknown})
	lbl_release{unknown} -> text := string_buffer{string}
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{unknown}){Builtin, None}, "Release", 0){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> label := string_buffer{string}
	end if
	end for
end function

function motion.apply_lfo
	for motion.iterator{unknown} := 0 to 28 - 1
	if((motion.btn_enable[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value = 1) and (motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value > 0))
	motion.value{unknown} := motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value + real_to_int(int_to_real(motion.sli_max[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value - motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None} * lfo[motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value - 1]{real[]}){Builtin, None}
	motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := scale.range.slider(int_to_real(motion.value{unknown}){Builtin, None}, int_to_real(motion.min[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}, int_to_real(motion.max[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){UserDefined, None}
	s{unknown} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if(s{unknown} # - 1)
	fxRack.value{unknown} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{unknown}]{unknown} -> value
	fxRack.slot{unknown} := s{unknown} / (4 * 3)
	fxRack.fx_slot{unknown} := (s{unknown} / 4) mod 3
	fxRack.control{unknown} := s{unknown} mod 4
	fxRack.ui_id{unknown} := motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{unknown}, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown}]{unknown} # 6)
	call fxRack.execute_slider{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{unknown} := search[sli_attack{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if((s{unknown} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1))
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(s{unknown} = active_slot{unknown})
	lbl_attack{unknown} -> text := string_buffer{string}
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{unknown}){Builtin, None}, "Attack", 0){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	s{unknown} := search[sli_release{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if((s{unknown} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1))
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(s{unknown} = active_slot{unknown})
	lbl_release{unknown} -> text := string_buffer{string}
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{unknown}){Builtin, None}, "Release", 0){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> label := string_buffer{string}
	end if
	end for
end function

function motion.add_fader(ui_id : unknown, id : unknown, min : unknown, max : unknown, slot : unknown)
	motion.id{unknown} := id{unknown}
	if(motion.ui_ids[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)
	message("motion id already in use"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	if(motion.id{unknown} # - 1)
	motion.ui_ids[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} := ui_id{unknown}
	motion.min[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} := min{unknown}
	motion.max[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} := max{unknown}
	motion.type[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} := 2
	motion.slot[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} := slot{unknown}
	declare _parent : unknown := ui_id{unknown} -> parent_panel {Reuses: 0}
	motion.btn_enable[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := (ui_id{unknown} -> x + (ui_id{unknown} -> width / 2)) - (motion.btn_enable[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> width / 2)
	motion.btn_enable[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := (ui_id{unknown} -> y + ui_id{unknown} -> height) + 5
