	motion.btn_enable[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> parent_panel := _parent{unknown}
	motion.btn_enable[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> z_layer := 1
	motion.lbl_enable_connect[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> parent_panel := _parent{unknown}
	motion.lbl_enable_connect[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> z_layer := 1
	motion.mnu_source[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := (ui_id{unknown} -> x + ui_id{unknown} -> width) + 2
	motion.mnu_source[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := ui_id{unknown} -> y
	motion.mnu_source[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> parent_panel := _parent{unknown}
	set_slider_properties(motion.sli_min[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown}, ui_id{unknown} -> default, "", - 1200){Property, None}
	motion.sli_min[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := 20
	motion.sli_min[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> height := 100
	motion.sli_min[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "slider_fx_handles_left" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	motion.sli_min[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := (ui_id{unknown} -> x + (ui_id{unknown} -> width / 2)) - 20
	motion.sli_min[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := ui_id{unknown} -> y
	motion.sli_min[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> parent_panel := _parent{unknown}
	set_slider_properties(motion.sli_max[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown}, ui_id{unknown} -> default, "", - 1200){Property, None}
	motion.sli_max[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := 15
	motion.sli_max[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> height := 100
	motion.sli_max[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "slider_fx_handles_right" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	motion.sli_max[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := ui_id{unknown} -> x + (ui_id{unknown} -> width / 2)
	motion.sli_max[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := ui_id{unknown} -> y
	motion.sli_max[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> parent_panel := _parent{unknown}
	motion.update_visibility(ui_id{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	end if
end function

function motion.update_position.fader(ui_id : unknown)
	motion.id{unknown} := search[motion.ui_ids{unknown}, ui_id{unknown}]
	motion.btn_enable[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := (ui_id{unknown} -> x + (ui_id{unknown} -> width / 2)) - (motion.btn_enable[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> width / 2)
	motion.btn_enable[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := (ui_id{unknown} -> y + ui_id{unknown} -> height) + 5
	motion.lbl_enable_connect[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := motion.btn_enable[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> y + 3
	motion.lbl_enable_connect[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := motion.btn_enable[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> x + 23
	motion.mnu_source[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := (ui_id{unknown} -> x + ui_id{unknown} -> width) + 2
	motion.mnu_source[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := (ui_id{unknown} -> y + ui_id{unknown} -> height) - 1
	motion.sli_min[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := (ui_id{unknown} -> x + (ui_id{unknown} -> width / 2)) - 20
	motion.sli_min[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := ui_id{unknown} -> y
	motion.sli_max[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := (ui_id{unknown} -> x + (ui_id{unknown} -> width / 2)) - 2
	motion.sli_max[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := ui_id{unknown} -> y
	call motion.update{UserDefined, None}
end function

function motion.update
	declare _type_str : string := "" {Reuses: 0}
	declare _curr_contr : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	if(motion.update_defense{unknown} = 0)
	motion.update_defense{unknown} := 1
	for motion.iterator{unknown} := 0 to 28 - 1
	if(motion.btn_enable[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value = 1)
	if(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide # HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown})
	motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	motion.lbl_enable_connect[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	motion.sli_max[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "slider_fx_handles_left" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	motion.sli_max[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "slider_fx_handles_right" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	motion.lbl_min[_curr_contr{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := 60
	motion.lbl_min[_curr_contr{unknown}]{unknown} -> height := 20
	motion.lbl_min[_curr_contr{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := (motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> x + (motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> width / 2)) - 60
	motion.lbl_min[_curr_contr{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := (motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> y + motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> height) + 5
	motion.lbl_min[_curr_contr{unknown}]{unknown} -> parent_panel := motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> parent_panel
	motion.lbl_max[_curr_contr{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := 60
	motion.lbl_max[_curr_contr{unknown}]{unknown} -> height := 20
	motion.lbl_max[_curr_contr{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := (motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> x + (motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> width / 2)) - 60
	motion.lbl_max[_curr_contr{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := (motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> y + motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> height) + 5
	motion.lbl_max[_curr_contr{unknown}]{unknown} -> parent_panel := motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> parent_panel
	inc(_curr_contr{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	if(_curr_contr{unknown} > 4)
	message(" *** ERROR *** to many motion controls at the same time! Increase MOTION.MAX_CONCURRENT_CONTROLS! "){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "slider_fx_modulation" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	if(motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value = 0)
	motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "btn_fx_toggle_modwheel"
	else
	if(motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value = 1)
	motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "btn_fx_toggle_lfo"
	end if
	end if
	else
	motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	motion.lbl_enable_connect[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	motion.sli_max[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "slider_fx_handles" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	end if
	end for
	wait(10000){Builtin, None}
	motion.update_defense{unknown} := 0
	end if
end function

function motion.update_visibility(ui_id : unknown)
	motion.id{unknown} := search[motion.ui_ids{unknown}, ui_id{unknown}]
	if(motion.id{unknown} # - 1)
	if(ui_id{unknown} -> hide # HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown})
	motion.btn_enable[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	if(motion.btn_enable[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> value = 1)
	motion.mnu_source[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	motion.sli_min[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	motion.sli_max[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	end if
	else
	motion.btn_enable[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	motion.mnu_source[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	motion.sli_min[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	motion.sli_max[motion.id{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	end if
end function

function lfo.execute
	if(PLAYED_VOICES_INST{unknown} > 0)
	inc(lfo.counter{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	if(lfo.counter{unknown} >= LFO.UPDATE_RATE{unknown})
	lfo.counter{unknown} := 0
	for idx{unknown} := 0 to 1 - 1
	if(btn_lfo_bypass[idx{unknown}]{unknown} -> value = 1)
	if(btn_lfo_sync[idx{unknown}]{unknown} -> value = 1)
	frequency[idx{unknown}]{real[]} := ((tempo{real} * 24) / 60) / real(ticks_durations[scale.range(sli_lfo_freq[idx{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, 0, 1000000, 0, num_elements[ticks_durations{unknown}] - 1){UserDefined, None}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	frequency[idx{unknown}]{real[]} := scale.range.log(real(sli_lfo_freq[idx{unknown}]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None}, 0, 1e+06, 0.01, 15.01){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	phi[idx{unknown}]{unknown} := phi[idx{unknown}]{unknown} + ((2 * NI_MATH_PI{unknown}) * (frequency[idx{unknown}]{real[]} / (1e+06 / int_to_real(1000 * LFO.UPDATE_RATE{unknown}){Builtin, None})))
	if(phi[idx{unknown}]{unknown} = (2 * NI_MATH_PI{unknown}))
	phi[idx{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end if
	select(mnu_lfo_type[idx{unknown}]{unknown} -> value)
	case 0
	lfo[idx{unknown}]{real[]} := (lfo.A{unknown} * sin(phi[idx{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}) + lfo.A{unknown}
	case 1
	lfo[idx{unknown}]{real[]} := (2 * lfo.A{unknown}) * int_to_real(real_to_int(round((sin(phi[idx{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None} + 1) / 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	case 2
	lfo[idx{unknown}]{real[]} := (((2 * lfo.A{unknown}) / NI_MATH_PI{unknown}) * asin(sin(phi[idx{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) + lfo.A{unknown}
	case 3
	lfo[idx{unknown}]{real[]} := (((- 2 * lfo.A{unknown}) / NI_MATH_PI{unknown}) * atan(cos(phi[idx{unknown}]{unknown} / 2){Builtin, None} / sin(phi[idx{unknown}]{unknown} / 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) + lfo.A{unknown}
	end select
	call motion.apply_lfo{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end for
	if(motion.once{unknown} = 0)
	motion.once{unknown} := 1
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(motion.once{unknown} = 1)
	for idx{unknown} := 0 to 1 - 1
	phi[idx{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	select(mnu_lfo_type[idx{unknown}]{unknown} -> value)
	case 0
	lfo[idx{unknown}]{real[]} := (lfo.A{unknown} * sin(phi[idx{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}) + lfo.A{unknown}
	case 1
	lfo[idx{unknown}]{real[]} := (2 * lfo.A{unknown}) * int_to_real(real_to_int(round((sin(phi[idx{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None} + 1) / 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	case 2
	lfo[idx{unknown}]{real[]} := (((2 * lfo.A{unknown}) / NI_MATH_PI{unknown}) * asin(sin(phi[idx{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) + lfo.A{unknown}
	case 3
	lfo[idx{unknown}]{real[]} := (((- 2 * lfo.A{unknown}) / NI_MATH_PI{unknown}) * atan(cos(phi[idx{unknown}]{unknown} / 2){Builtin, None} / sin(phi[idx{unknown}]{unknown} / 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) + lfo.A{unknown}
	end select
	end for
	call motion.apply_lfo{UserDefined, None}
	motion.once{unknown} := 0
	message("stopped lfo"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
end function

function fxRack.open
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	xy_fxRack[fx_slot_order[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} + 1]{unknown} := abs(fx_slot_pos[i{unknown}]{unknown} - 1){Builtin, None}
	lbl_fx[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> pos_y := lbl_fx_slot_pos[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	call fxRack.update{UserDefined, None}
	call global_fx.close{UserDefined, None}
	fx_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	fx_general_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_bg{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
end function

function fxRack.close
	fx_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	fx_general_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_bg{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
end function

function global_fx.open
	call fxRack.close{UserDefined, None}
	call instrument_browser.close{UserDefined, None}
	btn_global_fx{unknown} := 1
	global_fx_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	fx_general_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{unknown} -> picture := "lbl_bg_fx_panel_top_global"
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 0)
	mnu_ir{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_fxglobal_ir_previous{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_fxglobal_ir_next{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	sli_reverb_length{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_reverb_length{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> pos_x := (lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{unknown} -> pos_x + (lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{unknown} -> width / 2)) - int(real(sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> width){Builtin, None} * 1.5){Builtin, None}
	sli_reverb_output{unknown} -> pos_x := (lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{unknown} -> pos_x + (lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{unknown} -> width / 2)) + int(real(sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> width){Builtin, None} * 1){Builtin, None}
	else
	mnu_ir{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_fxglobal_ir_previous{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_fxglobal_ir_next{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	sli_reverb_length{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_reverb_length{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> pos_x := ((lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{unknown} -> pos_x + (lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{unknown} -> width / 2)) - (sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> width / 2)) + 1
	sli_reverb_output{unknown} -> pos_x := ((lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{unknown} -> pos_x + (lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{unknown} -> width / 2)) + (sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> width * 2)) + 1
	end if
	lbl_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> pos_x := sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> pos_x - 17
	lbl_reverb_output{unknown} -> pos_x := sli_reverb_output{unknown} -> pos_x - 19
	lbl_fxrack_bg{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
end function

function global_fx.close
	btn_global_fx{unknown} := 0
	global_fx_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	fx_general_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_bg{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
end function

function global_fx.reload
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 0)
	wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{unknown}, EFFECT_TYPE_IRC{unknown}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	load_ir_sample(ir_names[mnu_ir{unknown}]{unknown}, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_IRC_PREDELAY{unknown}, sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 1)
	wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{unknown}, EFFECT_TYPE_PLATEREVERB{unknown}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY{unknown}, sli_reverb_length{unknown} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY{unknown}, sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 2)
	wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{unknown}, EFFECT_TYPE_RAUM{unknown}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY{unknown}, sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY{unknown}, sli_reverb_length{unknown} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 3)
	wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{unknown}, EFFECT_TYPE_REVERB2{unknown}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY{unknown}, sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME{unknown}, sli_reverb_length{unknown} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 0)
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_IRC_PREDELAY{unknown}, sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 1)
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY{unknown}, sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 2)
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY{unknown}, sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 3)
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY{unknown}, sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	lbl_reverb_length{unknown} -> text := "Time"
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 0)
	lbl_reverb_length{unknown} -> text := "N/A"
	else
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 1)
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY{unknown}, sli_reverb_length{unknown} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 2)
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY{unknown}, sli_reverb_length{unknown} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 3)
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME{unknown}, sli_reverb_length{unknown} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{unknown}, ne(btn_comp_bypass{unknown}){UserDefined, None}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_THRESHOLD{unknown}, sli_comp_threshold{unknown}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_MAKEUP{unknown}, sli_comp_gain{unknown}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown}, sli_reverb_output{unknown} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
end function

function fxRack.reorder_animation(direction : unknown)
	fxRack.swapAnimation{unknown} := animation.position.start(lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}, lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} + direction{unknown}]{unknown} -> x, lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} + direction{unknown}]{unknown} -> y, lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} + direction{unknown}]{unknown} -> x, lbl_fx_slot_pos[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}, 5, 1){UserDefined, None}
	lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} + direction{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} + direction{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} -> y
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	if(i{unknown} # current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown})
	xy_fxRack[fx_slot_order[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} + 1]{unknown} := abs(fx_slot_pos[i{unknown}]{unknown} - 1){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end for
	current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} := current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} + direction{unknown}
	call fxRack.update{UserDefined, None}
end function

function fxRack.update
	declare _slots : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _fx_slots : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _fx_id : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _num_fx_elements : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _fixed_parameters : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	while(fxRack.update_in_progress{unknown} = 1) 
	wait(100){Builtin, None}
	end while
	fxRack.update_in_progress{unknown} := 1
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_bg{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	lbl_fx[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := ""
	lbl_fx[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := fx_labels.pictures[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(i{unknown} = current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown})
	lbl_fx[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture_state := 2
	else
	lbl_fx[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture_state := 1 - fx_bypass[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown}
	end if
	btn_fxrack_bypass[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := fx_bypass[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_type_side[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := fx_names_full[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_type_side[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[fx_bypass[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} = 6)
	btn_fxrack_bypass[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 0
	lbl_fxrack_type_side[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	lbl_fxrack_instrument_settings{unknown} -> picture_state := 0
	if((btn_fxrack_instrument_settings{unknown} = 0) and (current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1))
	if(current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)
	lbl_active_fx_overlay{unknown} -> picture := lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture
	lbl_active_fx_overlay{unknown} -> pos_x := lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} -> pos_x
	lbl_active_fx_overlay{unknown} -> pos_y := lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} -> pos_y
	lbl_active_fx_overlay{unknown} -> picture_state := lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture_state
	lbl_active_fx_overlay{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	end if
	if(loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} # 6)
	lbl_fxrack_effect_big{unknown} -> picture := "lbl_fxbig_" & fxtypes.suffix[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	end if
	lbl_fxrack_effect_big{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_effect_big_frame{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	else
	lbl_fxrack_instrument_settings{unknown} -> picture_state := 2
	lbl_active_fx_overlay{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_effect_big{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_effect_big_frame{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{unknown} -> picture := "lbl_bg_fx_panel_top" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	btn_fxrack_instrument_settings{unknown} -> picture := "btn_fxslot" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	lbl_fxrack_slot_info_bottom{unknown} -> text := "Slot " & (active_slot{unknown} + 1)
	lbl_fxrack_slot_info_bottom{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.regular_colors[slot_colors[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	set_control_par_str_arr(xy_fxRack{unknown}, CONTROL_PAR_CURSOR_PICTURE{unknown}, "btn_fxslot" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}, 0){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str_arr(xy_fxRack{unknown}, CONTROL_PAR_CURSOR_PICTURE{unknown}, "btn_fxslot" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}, 2){Builtin, None}
	set_control_par_str_arr(xy_fxRack{unknown}, CONTROL_PAR_CURSOR_PICTURE{unknown}, "btn_fxslot" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}, 4){Builtin, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	mnu_fxrack_effect[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 4 - 1
	lbl_fxrack_control[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end for
	btn_fxrack_delay_sync{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 4 - 1
	sli_fxrack_control[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	motion.update_visibility(sli_fxrack_control[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	end for
	end for
	end for
	if(current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} > - 1)
	effect_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	eq_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_type_top{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_type_top{unknown} -> text := fx_names_full[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	mnu_fxrack_effect[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	mnu_fxrack_effect[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 6)
	btn_fxrack_effect_previous{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_fxrack_effect_next{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_effect_big_frame{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_effect_big{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_type_top{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_fxrack_type_none{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_type_selected{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	mnu_fxrack_effect[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[btn_fxrack_type_big{unknown}] - 1
	if(1 = 1)
	btn_fxrack_type[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_fxrack_type_big[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	else
	btn_fxrack_type[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_fxrack_type_big[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	else
	btn_fxrack_effect_previous{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_fxrack_effect_next{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_fxrack_type_none{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_type_selected{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_type_selected{unknown} -> pos_x := (170 + (85 * loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown})) + lbl_fxrack_type_selected_pos_offsets[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_type_selected{unknown} -> width := 70 - (lbl_fxrack_type_selected_pos_offsets[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} * 2)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[btn_fxrack_type_big{unknown}] - 1
	if(0 = 1)
	btn_fxrack_type[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_fxrack_type_big[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	else
	btn_fxrack_type[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_fxrack_type_big[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	end if
	call btn_fxrack_type.reset{UserDefined, None}
	if(loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} # 6)
	btn_fxrack_type[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 1
	end if
	if(fxRack.loaded_new[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	fx_bypass[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} := 1
	end if
	btn_fxrack_block{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	if(fx_bypass[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	btn_fxrack_block{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	_fx_id{unknown} := fx_list_ids[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(i{unknown} < all_fx_settings[_fx_id{unknown}, 1]{unknown})
	sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := (110 + 100) + (((i{unknown} + 1) * 500) / (all_fx_settings[_fx_id{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + 1))
	sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "fader-2-disabled"
	if(fx_bypass[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "fader-2"
	end if
	lbl_fxrack_control[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_control[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := all_fx_texts[_fx_id{unknown}, 1 + (i{unknown} * 2)]{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_control[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x + ((sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width - lbl_fxrack_control[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width) / 2)
	if(fxRack.loaded_new[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} -> default_value := all_fx_settings[_fx_id{unknown}, 3 + (i{unknown} * 2)]{unknown}
	sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := all_fx_settings[_fx_id{unknown}, 3 + (i{unknown} * 2)]{unknown}
	motion.btn_enable[search[motion.ui_ids{unknown}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} -> value := 0
	end if
	if(all_fx_settings[fx_list_ids[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = EFFECT_TYPE_REPLIKA{unknown})
	btn_fxrack_delay_sync{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_fxrack_delay_sync{unknown} -> value := delay_sync[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	btn_fxrack_delay_sync{unknown} -> x := sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}, 0]{unknown} -> x + 44
	end if
	motion.update_visibility(sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	motion.update_position.fader(sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	else
	sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_control[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	fxRack.loaded_new[current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	else
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[btn_fxrack_type_big{unknown}] - 1
	if(0 = 1)
	btn_fxrack_type[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_fxrack_type_big[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	else
	btn_fxrack_type[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_fxrack_type_big[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[btn_fxrack_type{unknown}] - 1
	btn_fxrack_type[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end for
	btn_fxrack_effect_previous{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_fxrack_effect_next{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_effect_big_frame{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_effect_big{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_type_top{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_fxrack_type_none{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_type_selected{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	xy_fxRack{unknown} -> active_index := - 1
	btn_fxrack_instrument_settings{unknown} := 1
	btn_fxrack_block{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_instrument_settings{unknown} -> picture_state := 2
	effect_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	eq_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	call eq.curve{UserDefined, None}
	btn_eq_position{unknown} := eq_position[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	lbl_eq_position{unknown} -> text := eq_position.text[eq_position[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	btn_eq_bypass{unknown} := eq_bypass[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	lbl_attack{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_release{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	eq.sli_freq[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	eq.sli_gain[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	eq.sli_q[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	if(i{unknown} = active_slot{unknown})
	eq.sli_freq[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	eq.sli_gain[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	eq.sli_q[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	sli_attack[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	sli_release[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	if(i{unknown} = active_slot{unknown})
	sli_attack[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	sli_release[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_attack{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_release{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_attack_release_blocker{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 2)
	btn_attack_release_blocker{unknown} -> text := "Unavailable for legato instruments."
	btn_attack_release_blocker{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	motion.btn_enable[search[motion.btn_enable{unknown}, sli_attack[i{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} := 0
	else
	if(search[slot.loaded_sound{unknown}, slot.loaded_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown}] # i{unknown})
	btn_attack_release_blocker{unknown} -> text := "Only available in the first instance."
	btn_attack_release_blocker{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	motion.btn_enable[search[motion.btn_enable{unknown}, sli_attack[i{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	motion.update_visibility(sli_attack[i{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	motion.update_visibility(sli_release[i{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	end for
	call update_eq_handles{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	load_fx(active_slot{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	call motion.update{UserDefined, None}
	fxRack.update_in_progress{unknown} := 0
end function

function update_eq_handles
	xy_eq[0]{unknown} := real(eq.sli_freq[active_slot{unknown}, 0]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
	xy_eq[1]{unknown} := real(eq.sli_gain[active_slot{unknown}, 0]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
	xy_eq[2]{unknown} := real(eq.sli_freq[active_slot{unknown}, 1]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
	xy_eq[3]{unknown} := real(eq.sli_gain[active_slot{unknown}, 1]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
	xy_eq[4]{unknown} := real(eq.sli_freq[active_slot{unknown}, 2]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
	xy_eq[5]{unknown} := real(eq.sli_gain[active_slot{unknown}, 2]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None} / 1e+06
end function

function load_fx(sl : unknown)
	declare _fx_slots : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _fx_id : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _num_fx_elements : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _fixed_parameters : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	if(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{unknown}, - 1, eq_position[sl{unknown}]{unknown} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + sl{unknown}){Builtin, None} # EFFECT_TYPE_FILTER{unknown})
	wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{unknown}, EFFECT_TYPE_NONE{unknown}, - 1, ne(eq_position[sl{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + sl{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{unknown}, EFFECT_TYPE_FILTER{unknown}, - 1, eq_position[sl{unknown}]{unknown} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + sl{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_SUBTYPE{unknown}, FILTER_TYPE_EQ3BAND{unknown}, - 1, eq_position[sl{unknown}]{unknown} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + sl{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{unknown}, ne(eq_bypass[sl{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}, - 1, eq_position[sl{unknown}]{unknown} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + sl{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	set_eq_freq(sl{unknown}, i{unknown}, eq.sli_freq[sl{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value){UserDefined, None}
	set_eq_gain(sl{unknown}, i{unknown}, eq.sli_gain[sl{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value){UserDefined, None}
	set_eq_q(sl{unknown}, i{unknown}, eq.sli_q[sl{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value){UserDefined, None}
	end for
	s{unknown} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{unknown}, sli_attack[sl{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if(s{unknown} # - 1)
	fxRack.value{unknown} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{unknown}]{unknown} -> value
	fxRack.slot{unknown} := s{unknown} / (4 * 3)
	fxRack.fx_slot{unknown} := (s{unknown} / 4) mod 3
	fxRack.control{unknown} := s{unknown} mod 4
	fxRack.ui_id{unknown} := sli_attack[sl{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{unknown}, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown}]{unknown} # 6)
	call fxRack.execute_slider{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{unknown} := search[sli_attack{unknown}, sli_attack[sl{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if((s{unknown} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1))
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, sli_attack[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, sli_attack[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, sli_attack[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(s{unknown} = active_slot{unknown})
	lbl_attack{unknown} -> text := string_buffer{string}
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{unknown}){Builtin, None}, "Attack", 0){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	s{unknown} := search[sli_release{unknown}, sli_attack[sl{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if((s{unknown} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1))
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, sli_attack[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, sli_attack[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, sli_attack[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(s{unknown} = active_slot{unknown})
	lbl_release{unknown} -> text := string_buffer{string}
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{unknown}){Builtin, None}, "Release", 0){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	sli_attack[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> label := string_buffer{string}
	s{unknown} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{unknown}, sli_release[sl{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if(s{unknown} # - 1)
	fxRack.value{unknown} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{unknown}]{unknown} -> value
	fxRack.slot{unknown} := s{unknown} / (4 * 3)
	fxRack.fx_slot{unknown} := (s{unknown} / 4) mod 3
	fxRack.control{unknown} := s{unknown} mod 4
	fxRack.ui_id{unknown} := sli_release[sl{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{unknown}, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown}]{unknown} # 6)
	call fxRack.execute_slider{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{unknown} := search[sli_attack{unknown}, sli_release[sl{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if((s{unknown} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1))
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, sli_release[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, sli_release[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, sli_release[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(s{unknown} = active_slot{unknown})
	lbl_attack{unknown} -> text := string_buffer{string}
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{unknown}){Builtin, None}, "Attack", 0){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	s{unknown} := search[sli_release{unknown}, sli_release[sl{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if((s{unknown} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1))
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, sli_release[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, sli_release[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, sli_release[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(s{unknown} = active_slot{unknown})
	lbl_release{unknown} -> text := string_buffer{string}
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{unknown}){Builtin, None}, "Release", 0){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	sli_release[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> label := string_buffer{string}
	for _fx_slots{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	_fx_id{unknown} := fx_list_ids[loaded_fx_types[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + loaded_fx_subtypes[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(loaded_fx_types[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{unknown}, fx_types[0]{unknown}, - 1, _fx_slots{unknown} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + sl{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_SUBTYPE{unknown}, all_fx_settings[loaded_fx_subtypes[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}]{unknown}, 0]{unknown}, - 1, _fx_slots{unknown} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + sl{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	else
	wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{unknown}, all_fx_settings[_fx_id{unknown}, 0]{unknown}, - 1, _fx_slots{unknown} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + sl{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	_num_fx_elements{unknown} := all_fx_settings.sizes[_fx_id{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(_num_fx_elements{unknown} > (2 + (all_fx_settings[_fx_id{unknown}, 1]{unknown} * 2)))
	for _fixed_parameters{unknown} := 2 + (all_fx_settings[_fx_id{unknown}, 1]{unknown} * 2) to _num_fx_elements{unknown} - 1
	set_engine_par(all_fx_settings[_fx_id{unknown}, _fixed_parameters{unknown}]{unknown}, all_fx_settings[_fx_id{unknown}, _fixed_parameters{unknown} + 1]{unknown}, - 1, _fx_slots{unknown} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + sl{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	end if
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{unknown}, ne(fx_bypass[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}, - 1, _fx_slots{unknown} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + sl{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(ii{unknown} < all_fx_settings[_fx_id{unknown}, 1]{unknown})
	fxRack.do_not_trigger_label{unknown} := 1
	s{unknown} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{unknown}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if(s{unknown} # - 1)
	fxRack.value{unknown} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{unknown}]{unknown} -> value
	fxRack.slot{unknown} := s{unknown} / (4 * 3)
	fxRack.fx_slot{unknown} := (s{unknown} / 4) mod 3
	fxRack.control{unknown} := s{unknown} mod 4
	fxRack.ui_id{unknown} := sli_fxrack_control[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{unknown}, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown}]{unknown} # 6)
	call fxRack.execute_slider{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{unknown} := search[sli_attack{unknown}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if((s{unknown} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1))
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(s{unknown} = active_slot{unknown})
	lbl_attack{unknown} -> text := string_buffer{string}
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{unknown}){Builtin, None}, "Attack", 0){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	s{unknown} := search[sli_release{unknown}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if((s{unknown} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1))
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(s{unknown} = active_slot{unknown})
	lbl_release{unknown} -> text := string_buffer{string}
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{unknown}){Builtin, None}, "Release", 0){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	sli_fxrack_control[sl{unknown}, _fx_slots{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> label := string_buffer{string}
	end if
	end for
	end for
end function

function fxRack.update_allround
	declare _slots : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for _slots{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	load_fx(_slots{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	end for
end function

function fxRack.reset(sl : unknown)
	declare _fx_slot : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _band : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx(instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx(instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	message("set attack from " & sli_attack[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> value & " to " & get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	sli_attack[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	sli_release[sl{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	for _band{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	set_eq_freq(sl{unknown}, _band{unknown}, _band{unknown} * 500000){UserDefined, None}
	eq.sli_freq[sl{unknown}, _band{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := _band{unknown} * 500000
	set_eq_gain(sl{unknown}, _band{unknown}, 500000){UserDefined, None}
	eq.sli_gain[sl{unknown}, _band{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 500000
	set_eq_q(sl{unknown}, _band{unknown}, 500000){UserDefined, None}
	eq.sli_q[sl{unknown}, _band{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 500000
	end for
	for _fx_slot{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	loaded_fx_types[sl{unknown}, _fx_slot{unknown}]{unknown} := 6
	loaded_fx_subtypes[sl{unknown}, _fx_slot{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end for
	call update_eq_handles{UserDefined, None}
	call eq.curve{UserDefined, None}
	load_fx(sl{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
end function

function btn_fxrack_type.reset
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 2
	btn_fxrack_type[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 0
	end for
end function

function fxRack.execute_slider
	declare _target : unknown := all_fx_settings[fx_list_ids[loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{unknown}, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + loaded_fx_subtypes[fxRack.slot{unknown}, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown}]{unknown}, 2 + (fxRack.control{unknown} * 2)]{unknown} {Reuses: 0}
	declare _is_delay_sync : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	if(fx_bypass[fxRack.slot{unknown}, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	if(_target{unknown} = ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown})
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_DRY_LEVEL{unknown}, drywet[(1000000 - fxRack.value{unknown}) / 1000]{unknown}, - 1, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + fxRack.slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown}, drywet[fxRack.value{unknown} / 1000]{unknown}, - 1, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + fxRack.slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	if((((_target{unknown} = ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME{unknown}) or (_target{unknown} = ENGINE_PAR_DL_TIME{unknown})) or (_target{unknown} = ENGINE_PAR_PSYDL_TIME{unknown})) and (delay_sync[fxRack.slot{unknown}, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown}]{unknown} = 1))
	set_engine_par(all_fx_settings[fx_list_ids[loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{unknown}, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + loaded_fx_subtypes[fxRack.slot{unknown}, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown}]{unknown}, 8]{unknown}, ni_sync_units[scale.range(fxRack.value{unknown}, 0, 1000000, 0, num_elements[ni_sync_units{unknown}] - 1){UserDefined, None}]{unknown} + NI_SYNC_UNIT_ABS{unknown}, - 1, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + fxRack.slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	_is_delay_sync{unknown} := 1
	else
	set_engine_par(_target{unknown}, fxRack.value{unknown}, - 1, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + fxRack.slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	if(fxRack.do_not_trigger_label{unknown} = 0)
	if((active_slot{unknown} = fxRack.slot{unknown}) and (current_fx_slot[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} = fxRack.fx_slot{unknown}))
	lbl_fxrack_control[fxRack.control{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(_target{unknown}, - 1, fxRack.fx_slot{unknown} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + fxRack.slot{unknown}){Builtin, None} & all_fx_texts[fx_list_ids[loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[fxRack.slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + loaded_fx_subtypes[fxRack.slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[fxRack.slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}, 2 + (fxRack.control{unknown} * 2)]{unknown}
	if(_is_delay_sync{unknown} = 1)
	lbl_fxrack_control[fxRack.control{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := durations[scale.range(fxRack.value{unknown}, 0, 1000000, 0, num_elements[ni_sync_units{unknown}] - 1){UserDefined, None}]{unknown}
	end if
	timed_display.trigger(lbl_fxrack_control[fxRack.control{unknown}]{unknown}, all_fx_texts[fx_list_ids[loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[fxRack.slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + loaded_fx_subtypes[fxRack.slot{unknown}, current_fx_slot[fxRack.slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}, 1 + (fxRack.control{unknown} * 2)]{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	else
	fxRack.do_not_trigger_label{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end if
end function

function eq.curve
	eq.freq[0]{real[]} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_freq[active_slot{unknown}, 0]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None}, 0, 1e+06, 0, real(50){Builtin, None}){UserDefined, None}
	eq.freq[1]{real[]} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_freq[active_slot{unknown}, 1]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None}, 0, 1e+06, 0, real(50){Builtin, None}){UserDefined, None}
	eq.freq[2]{real[]} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_freq[active_slot{unknown}, 2]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None}, 0, 1e+06, 0, real(50){Builtin, None}){UserDefined, None}
	eq.gain[0]{real[]} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_gain[active_slot{unknown}, 0]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None}, 0, 1e+06, - 1000, 1000){UserDefined, None}
	eq.gain[1]{real[]} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_gain[active_slot{unknown}, 1]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None}, 0, 1e+06, - 1000, 1000){UserDefined, None}
	eq.gain[2]{real[]} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_gain[active_slot{unknown}, 2]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None}, 0, 1e+06, - 1000, 1000){UserDefined, None}
	eq.q[0]{real[]} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_q[active_slot{unknown}, 0]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None}, 0, 1e+06, 2, 18){UserDefined, None}
	eq.q[1]{real[]} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_q[active_slot{unknown}, 1]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None}, 0, 1e+06, 2, 18){UserDefined, None}
	eq.q[2]{real[]} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_q[active_slot{unknown}, 2]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None}, 0, 1e+06, 2, 18){UserDefined, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 50 - 1
	eq.band[0, i{unknown}]{unknown} := int(eq.gain[0]{real[]} * exp(- 0.5 * pow((real(i{unknown}){Builtin, None} - eq.freq[0]{real[]}) / eq.q[0]{real[]}, 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	eq.band[1, i{unknown}]{unknown} := int(eq.gain[1]{real[]} * exp(- 0.5 * pow((real(i{unknown}){Builtin, None} - eq.freq[1]{real[]}) / eq.q[1]{real[]}, 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	eq.band[2, i{unknown}]{unknown} := int(eq.gain[2]{real[]} * exp(- 0.5 * pow((real(i{unknown}){Builtin, None} - eq.freq[2]{real[]}) / eq.q[2]{real[]}, 2){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	btn_eq_display[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> height := (clamp((eq.band[0, i{unknown}]{unknown} + eq.band[1, i{unknown}]{unknown}) + eq.band[2, i{unknown}]{unknown}, - 1000, 1000){UserDefined, None} + 1000) / 32
	btn_eq_display[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := (82 + 63) - btn_eq_display[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> height
	end for
end function

function set_eq_freq(slot : unknown, band : unknown, value : unknown)
	select(band{unknown})
	case 0
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1{unknown}, value{unknown}, - 1, eq_position[slot{unknown}]{unknown} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	case 1
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ2{unknown}, value{unknown}, - 1, eq_position[slot{unknown}]{unknown} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	case 2
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ3{unknown}, value{unknown}, - 1, eq_position[slot{unknown}]{unknown} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end select
end function

function set_eq_gain(slot : unknown, band : unknown, value : unknown)
	select(band{unknown})
	case 0
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1{unknown}, value{unknown}, - 1, eq_position[slot{unknown}]{unknown} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	case 1
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN2{unknown}, value{unknown}, - 1, eq_position[slot{unknown}]{unknown} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	case 2
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN3{unknown}, value{unknown}, - 1, eq_position[slot{unknown}]{unknown} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end select
end function

function set_eq_q(slot : unknown, band : unknown, value : unknown)
	select(band{unknown})
	case 0
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_BW1{unknown}, value{unknown}, - 1, eq_position[slot{unknown}]{unknown} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	case 1
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_BW2{unknown}, value{unknown}, - 1, eq_position[slot{unknown}]{unknown} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	case 2
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_BW3{unknown}, value{unknown}, - 1, eq_position[slot{unknown}]{unknown} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end select
end function

function fxRack.save
	declare _inc : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	_inc{unknown} := 0
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := 1
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := fx_bypass[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := delay_sync[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := loaded_fx_types[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 4 - 1
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := motion.sli_min[search[motion.ui_ids{unknown}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := motion.sli_max[search[motion.ui_ids{unknown}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := motion.btn_enable[search[motion.ui_ids{unknown}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := motion.mnu_source[search[motion.ui_ids{unknown}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	end for
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := sli_attack[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := motion.sli_min[search[motion.ui_ids{unknown}, sli_attack[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := motion.sli_max[search[motion.ui_ids{unknown}, sli_attack[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := motion.btn_enable[search[motion.ui_ids{unknown}, sli_attack[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := motion.mnu_source[search[motion.ui_ids{unknown}, sli_attack[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := sli_release[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := motion.sli_min[search[motion.ui_ids{unknown}, sli_release[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := motion.sli_max[search[motion.ui_ids{unknown}, sli_release[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := motion.btn_enable[search[motion.ui_ids{unknown}, sli_release[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := motion.mnu_source[search[motion.ui_ids{unknown}, sli_release[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := eq.sli_freq[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := eq.sli_gain[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := eq.sli_q[active_slot{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := eq_position[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	inc(_inc{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{unknown}]{unknown} := eq_bypass[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}
