	wait_async(save_array_str(fxRack.save_array{unknown}, get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown}){Builtin, None} & "../fx-presets/fxpreset" & slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} & ".nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	fxRack.save_array[0]{unknown} := 0
end function

	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, sli_release[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, sli_release[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, sli_release[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(s{unknown} = active_slot{unknown})
	lbl_release{unknown} -> text := string_buffer{string}
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{unknown}){Builtin, None}, "Release", 0){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	sli_release[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} -> label := string_buffer{string}
	else
	message("INSTRUMENT FX PRESET OF " & slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} & " NOT FOUND"){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function single_nki.gui_update
	if(show_fx_rack{unknown} = 0)
	eq_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_fxrack_bg{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_fxrack_instrument_settings{unknown} := 0
	lbl_fxrack_instrument_settings{unknown} -> picture_state := 0
	else
	eq_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	end if
end function

function prepare_data_to_transfer(idx1 : unknown, idx2 : unknown, data : unknown)
	transfer.chord_array[idx1{unknown}, idx2{unknown}]{unknown} := data{unknown}
end function

function prepare_info_to_transfer(meter : unknown)
	transfer.additional_info[0]{unknown} := meter{unknown}
end function

function get_data_from_transfer(idx1 : unknown, idx2 : unknown)
	return (transfer.chord_array[idx1{unknown}, idx2{unknown}]{unknown})
end function

function get_info_from_transfer(info : unknown)
	return (transfer.additional_info[info{unknown}]{unknown})
end function

function read_slot_colors
	declare _idx : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	_idx{unknown} := search[_instrument_browser.structure{unknown}, slot.loaded_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if(slot.loaded_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)
	slot_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown} := ((_idx{unknown} / 16) / 11) + 1
	else
	slot_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end for
end function

function get_slot_icon(slot_idx : unknown)
	return (slot_icons[(instrument_browser.section_order[max(0, search[_instrument_browser.structure{unknown}, slot.loaded_sound[slot_idx{unknown}]{unknown}]){UserDefined, None} / 16]{unknown} + (eq(search[_instrument_browser.structure{unknown}, slot.loaded_sound[slot_idx{unknown}]{unknown}], - 1){UserDefined, None} * (num_elements[slot_icons{unknown}] - 1))) + (eq(slot.loaded_sound[slot_idx{unknown}]{unknown}, - 1){UserDefined, None} * (num_elements[slot_icons{unknown}] - 1))]{string[]})
end function

function motion.mw_animation
	declare pic_state : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	pic_state{unknown} := int(126 * (real(motion.modwheel{unknown}){Builtin, None} / 127)){Builtin, None}
	if(btn_midi_mode{unknown} = 1)
	pic_state{unknown} := 126
	end if
	anim.mw_lightstrip{unknown} -> picture_state := pic_state{unknown}
	anim.mw_fingertouch{unknown} -> picture_state := pic_state{unknown}
	anim.bg_top_left{unknown} -> picture_state := pic_state{unknown}
	anim.bg_top_right{unknown} -> picture_state := pic_state{unknown}
	anim.bg_side_left{unknown} -> picture_state := pic_state{unknown}
	anim.bg_side_right{unknown} -> picture_state := pic_state{unknown}
	anim.bg_bottom{unknown} -> picture_state := pic_state{unknown}
	anim.bg_score_title{unknown} -> picture_state := pic_state{unknown}
	if(NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} # NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED{unknown})
	motion.modwheel_show_glow(1){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	mw_active{unknown} := 1
end function

function motion.modwheel_show_glow(bool : unknown)
	if((mw_active{unknown} = 0) and (bool{unknown} = 1))
	animation.abort(mw_fade_animation{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	mw_fade_animation{unknown} := animation.picture.start(get_ui_id(anim.mw_fade{unknown}){Builtin, None}, 29, 0, 5, 2){UserDefined, None}
	else
	if((mw_active{unknown} = 1) and (bool{unknown} = 0))
	animation.abort(mw_fade_animation{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	mw_fade_animation{unknown} := animation.picture.start(get_ui_id(anim.mw_fade{unknown}){Builtin, None}, 0, 29, 15, 3){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	if((mw_active{unknown} = 1) and (bool{unknown} = 1))
	mw_touched_counter{unknown} := 0
	end if
end function

function gui_animation.show_side_panels(bool : unknown)
	if(bool{unknown} = 1)
	anim.mw_fingertouch{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	anim.mw_fade{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_mw_bg{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_global_fx_bg{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	anim.mw_lightstrip{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	else
	anim.mw_fingertouch{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	anim.mw_fade{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_mw_bg{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_global_fx_bg{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	anim.mw_lightstrip{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
end function

function set_title_colors(offset : unknown)
	declare _num_slots : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _color : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _idx : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	_num_slots{unknown} := min(2, 5){UserDefined, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 4
	anim.bg_score_title.colors[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	_color{unknown} := slot_colors[((i{unknown} * _num_slots{unknown}) / 5) + offset{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	if(_color{unknown} >= 0)
	anim.bg_score_title.colors[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture_state := _color{unknown}
	else
	anim.bg_score_title.colors[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	if(_num_slots{unknown} = 2)
	anim.bg_score_title.colors[2]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	end for
end function

function nks.update_all_labels
	nks.update_shape_slider{UserDefined, None}
	nks.update_attack_release_labels{UserDefined, None}
	nks.update_global_fx_labels{UserDefined, None}
end function

function nks.update_shape_slider
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown}, sli_volume_min[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	sli_volume_min[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + i{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " dB"
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown}, sli_volume_max[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	sli_volume_max[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + i{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " dB"
	end for
	execute_morph_faders{UserDefined, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	sli_pan[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_PAN{unknown}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	sli_rev_send[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0{unknown}, - 1, 7, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + i{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " dB"
	end for
end function

function nks.update_attack_release_labels
	for s{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	if(slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	sli_attack[s{unknown}]{unknown} -> label := string_buffer{string}
	message("label set - " & sli_attack[s{unknown}]{unknown} -> label){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for s{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	if(slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + i{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	mod_idx{unknown} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None}
	tar_idx{unknown} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None}
	string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + (i{unknown} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} + 1))) + ii{unknown}) + 1, mod_idx{unknown}, tar_idx{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	sli_release[s{unknown}]{unknown} -> label := string_buffer{string}
	end for
end function

function nks.update_global_fx_labels
	sli_comp_threshold{unknown} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_THRESHOLD{unknown}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " dB"
	sli_comp_gain{unknown} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_MAKEUP{unknown}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " dB"
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 0)
	sli_reverb_length{unknown} -> label := "N/A"
	sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> label := ((real(sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> value / 10000){Builtin, None} / 100) * 300) & " ms"
	else
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 1)
	sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY{unknown}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	sli_reverb_length{unknown} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY{unknown}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	else
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 2)
	sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY{unknown}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	sli_reverb_length{unknown} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY{unknown}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	else
	if(mnu_reverb_type{unknown} = 3)
	sli_reverb_predelay{unknown} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY{unknown}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	sli_reverb_length{unknown} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME{unknown}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " ms"
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	sli_reverb_output{unknown} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown}){Builtin, None} & " dB"
	if(btn_lfo_sync[0]{unknown} -> value = 1)
	frequency[0]{real[]} := ((tempo{real} * 24) / 60) / real(ticks_durations[scale.range(sli_lfo_freq[0]{unknown} -> value, 0, 1000000, 0, num_elements[ticks_durations{unknown}] - 1){UserDefined, None}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	sli_lfo_freq[0]{unknown} -> label := durations[scale.range(sli_lfo_freq[0]{unknown} -> value, 0, 1000000, 0, num_elements[ticks_durations{unknown}] - 1){UserDefined, None}]{unknown}
	else
	frequency[0]{real[]} := scale.range.log(real(sli_lfo_freq[0]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None}, 0, 1e+06, 0.01, 15.01){UserDefined, None}
	sli_lfo_freq[0]{unknown} -> label := (int_to_real(real_to_int(frequency[0]{real[]} * 100){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 100) & " Hz"
	end if
	sli_lfo_type[0]{unknown} -> label := lfo_type_strings[mnu_lfo_type[0]{unknown} -> value]{unknown}
end function

function version.update
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 10 - 1
	if(version[i{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)
	LIB_VERSION_NUM{unknown} := LIB_VERSION_NUM{unknown} & version[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(version[i{unknown} + 1]{unknown} # - 1)
	LIB_VERSION_NUM{unknown} := LIB_VERSION_NUM{unknown} & "."
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function undo.create
	declare _difference : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	array.cascade(undo.valid{unknown}, 1){UserDefined, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 12 - 2
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to ((8 * 7) * 4) - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	melody.undo[(12 - 1) - i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} := melody.undo[(12 - 2) - i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	end for
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 8 - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	melody_rates.undo[(12 - 1) - i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} := melody_rates.undo[(12 - 2) - i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	end for
	end for
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to ((8 * 7) * 4) - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	if(melody.undo[0, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} # melody[0, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown})
	_difference{unknown} := 1
	end if
	melody.undo[0, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} := melody[0, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	end for
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 8 - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	if(melody_rates.undo[0, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} # melody_rates[ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown})
	_difference{unknown} := 1
	end if
	melody_rates.undo[0, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} := melody_rates[ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	end for
	btn_undo{unknown} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_undo"
	btn_edit_undo{unknown} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_undo"
	undo.active{unknown} := 1
	if(_difference{unknown} = 0)
	call undo.load{UserDefined, None}
	end if
end function

function undo.load
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to ((8 * 7) * 4) - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	melody.redo[ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	end for
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 8 - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	melody_rates.redo[ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} := melody_rates[ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	end for
	btn_redo{unknown} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_redo"
	btn_edit_redo{unknown} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_redo"
	redo.active{unknown} := 1
	array.cascade_inv(undo.valid{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to ((8 * 7) * 4) - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	melody[0, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} := melody.undo[0, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	end for
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 8 - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	melody_rates[ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} := melody_rates.undo[0, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 1 to 12 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to ((8 * 7) * 4) - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	melody.undo[i{unknown} - 1, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} := melody.undo[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	end for
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 8 - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	melody_rates.undo[i{unknown} - 1, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} := melody_rates.undo[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	end for
	end for
	if(undo.valid[0]{unknown} # 1)
	btn_undo{unknown} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_undo_disabled"
	btn_edit_undo{unknown} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_undo_disabled"
	undo.active{unknown} := 0
	end if
	call midi_main_display.update_notes{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_edit_display.update_allround{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_edit_display.update_bars{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_edit_display.update_notes{UserDefined, None}
end function

function redo.load
	call undo.create{UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to ((8 * 7) * 4) - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} := melody.redo[ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	end for
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 8 - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	melody_rates[ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} := melody_rates.redo[ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	end for
	btn_redo{unknown} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_redo_disabled"
	btn_edit_redo{unknown} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_redo_disabled"
	redo.active{unknown} := 0
	call midi_main_display.update_notes{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_edit_display.update_allround{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_edit_display.update_bars{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_edit_display.update_notes{UserDefined, None}
end function

function undo.flush
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 12 - 1
	undo.valid[i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end for
	btn_undo{unknown} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_undo_disabled"
	btn_edit_undo{unknown} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_undo_disabled"
	undo.active{unknown} := 0
	btn_redo{unknown} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_redo_disabled"
	btn_edit_redo{unknown} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_redo_disabled"
	redo.active{unknown} := 0
end function

function empty_unused_values
	declare _before : unknown := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 8 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to beats_per_bar{unknown} - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(iii{unknown} >= melody_rates[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown})
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((i{unknown} * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) + (ii{unknown} * 4)) + iii{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((i{unknown} * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) + (ii{unknown} * 4)) + iii{unknown}, 2]{unknown} := 0
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((i{unknown} * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) + (ii{unknown} * 4)) + iii{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := 1
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((i{unknown} * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) + ((ii{unknown} + 1) * 4), 0]{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end for
	if(beats_per_bar{unknown} # 7)
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4, 0]{unknown} := 0
	end if
end function

function identify_chord
	declare _iterator : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _oct : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _bool : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _num_results : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _is_this_chord : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 11
	if(pressed_notes[i{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 17 - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 15 - 1
	_is_this_chord{unknown} := 1
	for j{unknown} := 0 to 11
	_iterator{unknown} := 0
	_bool{unknown} := 0
	while((_iterator{unknown} < 7) and (chord.types[ii{unknown}, _iterator{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)) 
	if(((i{unknown} + modes[iii{unknown}, chord.types[ii{unknown}, _iterator{unknown}]{unknown} mod 7]{unknown}) mod 12) = ((i{unknown} + j{unknown}) mod 12))
	_bool{unknown} := 1
	_iterator{unknown} := 7
	end if
	inc(_iterator{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(pressed_notes[(i{unknown} + j{unknown}) mod 12]{unknown} = 1)
	if(_bool{unknown} = 0)
	_is_this_chord{unknown} := 0
	end if
	else
	if(_bool{unknown} = 1)
	_is_this_chord{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end if
	end for
	if(_is_this_chord{unknown} = 1)
	for j{unknown} := 0 to 32 - 1
	if((chord_modes_scale[j{unknown}]{unknown} = iii{unknown}) and (chord_modes_tones[j{unknown}]{unknown} = ii{unknown}))
	all_results[_num_results{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := i{unknown}
	all_results[_num_results{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := j{unknown}
	inc(_num_results{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end for
	if(_num_results{unknown} = 1)
	message(root_notes[0, all_results[0, 0]{unknown}]{unknown} & " " & chord_type_names[all_results[0, 1]{unknown}]{string[]}){Builtin, None}
	chord.print(root_notes[0, all_results[0, 0]{unknown}]{unknown} & " " & chord_type_names[all_results[0, 1]{unknown}]{string[]}){UserDefined, None}
	resulting_root{unknown} := all_results[0, 0]{unknown}
	resulting_scale{unknown} := chord_modes_scale[all_results[0, 1]{unknown}]{unknown}
	else
	if(_num_results{unknown} > 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to _num_results{unknown} - 1
	if(all_results[i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = (lowest_note{unknown} mod 12))
	message(root_notes[0, all_results[i{unknown}, 0]{unknown}]{unknown} & " " & chord_type_names[all_results[i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}]{string[]}){Builtin, None}
	chord.print(root_notes[0, all_results[i{unknown}, 0]{unknown}]{unknown} & " " & chord_type_names[all_results[i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}]{string[]}){UserDefined, None}
	resulting_root{unknown} := all_results[i{unknown}, 0]{unknown}
	resulting_scale{unknown} := all_results[i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end if
end function

function remote(array : unknown, except : unknown)
	declare _iterator : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for _iterator{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[array{unknown}] - 1
	array[_iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 0
	if(except{unknown} = _iterator{unknown})
	array[_iterator{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 1
	end if
	end for
end function

function set_font_types(control_id : unknown, font_array : unknown)
	for _i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[font.types{unknown}] - 1
	set_control_par(control_id{unknown}, font.types[_i{unknown}]{unknown}, font_array[_i{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
end function

function midi_export.update
	declare _len : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _res : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _bar : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _beat : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _prev_pitch : unknown := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _start_offset : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _event_start : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _event_end : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _idx : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _mix : real {Reuses: 0}
	declare _dyn_value : unknown := dynamic_positions[0]{unknown} {Reuses: 0}
	mf_remove_event(by_track(1){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	mf_set_buffer_size((((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) * (960 / 4)) + (8 * 96)){Builtin, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1
	_bar{unknown} := i{unknown} / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)
	_beat{unknown} := (i{unknown} / 4) mod beats_per_bar{unknown}
	if((melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} # - 1) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 0))
	_start_offset{unknown} := 0
	if(((_prev_pitch{unknown} # - 1) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} # _prev_pitch{unknown})) and (highest_delay{unknown} > 0))
	_start_offset{unknown} := int(round(960 / (((1000 / real(highest_delay{unknown}){Builtin, None}) * 60) / tempo{unknown})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	if(btn_dynamics_active{unknown} = 1)
	_idx{unknown} := i{unknown} / ((beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4) / 2)
	_mix{unknown} := real(i{unknown} mod ((beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4) / 2)){Builtin, None} / real((beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4) / 2){Builtin, None}
	if(line_mode[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	velocity_offset{unknown} := dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} + int(_mix{unknown} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown} + 1]{unknown} - dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	else
	if(line_mode[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	velocity_offset{unknown} := dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} + int((- (cos(NI_MATH_PI{unknown} * _mix{unknown}){Builtin, None} - 1) / 2) * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown} + 1]{unknown} - dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	else
	if(line_mode[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} = 2)
	velocity_offset{unknown} := dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} + int(1 - (cos((_mix{unknown} * NI_MATH_PI{unknown}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown} + 1]{unknown} - dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
	else
	if(line_mode[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	velocity_offset{unknown} := dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} + int(sin((_mix{unknown} * NI_MATH_PI{unknown}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown} + 1]{unknown} - dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	velocity_offset{unknown} := int(round(real(velocity_offset{unknown} - sli_dynamics{unknown}){Builtin, None} * (real(sli_velocity_influence{unknown}){Builtin, None} / 100)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	else
	velocity_offset{unknown} := 0
	end if
	_event_start{unknown} := mf_insert_event(1, ((((i{unknown} / 4) * melody_rates[_bar{unknown}, _beat{unknown}]{unknown}) + (i{unknown} mod 4)) * (960 / melody_rates[_bar{unknown}, _beat{unknown}]{unknown})) - _start_offset{unknown}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{unknown}, melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}, clamp((sli_dynamics{unknown} + velocity_offset{unknown}) + melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 2]{unknown}, 1, 127){UserDefined, None}){Builtin, None}
	_prev_pitch{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}
	_len{unknown} := note.get_length(melody{unknown}, current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1){UserDefined, None}
	_event_end{unknown} := mf_insert_event(1, (((((i{unknown} / 4) * melody_rates[_bar{unknown}, _beat{unknown}]{unknown}) + (i{unknown} mod 4)) + _len{unknown}) * (960 / melody_rates[_bar{unknown}, _beat{unknown}]{unknown})) - 1, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_OFF{unknown}, melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}, 0){Builtin, None}
	else
	if(melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 0)
	_prev_pitch{unknown} := - 1
	end if
	end if
	end for
	if(btn_dynamics_active{unknown} = 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to (8 * 96) - 1
	_idx{unknown} := i{unknown} / 48
	_mix{unknown} := real(i{unknown} mod 48){Builtin, None} / 48
	if((dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown} + 1]{unknown} - dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown}) # 0)
	if(line_mode[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	_dyn_value{unknown} := clamp(dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} + int(_mix{unknown} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown} + 1]{unknown} - dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 0, 127){UserDefined, None}
	else
	if(line_mode[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	_dyn_value{unknown} := clamp(dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} + int((- (cos(NI_MATH_PI{unknown} * _mix{unknown}){Builtin, None} - 1) / 2) * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown} + 1]{unknown} - dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 0, 127){UserDefined, None}
	else
	if(line_mode[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} = 2)
	_dyn_value{unknown} := clamp(dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} + int(1 - (cos((_mix{unknown} * NI_MATH_PI{unknown}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown} + 1]{unknown} - dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}, 0, 127){UserDefined, None}
	else
	if(line_mode[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	_dyn_value{unknown} := clamp(dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} + int(sin((_mix{unknown} * NI_MATH_PI{unknown}) / 2){Builtin, None} * real(dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown} + 1]{unknown} - dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 0, 127){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	mf_insert_event(1, (i{unknown} * 10) * beats_per_bar{unknown}, MIDI_COMMAND_CC{unknown}, 1, _dyn_value{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	if((i{unknown} mod 48) = 0)
	mf_insert_event(1, (i{unknown} * 10) * beats_per_bar{unknown}, MIDI_COMMAND_CC{unknown}, 1, clamp(dynamic_positions[_idx{unknown}]{unknown}, 0, 127){UserDefined, None}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end if
	_res{unknown} := mf_set_export_area("The Score - Theme", - 1, - 1, 1, 1){Builtin, None}
	if(_res{unknown} = 0)
	console.print("Export ready"){UserDefined, None}
	else
	console.print("Error at " & _res{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	message("Error at " & _res{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function main_display.open
	btn_main_view{unknown} := 1
	previous_page{unknown} := 0
	main_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	shape_controls{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	gui_animation.show_side_panels(1){UserDefined, None}
	call main_display.update{UserDefined, None}
	call keycolor.update{UserDefined, None}
	UI_presetStrip{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
end function

function main_display.close
	main_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_main_view{unknown} := 0
end function

function main_display.update
	call read_slot_colors{UserDefined, None}
	set_title_colors(0){UserDefined, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	lbl_slot[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := get_slot_icon(i{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	btn_octave_doubling[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	if(slot.loaded_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 2)
	btn_octave_doubling[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	end if
	lbl_volume[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.regular_colors[slot_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	lbl_volume_max[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.regular_colors[slot_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	lbl_volume_min[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.regular_colors[slot_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	mnu_output[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[1]{unknown}
	btn_solo[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "btn_solo" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	btn_mute[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "btn_mute" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	btn_open_fx[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "btn_fx" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	btn_octave_doubling[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "btn_8" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	sli_volume_min[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "slider_mix_handle_left" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	sli_volume_max[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "slider_mix_handle_right" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	sli_volume[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "slider_mix_mod" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	sli_volume_disp[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "slider_mix_strip" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}
	if(btn_output_section{unknown} = 1)
	sli_oct[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	sli_pan[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	sli_rev_send[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_oct[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_pan[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_rev_send[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	mnu_output[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_output_connector[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	else
	sli_oct[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	sli_pan[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	sli_rev_send[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_oct[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_pan[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_rev_send[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	mnu_output[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_output_connector[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	end for
end function

function execute_morph_faders
	declare _offset : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	_offset{unknown} := int((real(CC[1]{unknown}){Builtin, None} / 127) * real(sli_volume_max[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value - sli_volume_min[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown}, sli_volume_min[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value + _offset{unknown}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	sli_volume[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	if(sli_volume.previous[i{unknown}]{unknown} # sli_volume[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value)
	lbl_volume[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + i{unknown}){Builtin, None} & "dB"
	timed_display.trigger(lbl_volume[i{unknown}]{unknown}, "Vol", 0){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	sli_volume.previous[i{unknown}]{unknown} := sli_volume[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value
	sli_volume_disp[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := max(sli_volume_max[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, sli_volume_min[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value){UserDefined, None}
	end for
end function

function execute_shape_controls
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	slot.note_offset[i{unknown}]{unknown} := sli_oct[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value * 12
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PAN{unknown}, sli_pan[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0{unknown}, sli_rev_send[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value, - 1, 7, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
end function

function hide_shape_controls
	shape_controls{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
end function

function unhide_shape_controls
	shape_controls{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
end function

function set_solo_mute
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare set_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare solo_active : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	solo_active{unknown} := 0
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	if(solo_mute_states[0, i{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	solo_active{unknown} := 1
	end if
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	if(solo_active{unknown} = 1)
	if(solo_mute_states[0, i{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown}, 397100, - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown}, 0, - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	else
	if(solo_mute_states[1, i{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown}, 0, - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown}, 397100, - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function theme_display.open
	theme_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	transport_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	gui_animation.show_side_panels(0){UserDefined, None}
	if(btn_tab_main{unknown} = 1)
	theme_main_display.open{UserDefined, None}
	theme_edit_display.close{UserDefined, None}
	btn_tab_main{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_tab_edit{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	else
	theme_edit_display.open{UserDefined, None}
	theme_main_display.close{UserDefined, None}
	btn_tab_main{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_tab_edit{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	gui_animation.show_side_panels(0){UserDefined, None}
	btn_theme_view{unknown} := 1
end function

function theme_display.close
	theme_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	transport_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	structure_selection_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	theme_main_display.time_selection{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_theme_view{unknown} := 0
end function

function theme_main_display.open
	theme_main_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	transport_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	call keycolor.update{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_main_display.update_bars{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_main_display.update_notes{UserDefined, None}
	call dynamics.update{UserDefined, None}
	call structure_selection_display.open{UserDefined, None}
end function

function theme_main_display.close
	theme_main_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	structure_selection_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	theme_main_display.time_selection{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	call keycolor.update{UserDefined, None}
end function

function structure_selection_display.open
	remote(btn_structure{unknown}, structure_array[current_structure_part{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	btn_regenerate_theme{unknown} -> text := "Generate New " & structure_names[structure_array[current_structure_part{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} & " Theme"
	structure_selection_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_selected_region[0]{unknown} -> x := 113 + (((current_structure_part{unknown} mod 2) * 624) / 2)
	lbl_selected_region[0]{unknown} -> y := 301 + ((current_structure_part{unknown} / 2) * (40 + 30))
	lbl_selected_region[0]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
end function

function structure_selection_display.close
	lbl_selected_region[0]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	structure_selection_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	current_structure_part{unknown} := - 1
end function

function midi_main_display.update_bars
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 8 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to (7 * 4) - 1
	lbl_midi_notes[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := 113 + int((real(i{unknown} mod 4){Builtin, None} * (real(624){Builtin, None} / real(4){Builtin, None})) + ((real(((ii{unknown} / 4) * melody_rates[i{unknown}, ii{unknown} / 4]{unknown}) + (ii{unknown} mod 4)){Builtin, None} * (real((850 - 113) - 113){Builtin, None} / real(4){Builtin, None})) / real(beats_per_bar{unknown} * melody_rates[i{unknown}, ii{unknown} / 4]{unknown}){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
	lbl_midi_notes[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := 100 + ((i{unknown} / 4) * 200)
	lbl_midi_notes[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := 8
	lbl_midi_notes[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> height := int(real(40){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) + 1){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 4
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := 113 + int((real(ii{unknown}){Builtin, None} * (real(624){Builtin, None} / real(4){Builtin, None})) + (real(iii{unknown}){Builtin, None} * ((real(624){Builtin, None} / real(4){Builtin, None}) / real(beats_per_bar{unknown}){Builtin, None}))){Builtin, None}
	lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := 301 + (i{unknown} * (40 + 30))
	lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> height := 40
	if(((ii{unknown} = 4) and (iii{unknown} > 0)) or (iii{unknown} >= beats_per_bar{unknown}))
	lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	if(iii{unknown} = 0)
	set_label_properties(lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}, "", "lbl_line_vertical"){Property, None}
	lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := 2
	lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> height := lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> height + 16
	lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> y - 16
	else
	set_label_properties(lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}, "", "lbl_line_vertical_0.25"){Property, None}
	lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := 1
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to (4 * 2) - 1
	if((ii{unknown} mod 2) = 0)
	btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown} / 2, 0]{unknown} -> x
	if(ii{unknown} < ((4 * 2) - 1))
	btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown} / 2, meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_beats_per_bar{unknown}]{unknown} - 1]{unknown} -> x - btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	else
	btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := (113 + 624) - btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	end if
	else
	btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown} / 2, meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_beats_per_bar{unknown}]{unknown} - 1]{unknown} -> x
	if(ii{unknown} < ((4 * 2) - 1))
	btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := lbl_midi_main_display.barlines[i{unknown}, (ii{unknown} + 1) / 2, 0]{unknown} -> x - btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	else
	btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := (113 + 624) - btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end for
end function

function midi_main_display.update_chords
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to (4 * 2) - 1
	if(chords[(i{unknown} * (4 * 2)) + ii{unknown}, 0]{unknown} # - 1)
	btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := root_notes[accidental{unknown}, chords[(i{unknown} * (4 * 2)) + ii{unknown}, 0]{unknown}]{unknown} & chord_type_string[chords[(i{unknown} * (4 * 2)) + ii{unknown}, 4]{unknown}]{unknown}
	if((chords[(i{unknown} * (4 * 2)) + ii{unknown}, 2]{unknown} # - 1) and (chords[(i{unknown} * (4 * 2)) + ii{unknown}, 2]{unknown} # chords[(i{unknown} * (4 * 2)) + ii{unknown}, 0]{unknown}))
	btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> text & "/" & root_notes[accidental{unknown}, chords[(i{unknown} * (4 * 2)) + ii{unknown}, 2]{unknown}]{unknown}
	end if
	else
	btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := "-"
	end if
	end for
	end for
end function

function midi_main_display.update_notes
	declare _counter : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _iterator : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _before_break : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _before_break2 : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _bar : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _data : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _prev_id[2] : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _prev_pitch : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _note_width : real := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare __use_virtual : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare __bar : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare __data : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	_prev_pitch{unknown} := - 1
	_prev_id[0]{unknown} := - 1
	_prev_id[1]{unknown} := - 1
	for i{unknown} := 0 to ((8 * 7) * 4) - 1
	_bar{unknown} := i{unknown} / (7 * 4)
	_data{unknown} := i{unknown} mod (7 * 4)
	lbl_midi_notes[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1
	_bar{unknown} := i{unknown} / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)
	_data{unknown} := i{unknown} mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)
	if(((melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} >= range.low{unknown}) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} <= range.high{unknown})) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} # 1))
	lbl_midi_notes[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	melody.exists{unknown} := 1
	lbl_midi_notes[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := (301 + 40) - int((real((melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) + 1){Builtin, None} * (real(40){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) + 1){Builtin, None})) - (real(_bar{unknown} / 4){Builtin, None} * real(40 + 30){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
	while(melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}) + 1, 0]{unknown} = 1) 
	if(((((i{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}) + 1) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) mod 4) < melody_rates[((i{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}) + 1) / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), (((i{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}) + 1) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown})
	inc(_counter{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	inc(_iterator{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	if((i{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}) = ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4))
	__use_virtual{unknown} := 1
	__bar{unknown} := (i{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}) / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)
	__data{unknown} := (i{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)
	_before_break{unknown} := _counter{unknown}
	_before_break2{unknown} := _iterator{unknown}
	lbl_midi_notes[__bar{unknown}, __data{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_midi_notes[__bar{unknown}, __data{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := lbl_midi_notes[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> y + (40 + 30)
	end if
	end while
	lbl_midi_notes[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := 0
	_note_width{unknown} := 0
	if(__use_virtual{unknown} = 1)
	lbl_midi_notes[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := int((real(1 + _before_break{unknown}){Builtin, None} * (real((850 - 113) - 113){Builtin, None} / real(4){Builtin, None})) / real(beats_per_bar{unknown} * melody_rates[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown} / 4]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	for _i{unknown} := 0 to _counter{unknown} - _before_break{unknown}
	int_buffer{unknown} := _i{unknown}
	while(((((i{unknown} + int_buffer{unknown}) + _before_break2{unknown}) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) mod 4) >= melody_rates[((i{unknown} + int_buffer{unknown}) + _before_break2{unknown}) / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), (((i{unknown} + int_buffer{unknown}) + _before_break2{unknown}) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown}) 
	int_buffer{unknown} := int_buffer{unknown} + 1
	end while
	_note_width{unknown} := _note_width{unknown} + ((real(624){Builtin, None} / real(4){Builtin, None}) / int_to_real(beats_per_bar{unknown} * melody_rates[((i{unknown} + int_buffer{unknown}) + _before_break2{unknown}) / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), (((i{unknown} + int_buffer{unknown}) + _before_break2{unknown}) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown}){Builtin, None})
	end for
	lbl_midi_notes[__bar{unknown}, __data{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := int(round(_note_width{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	else
	for _i{unknown} := 0 to _counter{unknown}
	int_buffer{unknown} := _i{unknown}
	while((((i{unknown} + int_buffer{unknown}) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) mod 4) >= melody_rates[(i{unknown} + int_buffer{unknown}) / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), ((i{unknown} + int_buffer{unknown}) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown}) 
	int_buffer{unknown} := int_buffer{unknown} + 1
	end while
	_note_width{unknown} := _note_width{unknown} + ((real(624){Builtin, None} / real(4){Builtin, None}) / real(beats_per_bar{unknown} * melody_rates[(i{unknown} + int_buffer{unknown}) / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), ((i{unknown} + int_buffer{unknown}) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown}){Builtin, None})
	end for
	lbl_midi_notes[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := int(round(_note_width{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	if((lbl_midi_notes[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> x + lbl_midi_notes[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> width) > (850 - 113))
	lbl_midi_notes[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := (850 - 113) - lbl_midi_notes[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	end if
	_counter{unknown} := 0
	_iterator{unknown} := 0
	__use_virtual{unknown} := 0
	if(_prev_pitch{unknown} = melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown})
	lbl_midi_notes[_prev_id[0]{unknown}, _prev_id[1]{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := lbl_midi_notes[_prev_id[0]{unknown}, _prev_id[1]{unknown}]{unknown} -> width - 2
	end if
	_prev_id[0]{unknown} := _bar{unknown}
	_prev_id[1]{unknown} := _data{unknown}
	_prev_pitch{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	midi_update_flag{unknown} := 1
end function

function dynamics.update
	declare _difference : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to (8 * 2) + 1
	sli_dynamic_handle[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	sli_dynamic_handle[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "slider_dynamics_unselected"
	if(btn_show_dynamics{unknown} = 1)
	sli_dynamic_handle[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	end if
	sli_dynamic_handle[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := dynamic_positions[i{unknown} - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown}
	if((i{unknown} > 0) and (i{unknown} # (8 + 1)))
	_difference{unknown} := sli_dynamic_handle[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value - sli_dynamic_handle[i{unknown} - 1]{unknown} -> value
	sli_line[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} -> picture := "dynamics-line-up-linear"
	sli_line[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} -> y := (301 + ((((i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))) / (4 * 2)) * (40 + 30))) + (40 - int(scale.range(real(sli_dynamic_handle[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None}, 0, 127, 0, 40){UserDefined, None}){Builtin, None})
	if(_difference{unknown} > 0)
	if(line_mode[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} = 0)
	sli_line[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} -> picture := "dynamics-line-up-linear"
	else
	if(line_mode[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} = 1)
	sli_line[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} -> picture := "dynamics-line-up-eased"
	else
	if(line_mode[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} = 2)
	sli_line[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} -> picture := "dynamics-line-up-eased-in"
	else
	if(line_mode[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} = 3)
	sli_line[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} -> picture := "dynamics-line-up-eased-out"
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(_difference{unknown} < 0)
	if(line_mode[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} = 0)
	sli_line[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} -> picture := "dynamics-line-down-linear"
	else
	if(line_mode[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} = 1)
	sli_line[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} -> picture := "dynamics-line-down-eased"
	else
	if(line_mode[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} = 2)
	sli_line[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} -> picture := "dynamics-line-down-eased-in"
	else
	if(line_mode[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} = 3)
	sli_line[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} -> picture := "dynamics-line-down-eased-out"
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	sli_line[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} -> y := (301 + ((((i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))) / (4 * 2)) * (40 + 30))) + (40 - int(scale.range(real(sli_dynamic_handle[i{unknown} - 1]{unknown} -> value){Builtin, None}, 0, 127, 0, 40){UserDefined, None}){Builtin, None})
	end if
	end if
	sli_line[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} -> value := abs(_difference{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	sli_line[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	if(btn_show_dynamics{unknown} = 1)
	sli_line[(i{unknown} - 1) - (i{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	end if
	end if
	end for
	mnu_line_mode{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	if((last_touched_handle{unknown} # - 1) and (btn_show_dynamics{unknown} = 1))
	sli_dynamic_handle[last_touched_handle{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "slider_dynamics_selected"
	if(last_touched_handle{unknown} < 17)
	mnu_line_mode{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	mnu_line_mode{unknown} -> value := line_mode[last_touched_handle{unknown} - (last_touched_handle{unknown} / (8 + 1))]{unknown}
	end if
	end if
	midi_update_flag{unknown} := 1
	if(btn_show_dynamics{unknown} = 1)
	sli_velocity_influence{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_velocity_influence{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_velocity_influence_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_velocity_influence_connector{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	else
	sli_velocity_influence{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_velocity_influence{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_velocity_influence_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_velocity_influence_connector{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
end function

function btn_chord.special_functions
	declare _offset : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	if(btn_chord.key_shift{unknown} = 1)
	if(chord_selector.current_chord{unknown} > 0)
	_offset{unknown} := - 1
	else
	console.print("No previous chord available"){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	else
	if(btn_chord.key_control{unknown} = 1)
	if(chord_selector.current_chord{unknown} < ((2 * 8) - 1))
	_offset{unknown} := 1
	else
	console.print("No next chord available"){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown} + _offset{unknown}, 1]{unknown}
	chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown} + _offset{unknown}, 0]{unknown}
	chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 2]{unknown} := chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown} + _offset{unknown}, 2]{unknown}
	chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 3]{unknown} := chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown} + _offset{unknown}, 3]{unknown}
	chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 4]{unknown} := chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown} + _offset{unknown}, 4]{unknown}
	if(btn_chord.key_alt{unknown} = 1)
	chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := - 1
	end if
	call midi_main_display.update_chords{UserDefined, None}
end function

function main_x_to_px(value : unknown)
	return (real_to_int(round(value{unknown} * int_to_real(624 / (624 / (4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}))){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None})
end function

function main_y_to_px(value : unknown)
	return (real_to_int(round(abs(1 - value{unknown}){Builtin, None} * int_to_real((2 * 40) + ((2 - 1) * 30)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / (40 + 30))
end function

function btn_chord_front.show
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to (4 * 2) - 1
	set_bounds(btn_chord_front[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown}, btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> x, btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> y, btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> width, btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> height){Property, None}
	btn_chord_front[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := ""
	btn_chord_front[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	end for
	end for
end function

function btn_chord_front.hide
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to (4 * 2) - 1
	btn_chord_front[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end for
	end for
end function

function theme_edit_display.open
	call midi_edit_display.update_allround{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_edit_display.update_bars{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_edit_display.update_notes{UserDefined, None}
	call scroll_handle.update{UserDefined, None}
	call header.update{UserDefined, None}
	edit_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	previous_page{unknown} := 1
end function

function theme_edit_display.close
	edit_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
end function

function midi_edit_display.update_zoom
	set_bounds(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{unknown}, 66, lbl_edit_scroller{unknown} -> y + 1, 698 / (8 / edit.zoom{unknown}), 5 - 2){Property, None}
	edit_display.offset{unknown} := 0
end function

function midi_edit_display.update_allround
	declare _chord_offset : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	xy_edit_scroller{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_BG{unknown}
	lbl_edit_scroller{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_edit_scroll_handle{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	if(mnu_edit_source{unknown} # 0)
	edit.zoom{unknown} := 2
	xy_edit_scroller{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_edit_scroller{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	lbl_edit_scroll_handle{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	edit_display.offset{unknown} := 0
	end if
	mnu_edit_zoom{unknown} := edit.zoom{unknown}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to (8 * 2) - 1
	btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := btn_chord[i{unknown} / (4 * 2), i{unknown} mod (4 * 2)]{unknown} -> text
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to (8 * 7) - 1
	btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	hide_triplet(i{unknown}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 0
	if(i{unknown} < ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) - 1))
	if(melody_rates[i{unknown} / beats_per_bar{unknown}, i{unknown} mod beats_per_bar{unknown}]{unknown} = 3)
	btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 1
	end if
	btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	hide_triplet(i{unknown}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end for
	if(mnu_edit_source{unknown} # 0)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to (2 * 2) - 1
	_chord_offset{unknown} := (search[structure_array{unknown}, mnu_edit_source{unknown} - 1] * 2) * 2
	if(_chord_offset{unknown} < 0)
	_chord_offset{unknown} := 0
	end if
	btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := btn_chord[(i{unknown} + _chord_offset{unknown}) / (4 * 2), (i{unknown} + _chord_offset{unknown}) mod (4 * 2)]{unknown} -> text
	end for
	end if
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 8 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 4 / 2
	lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := 1
	lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> height := 280
	if(((ii{unknown} mod beats_per_bar{unknown}) = 0) and (iii{unknown} = 0))
	set_label_properties(lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}, "", "lbl_line_vertical"){Property, None}
	lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> height := 280 + 15
	else
	if(iii{unknown} = 0)
	set_label_properties(lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}, "", "lbl_line_vertical_0.25"){Property, None}
	else
	set_label_properties(lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown}, "", "lbl_line_vertical_0.10"){Property, None}
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end for
	lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[8 - 1, beats_per_bar{unknown} - 1, 2]{unknown} -> picture := "lbl_line_vertical"
	lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> height := 280 + 15
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 8 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 4 - 1
	btn_midi_notes_edit[i{unknown}, (ii{unknown} * 4) + iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> height := int(real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) + 1){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	end for
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 24 - 1
	lbl_midi_edit_display.highlights[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := (130 + 280) - int(real(i{unknown} + 1){Builtin, None} * (real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) + 1){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
	lbl_midi_edit_display.highlights[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> height := int(real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) + 1){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 24 - 1
	lbl_midi_edit_display.key_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	if(i{unknown} <= (range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}))
	lbl_edit_note_name[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := midi_notes[accidental{unknown}, range.high{unknown} - i{unknown}]{unknown}
	lbl_edit_note_name[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := ((130 + int(real(i{unknown}){Builtin, None} * (real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) + 1){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}) + int((real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) + 1){Builtin, None}) / 2){Builtin, None}) - 9
	lbl_edit_note_name[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_BG{unknown}
	if(search[midi.black_notes{unknown}, (i{unknown} + range.low{unknown}) mod 12] # - 1)
	lbl_midi_edit_display.key_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	lbl_midi_edit_display.key_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := (130 + 280) - int(real(i{unknown} + 1){Builtin, None} * (real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) + 1){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
	lbl_midi_edit_display.key_colors[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> height := int(real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) + 1){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	else
	lbl_edit_note_name[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	call apply_note_colors{UserDefined, None}
end function

function midi_edit_display.update_bars
	declare _barwidth : real {Reuses: 0}
	declare _new_chord : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _show_scale_notes : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _found_note_in_key : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 8 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 4 / 2
	lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	_barwidth{unknown} := real(698){Builtin, None} / real(edit.zoom{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := (66 + int(((real(i{unknown}){Builtin, None} * _barwidth{unknown}) + ((real(ii{unknown}){Builtin, None} * _barwidth{unknown}) / real(beats_per_bar{unknown}){Builtin, None})) + (((real(iii{unknown}){Builtin, None} * _barwidth{unknown}) / real(beats_per_bar{unknown}){Builtin, None}) / real(4 / 2){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}) - edit_display.offset{unknown}
	if((((lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> x > ((66 + 698) + 2)) or (lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> x < (66 - 2))) or (ii{unknown} > (beats_per_bar{unknown} - 1))) or (iii{unknown} > (melody_rates[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} - 1)))
	lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to (8 * 2) - 1
	if((i{unknown} mod 2) = 0)
	btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[i{unknown} / 2, 0, 0]{unknown} -> x
	if(btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x < 66)
	btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := 66
	end if
	if(i{unknown} < ((8 * 2) - 1))
	btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{unknown} + 1) / 2, meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_beats_per_bar{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0]{unknown} -> x - btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	else
	btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[8 - 1, beats_per_bar{unknown} - 1, melody_rates[8 - 1, beats_per_bar{unknown} - 1]{unknown}]{unknown} -> x - btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	end if
	else
	btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[i{unknown} / 2, meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_beats_per_bar{unknown}]{unknown} - 1, 0]{unknown} -> x
	if(btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x < 66)
	btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := 66
	end if
	if(i{unknown} < ((8 * 2) - 1))
	btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{unknown} + 1) / 2, 0, 0]{unknown} -> x - btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	else
	btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[8 - 1, beats_per_bar{unknown} - 1, 2]{unknown} -> x - btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	end if
	end if
	if((btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x + btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width) > (66 + 698))
	btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := (66 + 698) - btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	end if
	if(btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width < 30)
	btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	else
	btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	end if
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 24 - 1
	_found_note_in_key{unknown} := 0
	if(btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value = 1)
	_show_scale_notes{unknown} := 1
	if(chords[i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} # - 1)
	_new_chord{unknown} := i{unknown}
	end if
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 7
	if(((modes[chords[_new_chord{unknown}, 1]{unknown}, iii{unknown}]{unknown} + chords[_new_chord{unknown}, 0]{unknown}) mod 12) = ((range.low{unknown} + ii{unknown}) mod 12))
	_found_note_in_key{unknown} := 1
	end if
	end for
	if((ii{unknown} <= (range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown})) and (_found_note_in_key{unknown} = 1))
	lbl_midi_edit_display.highlights[ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	lbl_midi_edit_display.highlights[ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width
	lbl_midi_edit_display.highlights[ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := btn_edit_chord[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide
	end if
	end if
	if(_show_scale_notes{unknown} = 0)
	lbl_midi_edit_display.highlights[ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to (8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) - 1
	btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[i{unknown} / beats_per_bar{unknown}, i{unknown} mod beats_per_bar{unknown}, 0]{unknown} -> x
	if(btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x < 66)
	btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := 66
	end if
	if(i{unknown} < ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) - 1))
	btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[(i{unknown} + 1) / beats_per_bar{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 1) mod beats_per_bar{unknown}, 0]{unknown} -> x - btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	else
	btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := lbl_midi_edit_display.barlines[8 - 1, beats_per_bar{unknown} - 1, 0]{unknown} -> x - btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	end if
	if((btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x + btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width) > (66 + 698))
	btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := (66 + 698) - btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	end if
	if(btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width < 5)
	btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	else
	btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	end if
	if(btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value = 1)
	update_triplet_pos(i{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	hide_triplet(i{unknown}, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	else
	hide_triplet(i{unknown}, HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end for
end function

function midi_edit_display.update_notes
	declare _counter : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _iterator : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _before_break : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _note_width : real {Reuses: 0}
	declare _bar : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _data : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _prev_id[2] : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _prev_pitch : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _xpos : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to ((8 * 7) * 4) - 1
	_bar{unknown} := i{unknown} / (7 * 4)
	_data{unknown} := i{unknown} mod (7 * 4)
	btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end for
	if(mnu_edit_source{unknown} = 0)
	_prev_pitch{unknown} := - 1
	_prev_id[0]{unknown} := - 1
	_prev_id[1]{unknown} := - 1
	for i{unknown} := 0 to ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1
	edit.note_lengths[i{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1
	_bar{unknown} := i{unknown} / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)
	_data{unknown} := i{unknown} mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)
	if(((melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} >= range.low{unknown}) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} <= range.high{unknown})) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} # 1))
	btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	_xpos{unknown} := ((66 + (_bar{unknown} * (698 / edit.zoom{unknown}))) + real_to_int(round((int_to_real(((_data{unknown} / 4) * melody_rates[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown} / 4]{unknown}) + (_data{unknown} mod 4)){Builtin, None} * (int_to_real(698){Builtin, None} / int_to_real(edit.zoom{unknown}){Builtin, None})) / int_to_real(beats_per_bar{unknown} * melody_rates[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown} / 4]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) - edit_display.offset{unknown}
	note.x[i{unknown}]{unknown} := _xpos{unknown}
	btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := _xpos{unknown}
	btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> y := (130 + 280) - int(real((melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) + 1){Builtin, None} * (real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) + 1){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
	while(melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}) + 1, 0]{unknown} = 1) 
	if(((((i{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}) + 1) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) mod 4) < melody_rates[((i{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}) + 1) / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), (((i{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}) + 1) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown})
	inc(_counter{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	inc(_iterator{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	_note_width{unknown} := 0
	for _i{unknown} := 0 to _counter{unknown}
	int_buffer{unknown} := _i{unknown}
	while((((i{unknown} + int_buffer{unknown}) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) mod 4) >= melody_rates[(i{unknown} + int_buffer{unknown}) / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), ((i{unknown} + int_buffer{unknown}) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown}) 
	int_buffer{unknown} := int_buffer{unknown} + 1
	end while
	_note_width{unknown} := _note_width{unknown} + ((int_to_real(698){Builtin, None} / int_to_real(edit.zoom{unknown}){Builtin, None}) / int_to_real(beats_per_bar{unknown} * melody_rates[(i{unknown} + int_buffer{unknown}) / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), ((i{unknown} + int_buffer{unknown}) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown}){Builtin, None})
	end for
	btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := int(round(_note_width{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	edit.note_lengths[i{unknown}]{unknown} := _iterator{unknown} + 1
	_counter{unknown} := 0
	_iterator{unknown} := 0
	if(_xpos{unknown} > ((66 + 698) - 1))
	btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	else
	if((_xpos{unknown} + btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> width) > (66 + 698))
	btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := (66 + 698) - btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> x
	else
	if((_xpos{unknown} + btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> width) < 66)
	btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	else
	if(_xpos{unknown} < 66)
	btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> width - (66 - _xpos{unknown})
	btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> x := 66
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(_prev_pitch{unknown} = melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown})
	btn_midi_notes_edit[_prev_id[0]{unknown}, _prev_id[1]{unknown}]{unknown} -> width := btn_midi_notes_edit[_prev_id[0]{unknown}, _prev_id[1]{unknown}]{unknown} -> width - 2
	end if
	if(btn_show_velocities{unknown} = 1)
	btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 2]{unknown}
	else
