	btn_midi_notes_edit[_bar{unknown}, _data{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := ""
	end if
	_prev_id[0]{unknown} := _bar{unknown}
	_prev_id[1]{unknown} := _data{unknown}
	_prev_pitch{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	end if
end function

function snap(x : unknown, interval : unknown)
	return (int(round(round(real(x{unknown}){Builtin, None} / interval{unknown}){Builtin, None} * interval{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None})
end function

function scroll_handle.update
	lbl_edit_scroll_handle{unknown} -> x := 66 + int(round(real((edit_display.offset{unknown} * edit.zoom{unknown}) * beats_per_bar{unknown}){Builtin, None} / real(beats_per_bar{unknown} * 8){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
end function

function header.update
	declare _x_pos : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _width : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	if(playing{unknown} = 0)
	lbl_header_playhead{unknown} -> x := lbl_edit_cursor{unknown} -> x - 4
	else
	lbl_header_playhead{unknown} -> x := ((66 + int(round((real(starting_pos{unknown} * (8 / edit.zoom{unknown})){Builtin, None} * real(698){Builtin, None}) / (midi_steps{unknown} * real((beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4) * 8){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) - edit_display.offset{unknown}) - 4
	end if
	if(in_range(lbl_header_playhead{unknown} -> x, 66 - 4, (66 + 698) - 4){Builtin, None})
	lbl_header_playhead{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	else
	lbl_header_playhead{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
end function

function add_midi_note
	new_note{unknown} := ((click.x{unknown} - 66) + edit_display.offset{unknown}) / real_to_int(round((int_to_real(698){Builtin, None} / int_to_real(edit.zoom{unknown}){Builtin, None}) / int_to_real(beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	new_note{unknown} := ((new_note{unknown} / 4) * 4) + clamp(new_note{unknown} mod 4, 0, melody_rates[new_note{unknown} / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), (new_note{unknown} mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown} - 1){UserDefined, None}
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := 0
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := range.high{unknown} - int(real(click.y{unknown} - 130){Builtin, None} / (real(280){Builtin, None} / real((range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) + 1){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 2]{unknown} := 0
	if(melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown} + 1, 0]{unknown} = 1)
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown} + 1, 0]{unknown} := 0
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown} + 1, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	end if
	message("triggered " & melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 1]{unknown} & " w/ " & (sli_dynamics{unknown} + melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 2]{unknown})){Builtin, None}
	for inst.slot{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	inst.id{unknown} := slot.loaded_sound[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(inst.id{unknown} # - 1)
	instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} := (instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} + 1) mod instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}
	if((instrument.type[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} = 0) and (((with_lookahead{unknown} = 0) and (lookahead[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)) or (((lookahead_slot{unknown} = inst.slot{unknown}) and (with_lookahead{unknown} = 1)) and (lookahead[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} > 0))))
	if(melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 1]{unknown} > - 1)
	if((sustain.note_ids[inst.slot{unknown}, melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1) and (instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1))
	note_off(sustain.note_ids[inst.slot{unknown}, instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
