	fade_out(old_note_id{unknown}, s1.sus_release_time[trans_idx{unknown}]{unknown} * 1000, 1){Builtin, None}
	transition_id{unknown} := play_note((note{unknown} * ne(ge(interval[c.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, None}){UserDefined, None}) + (last_note[c.slot{unknown}]{unknown} * ge(interval[c.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, None}), (abs(interval[c.slot{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None} * 5) + (ge(interval[c.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, None} * 60), real_to_int((int_to_real(s1.trans_zone_start[trans_idx{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None} / 48000) * 1e+06){Builtin, None}, 0){Builtin, None}
	redirect_output(transition_id{unknown}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{unknown}, c.slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(transition_id{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(transition_id{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 1, trans_group[c.slot{unknown}]{unknown} + leg.current_trans_group{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	change_vol(transition_id{unknown}, s1.trans_event_volume[trans_idx{unknown}]{unknown}, 0){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(transition_id{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{unknown}, s1.trans_fadeIn_time[trans_idx{unknown}]{unknown}, 3){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(transition_id{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{unknown}, s1.trans_fadeOut_time[trans_idx{unknown}]{unknown}, 5){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[1]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{unknown}, s1.trans_wait_time[trans_idx{unknown}]{unknown}, 0){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[1]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{unknown}, s1.sus_fadeIn_time[trans_idx{unknown}]{unknown}, 2){Builtin, None}
	end if
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	for leg.i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 1, leg.i{unknown} + sus_group[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for leg.i{unknown} := 0 to (instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} * instrument.sustain_fx[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}) - 1
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 1, leg.i{unknown} + sus_fx_group[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	else
	fade_out(leg.old_note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, 152 * 1000, 1){Builtin, None}
	leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := play_note(melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, clamp(sli_dynamics{unknown} + melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 2]{unknown}, 1, 127){UserDefined, None}, sus_s_start{unknown}, - 1){Builtin, None}
	redirect_output(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{unknown}, inst.slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{unknown}, 150000, 0){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{unknown}, DEFAULT_VAL.sus_fadeIn_time{unknown}, 2){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	for leg.i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 1, leg.i{unknown} + sus_group[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for leg.i{unknown} := 0 to (instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} * instrument.sustain_fx[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}) - 1
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 1, leg.i{unknown} + sus_fx_group[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	end if
	else
	if(1 = 1)
	last_note[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	is_attack[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1
	attack_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := play_note(melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, min(clamp(sli_dynamics{unknown} + melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 2]{unknown}, CC[101]{unknown} - 20, CC[101]{unknown} + 20){UserDefined, None}, 127){UserDefined, None}, 0, 0){Builtin, None}
	redirect_output(attack_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{unknown}, inst.slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(attack_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(attack_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 1, atk_group[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} + instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} := (instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} + 1) mod instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}
	is_attack[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := ne(1){UserDefined, None}
	if(is_attack[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := play_note(melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, 69, 250000, - 1){Builtin, None}
	redirect_output(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{unknown}, inst.slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	for leg.i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 1, atk_sus_group[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} + leg.i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	end if
	else
	note_off(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	leg.old_note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	last_transition[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := transition_id{unknown}
	last_note[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	none{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	instrument.trigger_transition[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := 1
	else
	slot.triggered_lookahead[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, new_note{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	else
	if(with_lookahead{unknown} = 0)
	legato_release(inst.slot{unknown}, instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, none{unknown}, leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, leg.release_id{unknown}, instrument.start_group[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.trans_groups[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	instrument.trigger_transition[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
	call midi_edit_display.update_notes{UserDefined, None}
end function

function edit.scroller_to_px(value : unknown)
	return (int(round(value{unknown} * real(xy_edit_scroller{unknown} -> width){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None})
end function

function display_x_to_px(value : unknown)
	return (int(round(value{unknown} * real(698){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None})
end function

function display_y_to_px(value : unknown)
	return (int(round(abs(1 - value{unknown}){Builtin, None} * real(280){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None})
end function

function reset_selection
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 8 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4) - 1
	multiselection{unknown} := - 1
	selected_notes[((i{unknown} * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) + ii{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1
	end for
	end for
	call apply_note_colors{UserDefined, None}
	selected_note_before{unknown} := - 1
end function

function apply_note_colors
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 8 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4) - 1
	btn_midi_notes_edit[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "lbl_melody_note"
	if(search[selected_notes{unknown}, ((i{unknown} * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) + ii{unknown}] # - 1)
	btn_midi_notes_edit[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> picture := "lbl_melody_note_selected"
	end if
	end for
	end for
end function

function move_selection(steps : unknown)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to multiselection{unknown}
	selected_notes[i{unknown}]{unknown} := selected_notes[i{unknown}]{unknown} + steps{unknown}
	end for
end function

function play_pos_from_cursor
	play_pos{unknown} := int(round(((real(((lbl_header_playhead{unknown} -> x + 4) - 66) + edit_display.offset{unknown}){Builtin, None} / (real(698){Builtin, None} * (real(8 + 2){Builtin, None} / real(edit.zoom{unknown}){Builtin, None}))) * midi_steps{unknown}) * real((beats_per_bar{unknown} * (4 + 1)) * 8){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	starting_pos{unknown} := play_pos{unknown}
end function

function hide_triplet(idx : unknown, hide : unknown)
	lbl_subbeat_txt[idx{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := hide{unknown}
end function

function update_triplet_pos(idx : unknown)
	set_bounds(lbl_subbeat_txt[i{unknown}]{unknown}, btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> x, btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> y - 3, btn_edit_subbeat[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> width, 18){Property, None}
end function

function multiselection.sort
	sort[selected_notes{unknown}, 0, 0, multiselection{unknown}]
end function

function chord_selector.open
	declare _row : unknown := chord_selector.current_chord{unknown} / (4 * 2) {Reuses: 0}
	declare _item : unknown := chord_selector.current_chord{unknown} mod (4 * 2) {Reuses: 0}
	chord_selector.current_mode{unknown} := chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 4]{unknown}
	chord_selector.current_root{unknown} := chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 0]{unknown}
	chord_selector.current_bass{unknown} := chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 2]{unknown}
	remote(btn_chromatic{unknown}, chord_selector.current_root{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	active_chord_type_group{unknown} := search[chord_type_order{unknown}, chord_selector.current_mode{unknown}] / 8
	chord_type_group_offset{unknown} := 8 * active_chord_type_group{unknown}
	call ui.update_next_prev_group_buttons{UserDefined, None}
	call update_type_buttons{UserDefined, None}
	mnu_bass_note{unknown} := chord_selector.current_bass{unknown}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to (4 * 2) - 1
	btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 0
	btn_chord_front[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 0
	end for
	end for
	btn_chord[_row{unknown}, _item{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 1
	btn_chord_front[_row{unknown}, _item{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 1
	if(UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> hide = HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown})
	UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> x := clamp(btn_chord[_row{unknown}, _item{unknown}]{unknown} -> x - ((UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> width - btn_chord[_row{unknown}, _item{unknown}]{unknown} -> width) / 2), 0, 850 - UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> width){UserDefined, None}
	UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> y := btn_chord[_row{unknown}, _item{unknown}]{unknown} -> y - 150
	none{unknown} := animation.position.start(parent.chord_selector{unknown}, UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> x, UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> y - 10, UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> x, UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> y, 5, 3){UserDefined, None}
	else
	none{unknown} := animation.position.start(parent.chord_selector{unknown}, UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> x, UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> y, clamp(btn_chord[_row{unknown}, _item{unknown}]{unknown} -> x - ((UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> width - btn_chord[_row{unknown}, _item{unknown}]{unknown} -> width) / 2), 0, 850 - UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> width){UserDefined, None}, btn_chord[_row{unknown}, _item{unknown}]{unknown} -> y - 150, 8, 1){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	wait(50 * 1000){Builtin, None}
	btn_backdrop{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	call btn_chord_front.show{UserDefined, None}
	if(chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 0]{unknown} # - 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	if(chord.types[chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 3]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)
	if(chord_playback.notes[i{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)
	note_off(chord_playback.notes[i{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	one_shot(15, ((chord.playback_octave{unknown} + chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 0]{unknown}) + modes[chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 1]{unknown}, chord.types[chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 3]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} mod 7]{unknown}) + ((chord.types[chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 3]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} / 7) * 12), none{unknown}, chord_velocity{unknown}, chord_playback.notes[i{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.start_group[preview_sound{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.rr_nums[preview_sound{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.rr_cycle[preview_sound{unknown}]{unknown}, - 1){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end for
	if(chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 2]{unknown} # - 1)
	if(chord_playback.bass_note{unknown} # - 1)
	note_off(chord_playback.bass_note{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	one_shot(15, closest_bass_note(chord.playback_octave{unknown} + chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 0]{unknown}, chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 2]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}, none{unknown}, chord_velocity{unknown}, chord_playback.bass_note{unknown}, instrument.start_group[preview_sound{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.rr_nums[preview_sound{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.rr_cycle[preview_sound{unknown}]{unknown}, - 1){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
end function

function chord_selector.close
	call btn_chord_front.hide{UserDefined, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to (4 * 2) - 1
	btn_chord[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 0
	btn_chord_front[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 0
	end for
	end for
	if(UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> hide # HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown})
	i{unknown} := animation.position.start(parent.chord_selector{unknown}, UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> x, UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> y, UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> x, UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> y - 10, 5, 2){UserDefined, None}
	wait((5 * 50) * 1000){Builtin, None}
	end if
	UI_chord_selector{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_backdrop{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
end function

function chord_selector.set_current_chord
	declare _is_in_root : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _pos : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _chord_note : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := chord_modes_scale[chord_selector.current_mode{unknown}]{unknown}
	chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := chord_selector.current_root{unknown}
	chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 2]{unknown} := chord_selector.current_bass{unknown}
	chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 3]{unknown} := chord_modes_tones[chord_selector.current_mode{unknown}]{unknown}
	chords[chord_selector.current_chord{unknown}, 4]{unknown} := chord_selector.current_mode{unknown}
	call apply_root_key_to_chords{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_main_display.update_chords{UserDefined, None}
	call chord_selector.open{UserDefined, None}
end function

function chord_selector.update_roots_list
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 12 - 2
	btn_chromatic[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := root_notes[accidental{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
end function

function save_chords
	chords.save_array[0]{unknown} := root_key[0]{unknown}
	chords.save_array[1]{unknown} := root_key[1]{unknown}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[_chords{unknown}] - 1
	chords.save_array[i{unknown} + 2]{unknown} := _chords[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
end function

function load_chords
	root_key[0]{unknown} := chords.save_array[0]{unknown}
	mnu_root_key.key{unknown} := root_key[0]{unknown}
	root_key[1]{unknown} := chords.save_array[1]{unknown}
	mnu_root_key.mode{unknown} := root_key[1]{unknown}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[_chords{unknown}] - 1
	_chords[i{unknown}]{unknown} := chords.save_array[i{unknown} + 2]{unknown}
	end for
	call get_accidental_from_root_key{UserDefined, None}
end function

function apply_root_key_to_chords
	declare _pos : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _is_in_root : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _chord : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _chord_note : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _chord.mode : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _chord.root : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _next_chord.root : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _next_chord.mode : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _iterator : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for _chord{unknown} := 0 to (2 * 8) - 1
	_chord.mode{unknown} := chords[_chord{unknown}, 4]{unknown}
	_chord.root{unknown} := chords[_chord{unknown}, 0]{unknown}
	if(_chord.root{unknown} # - 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 7
	if(_chord.root{unknown} = ((all_root_note_nums[root_key[0]{unknown}]{unknown} + modes[root_key[1]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown}) mod 12))
	_pos{unknown} := search[mode_positions{unknown}, abs(_chord.root{unknown} - (all_root_note_nums[root_key[0]{unknown}]{unknown} - mode_positions[root_key[1]{unknown}]{unknown})){Builtin, None} mod 12]
	if(_pos{unknown} # - 1)
	_is_in_root{unknown} := 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	_chord_note{unknown} := chord.types[chord_modes_tones[_chord.mode{unknown}]{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(_chord_note{unknown} # - 1)
	if(modes[chord_modes_scale[_chord.mode{unknown}]{unknown}, _chord_note{unknown} mod 7]{unknown} # modes[_pos{unknown}, _chord_note{unknown}]{unknown})
	_is_in_root{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end if
	end for
	if((_chord.mode{unknown} = search[chord_modes_tones{unknown}, 4]) or (_chord.mode{unknown} = search[chord_modes_tones{unknown}, 5]))
	_next_chord.root{unknown} := - 1
	_iterator{unknown} := 0
	while((_next_chord.root{unknown} = - 1) and ((_chord{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}) < (2 * 8))) 
	inc(_iterator{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	_next_chord.root{unknown} := chords[_chord{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}, 0]{unknown}
	_next_chord.mode{unknown} := chords[_chord{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}, 4]{unknown}
	end while
	if(_next_chord.root{unknown} = _chord.root{unknown})
	chords[_chord{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := chords[_chord{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}, 1]{unknown}
	_is_in_root{unknown} := 1
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	_chord_note{unknown} := chord.types[chord_modes_tones[_next_chord.mode{unknown}]{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(_chord_note{unknown} # - 1)
	if(modes[chord_modes_scale[_next_chord.mode{unknown}]{unknown}, _chord_note{unknown} mod 7]{unknown} # modes[_pos{unknown}, _chord_note{unknown}]{unknown})
	_is_in_root{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	i{unknown} := 7
	end if
	end for
	if(_is_in_root{unknown} = 1)
	message("changed scale of " & _chord{unknown} & " from " & chords[_chord{unknown}, 1]{unknown} & " to " & _pos{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	chords[_chord{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := _pos{unknown}
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function guess_root_key_from_chords
	declare _notes[12] : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _chord : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _idx : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _str : string := "" {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 11
	_notes[i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end for
	for _chord{unknown} := 0 to (2 * 8) - 1
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	if((chords[_chord{unknown}, 0]{unknown} # - 1) and (chord.types[chords[_chord{unknown}, 3]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1))
	inc(_notes[(chords[_chord{unknown}, 0]{unknown} + modes[chords[_chord{unknown}, 1]{unknown}, chord.types[chords[_chord{unknown}, 3]{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}) mod 12]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end for
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 11
	_str{unknown} := _str{unknown} & root_notes[0, i{unknown}]{unknown} & ": " & _notes[i{unknown}]{unknown} & " | "
	pressed_notes[i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end for
	message(_str{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	lowest_note{unknown} := - 1
	for _i{unknown} := 0 to 3 - 1
	_value{unknown} := array.max(_notes{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	_idx{unknown} := search[_notes{unknown}, _value{unknown}]
	_notes[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	pressed_notes[_idx{unknown}]{unknown} := 1
	if(lowest_note{unknown} = - 1)
	lowest_note{unknown} := _idx{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	call identify_chord{UserDefined, None}
	message("root = " & resulting_root{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	message("scale = " & resulting_scale{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	mnu_root_key.key{unknown} := search[all_root_note_nums{unknown}, resulting_root{unknown}]
	mnu_root_key.mode{unknown} := chord_modes_scale[resulting_scale{unknown}]{unknown}
	if((resulting_scale{unknown} = 5) or (resulting_scale{unknown} = 4))
	mnu_root_key.key{unknown} := chords[0, 0]{unknown}
	mnu_root_key.mode{unknown} := chords[0, 1]{unknown}
	end if
end function

function ui.update_next_prev_group_buttons
	btn_chord_type_prev_group{unknown} -> picture := btn_chord_type_prev_group_picture{unknown}
	if(active_chord_type_group{unknown} = 0)
	btn_chord_type_prev_group{unknown} -> picture := btn_chord_type_prev_group_picture{unknown} & "_disabled"
	end if
	btn_chord_type_next_group{unknown} -> picture := btn_chord_type_next_group_picture{unknown}
	if(active_chord_type_group{unknown} = 3)
	btn_chord_type_next_group{unknown} -> picture := btn_chord_type_next_group_picture{unknown} & "_disabled"
	end if
end function

function update_type_buttons
	for i{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[btn_chord_type{unknown}] - 1
	btn_chord_type[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 0
	if((i{unknown} + chord_type_group_offset{unknown}) < num_elements[chord_type_names{unknown}])
	if((i{unknown} + chord_type_group_offset{unknown}) = search[chord_type_order{unknown}, chord_selector.current_mode{unknown}])
	btn_chord_type[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 1
	end if
	btn_chord_type[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_chord_type[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := chord_type_names[chord_type_order[i{unknown} + chord_type_group_offset{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	else
	btn_chord_type[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	end for
end function

function get_accidental_from_root_key
	declare _key : unknown := all_root_note_nums[mnu_root_key.key{unknown}]{unknown} {Reuses: 0}
	declare _mode : unknown := mnu_root_key.mode{unknown} {Reuses: 0}
	declare _pos : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	_pos{unknown} := Co5.get_pos(_key{unknown}, _mode{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	if(_pos{unknown} > 5)
	accidental{unknown} := 1
	else
	accidental{unknown} := 0
	end if
	if((mnu_root_key.key{unknown} > 0) and (mnu_root_key.key{unknown} < (num_elements[all_root_note_nums{unknown}] - 1)))
	if(_key{unknown} = all_root_note_nums[mnu_root_key.key{unknown} - 1]{unknown})
	accidental{unknown} := 1
	else
	if(_key{unknown} = all_root_note_nums[mnu_root_key.key{unknown} + 1]{unknown})
	accidental{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	call midi_main_display.update_chords{UserDefined, None}
	call chord_selector.update_roots_list{UserDefined, None}
end function

function Co5.get_pos(key : unknown, mode : unknown) -> result : unknown
	declare _mover : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _counter : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	while(_mover{unknown} # key{unknown}) 
	inc(_counter{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	_mover{unknown} := (_mover{unknown} + 7) mod 12
	end while
	result{unknown} := ((_counter{unknown} - root_key.mode_shifts[mode{unknown}]{unknown}) + 12) mod 12
end function

function engine.reset
	playing{unknown} := 0
	play_pos{unknown} := starting_pos{unknown}
	if(play_pos{unknown} < int(midi_steps{unknown}){Builtin, None})
	play_pos{unknown} := 0
	end if
	call cursor.update{UserDefined, None}
	if(edit_suggestion.play_pos_buffer{unknown} # - 1)
	play_pos{unknown} := edit_suggestion.play_pos_buffer{unknown}
	end if
	btn_play{unknown} := 0
	call legato.stop_all{UserDefined, None}
end function

function cursor.update
	lbl_edit_cursor{unknown} -> x := (66 + int(round((real(play_pos{unknown} * (8 / edit.zoom{unknown})){Builtin, None} * real(698){Builtin, None}) / (midi_steps{unknown} * real((beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4) * 8){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}) - edit_display.offset{unknown}
	if(in_range(lbl_edit_cursor{unknown} -> x, 66, 66 + 698){Builtin, None})
	lbl_edit_cursor{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	else
	lbl_edit_cursor{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	if(btn_follow_mode{unknown} = 1)
	if((edit_display{unknown} -> hide = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}) and (playing{unknown} = 1))
	if((play_pos{unknown} > 0) and ((real(play_pos{unknown}){Builtin, None} / midi_steps{unknown}) < real(((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 8) - 1){Builtin, None}))
	edit_display.offset{unknown} := ((lbl_edit_cursor{unknown} -> x - 66) + edit_display.offset{unknown}) - 1
	call scroll_handle.update{UserDefined, None}
	if(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{unknown} -> x < 66)
	lbl_edit_scroll_handle{unknown} -> x := 66
	else
	if(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{unknown} -> x > ((66 + 698) - lbl_edit_scroll_handle{unknown} -> width))
	lbl_edit_scroll_handle{unknown} -> x := (66 + 698) - lbl_edit_scroll_handle{unknown} -> width
	end if
	end if
	edit_display.offset{unknown} := real_to_int(round((int_to_real(lbl_edit_scroll_handle{unknown} -> x - 66){Builtin, None} / int_to_real(lbl_edit_scroller{unknown} -> width - lbl_edit_scroll_handle{unknown} -> width){Builtin, None}) * int_to_real(((8 / edit.zoom{unknown}) - 1) * 698){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	call midi_edit_display.update_bars{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_edit_display.update_notes{UserDefined, None}
	call header.update{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	lbl_main_cursor{unknown} -> x := (113 - 2) + int(round(((real(play_pos{unknown} + 1){Builtin, None} mod (midi_steps{unknown} * real((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4){Builtin, None})) * real(624){Builtin, None}) / (midi_steps{unknown} * real((beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4) * 4){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	lbl_main_cursor{unknown} -> y := 301 + ((play_pos{unknown} / (((int(midi_steps{unknown}){Builtin, None} * 4) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4)) * (40 + 30))
end function

function transport_settings_display.open
	btn_transport_settings{unknown} -> value := 1
	none{unknown} := animation.position.start(transport_settings_display{unknown}, transport_settings_display{unknown} -> x, 435 - 120, transport_settings_display{unknown} -> x, 435 - 100, 5, 3){UserDefined, None}
	none{unknown} := animation.picture.start(get_ui_id(lbl_transport_settings.bg{unknown}){Builtin, None}, 1, 99, 5, 3){UserDefined, None}
	wait(50 * 1000){Builtin, None}
	transport_settings_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_backdrop{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
end function

function transport_settings_display.close
	btn_transport_settings{unknown} -> value := 0
	if(transport_settings_display{unknown} -> hide # HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown})
	none{unknown} := animation.position.start(transport_settings_display{unknown}, transport_settings_display{unknown} -> x, 435 - 100, transport_settings_display{unknown} -> x, 435 - 120, 5, 2){UserDefined, None}
	none{unknown} := animation.picture.start(get_ui_id(lbl_transport_settings.bg{unknown}){Builtin, None}, 99, 1, 5, 2){UserDefined, None}
	wait((250 * 1000) + 1){Builtin, None}
	end if
	transport_settings_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_backdrop{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
end function

function set_chord_playback_volume
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown}, sli_chords_preview_vol{unknown} -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} + 15){Builtin, None}
end function

function pitch.generate_next(prev3 : unknown, prev2 : unknown, prev1 : unknown) -> result : unknown
	declare _rand : unknown := Rand(1, 1000){UserDefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
	declare _total : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	result{unknown} := 0
	for i0{unknown} := 0 to 7 - 1
	_total{unknown} := _total{unknown} + pitch.transition_matrix[clamp(prev3{unknown}, 0, 7 - 1){UserDefined, None}, clamp(prev2{unknown}, 0, 7 - 1){UserDefined, None}, clamp(prev1{unknown}, 0, 7 - 1){UserDefined, None}, i0{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(_rand{unknown} <= _total{unknown})
	result{unknown} := i0{unknown}
	i0{unknown} := 7
	end if
	end for
end function

function rhythm.generate_next(prev3 : unknown, prev2 : unknown, prev1 : unknown) -> result : unknown
	declare _rand : unknown := Rand(1, 1000){UserDefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
	declare _total : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	result{unknown} := 6
	for i0{unknown} := 0 to 9 - 1
	_total{unknown} := _total{unknown} + rhythm.transition_matrix[clamp(prev3{unknown}, 0, 9 - 1){UserDefined, None}, clamp(prev2{unknown}, 0, 9 - 1){UserDefined, None}, clamp(prev1{unknown}, 0, 9 - 1){UserDefined, None}, i0{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(_rand{unknown} <= _total{unknown})
	result{unknown} := i0{unknown}
	i0{unknown} := 9
	end if
	end for
	if(_total{unknown} = 0)
	message("zero frequency at " & prev3{unknown} & "|" & prev2{unknown} & "|" & prev1{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function generate_suggestions
	declare _next_pitch : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _last_pitches[3] : unknown := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _next_note : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _next_rhythm : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _last_rhythms[3] : unknown := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _offset : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _note_len_counter : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _prev_pitch : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _seed : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _current_key.root : unknown := root_key[0]{unknown} {Reuses: 0}
	declare _current_key.mode : unknown := root_key[1]{unknown} {Reuses: 0}
	declare _chord_offset : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _velocity_addition : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _failsafe_counter : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _sum_breaks : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _sum_empty_beats : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _len : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _len_before : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _total_silence : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _sum_syncopations : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _syncopation_difference : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _syncopation_after_break : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _sum_notes : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _sum_different_pitches : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _used_pitches[12] : unknown := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _pitch_before[4] : unknown := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _too_many_double_notes : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _single_16th_on_1 : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _disallow_rhythm : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _redo : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _redo_counter : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 4 - 1
	_redo{unknown} := 0
	if((current_structure_part{unknown} = - 1) or (structure_array[current_structure_part{unknown}]{unknown} = i{unknown}))
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to ((2 * 7) * 4) - 1
	suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := 0
	suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 2]{unknown} := 100
	suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	end for
	_sum_breaks{unknown} := 0
	_sum_empty_beats{unknown} := 0
	_total_silence{unknown} := 0
	_sum_syncopations{unknown} := 0
	_syncopation_difference{unknown} := 0
	_syncopation_after_break{unknown} := 0
	_sum_notes{unknown} := 0
	_disallow_rhythm{unknown} := 0
	for _i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	sum_notes_bar[i{unknown}, _i{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end for
	_sum_different_pitches{unknown} := 0
	_single_16th_on_1{unknown} := 0
	for _i{unknown} := 0 to 11
	_used_pitches[_i{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1
	end for
	_too_many_double_notes{unknown} := 0
	_chord_offset{unknown} := ((search[structure_array{unknown}, i{unknown}] * 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4
	if(search[structure_array{unknown}, i{unknown}] # - 1)
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1
	if(suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 0)
	_next_pitch{unknown} := pitch.generate_next(_last_pitches[2]{unknown} * 1, _last_pitches[1]{unknown} * 1, _last_pitches[0]{unknown} * 1){UserDefined, None}
	if(_next_pitch{unknown} > 0)
	if(chords[(ii{unknown} + _chord_offset{unknown}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2), 0]{unknown} # - 1)
	_current_key.root{unknown} := chords[(ii{unknown} + _chord_offset{unknown}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2), 0]{unknown}
	_current_key.mode{unknown} := chords[(ii{unknown} + _chord_offset{unknown}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2), 1]{unknown}
	end if
	_next_note{unknown} := (modes[_current_key.mode{unknown}, (_next_pitch{unknown} - 1) mod 8]{unknown} + ((_next_pitch{unknown} / 8) * 12)) + 1
	if((((_next_note{unknown} - 1) + (((range.low{unknown} / 12) + _offset{unknown}) * 12)) + all_root_note_nums[_current_key.root{unknown}]{unknown}) < range.low{unknown})
	inc(_offset{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	if((((_next_note{unknown} - 1) + (((range.low{unknown} / 12) + _offset{unknown}) * 12)) + all_root_note_nums[_current_key.root{unknown}]{unknown}) > range.high{unknown})
	dec(_offset{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := ((_next_note{unknown} - 1) + (((range.low{unknown} / 12) + _offset{unknown}) * 12)) + all_root_note_nums[_current_key.root{unknown}]{unknown}
	_seed{unknown} := Rand(0, 1000){UserDefined, None}
	if(_seed{unknown} > sli_prefer_scale_notes{unknown})
	_seed{unknown} := Rand(- 1, 1){UserDefined, None}
	suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + _seed{unknown}
	end if
	else
	suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	if(ii{unknown} # 0)
	suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := 1
	end if
	end if
	array.cascade(_last_pitches{unknown}, _next_pitch{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	_failsafe_counter{unknown} := 0
	_next_rhythm{unknown} := rhythm.generate_next(_last_rhythms[2]{unknown} * 1, _last_rhythms[1]{unknown} * 1, _last_rhythms[0]{unknown} * 1){UserDefined, None}
	while((RHYTHM.LENGTHS[_next_rhythm{unknown}]{unknown} < (mnu_min_note_length{unknown} * int(tempo.internal_multiplier{unknown}){Builtin, None})) and (_failsafe_counter{unknown} <= 32)) 
	inc(_failsafe_counter{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	_next_rhythm{unknown} := rhythm.generate_next(_last_rhythms[2]{unknown} * 1, _last_rhythms[1]{unknown} * 1, _last_rhythms[0]{unknown} * 1){UserDefined, None}
	if(_failsafe_counter{unknown} = 32)
	_next_rhythm{unknown} := 4
	end if
	end while
	if(RHYTHM.LENGTHS[_next_rhythm{unknown}]{unknown} > 1)
	for iii{unknown} := 1 to RHYTHM.LENGTHS[_next_rhythm{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	suggestions[i{unknown}, clamp(ii{unknown} + iii{unknown}, 0, (2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4){UserDefined, None}, 0]{unknown} := 1
	suggestions[i{unknown}, clamp(ii{unknown} + iii{unknown}, 0, (2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4){UserDefined, None}, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	end for
	end if
	array.cascade(_last_rhythms{unknown}, _next_rhythm{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end for
	suggestions[i{unknown}, ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1, 0]{unknown} := 1
	suggestions[i{unknown}, ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	melody.quantize(suggestions{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1, ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1){UserDefined, None}
	melody.adapt_to_chords(0, suggestions{unknown}, i{unknown}, ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1, ((search[structure_array{unknown}, i{unknown}] * 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4){UserDefined, None}
	melody.remove_jumps(0, suggestions{unknown}, i{unknown}, ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 2){UserDefined, None}
	melody.put_in_range(suggestions{unknown}, i{unknown}, ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1){UserDefined, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1
	if(suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 0)
	_velocity_addition{unknown} := 0
	if((ii{unknown} mod 4) = 0)
	_velocity_addition{unknown} := _velocity_addition{unknown} + 5
	end if
	if(((ii{unknown} mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) = 0) or ((ii{unknown} mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) = (meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_beats_per_bar{unknown}]{unknown} - 1)))
	_velocity_addition{unknown} := _velocity_addition{unknown} + 5
	end if
	if((ii{unknown} mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) = 0)
	_velocity_addition{unknown} := _velocity_addition{unknown} + 5
	end if
	_seed{unknown} := Rand(- 5, 5){UserDefined, None}
	suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 2]{unknown} := clamp(_seed{unknown} + _velocity_addition{unknown}, - 127, 127){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	if(suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 1)
	inc(_note_len_counter{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	_note_len_counter{unknown} := 0
	_prev_pitch{unknown} := suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 1]{unknown}
	end if
	if(_note_len_counter{unknown} >= mnu_max_note_length{unknown})
	suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := 0
	suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := _prev_pitch{unknown}
	suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 2]{unknown} := 0
	_note_len_counter{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end for
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1
	if(suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 1]{unknown} = - 1)
	if((ii{unknown} mod 4) = 0)
	inc(_sum_empty_beats{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	if(suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 0)
	inc(_sum_breaks{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	_len{unknown} := note.get_length(suggestions{unknown}, i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1){UserDefined, None}
	_total_silence{unknown} := _total_silence{unknown} + _len{unknown}
	if(_len{unknown} >= (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4))
	_redo{unknown} := 1
	end if
	array.cascade(_pitch_before{unknown}, - 1){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	else
	if(suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 0)
	inc(_sum_notes{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	inc(sum_notes_bar[i{unknown}, ii{unknown} / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	_len{unknown} := note.get_length(suggestions{unknown}, i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1){UserDefined, None}
	if(((ii{unknown} mod 4) # 0) and ((((ii{unknown} + _len{unknown}) mod 4) # 0) or ((_pitch_before[0]{unknown} = - 1) and (_len{unknown} > 2))))
	inc(_sum_syncopations{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	if(_len{unknown} >= (_len_before{unknown} * 2))
	_syncopation_difference{unknown} := 1
	end if
	if(_pitch_before[0]{unknown} = - 1)
	_syncopation_after_break{unknown} := 1
	end if
	end if
	if((_len{unknown} = 1) and ((ii{unknown} mod 4) = 0))
	if(suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown} + 2, 0]{unknown} = 1)
	_single_16th_on_1{unknown} := 1
	end if
	end if
	if(search[_used_pitches{unknown}, suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 1]{unknown} mod 12] = - 1)
	inc(_sum_different_pitches{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	_used_pitches[search[_used_pitches{unknown}, - 1]]{unknown} := suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 1]{unknown} mod 12
	end if
	if((_len{unknown} = (_len_before{unknown} * 3)) and (((ii{unknown} - _len_before{unknown}) mod ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2)) = 0))
	_disallow_rhythm{unknown} := 1
	end if
	array.cascade(_pitch_before{unknown}, suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 1]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	int_buffer{unknown} := 1
	for _i{unknown} := 1 to num_elements[_pitch_before{unknown}] - 1
	if(_pitch_before[_i{unknown}]{unknown} # _pitch_before[_i{unknown} - 1]{unknown})
	int_buffer{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end for
	if(int_buffer{unknown} = 1)
	_too_many_double_notes{unknown} := 1
	end if
	_len_before{unknown} := _len{unknown}
	end if
	end if
	end for
	if((suggestions[i{unknown}, 0, 1]{unknown} = - 1) and (suggestions[i{unknown}, 1, 0]{unknown} = 0))
	_redo{unknown} := 1
	end if
	if(_total_silence{unknown} >= (((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) / 4))
	_redo{unknown} := 1
	end if
	if(((_sum_notes{unknown} < 3) or (_sum_different_pitches{unknown} < 3)) or (sum_notes_bar[i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} < 2))
	_redo{unknown} := 1
	end if
	for _i{unknown} := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(search[structure_array{unknown}, _i{unknown}] # - 1)
	for _ii{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	if(abs(sum_notes_bar[i{unknown}, _ii{unknown}]{unknown} - sum_notes_bar[_i{unknown}, _ii{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None} > 3)
	_redo{unknown} := 1
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end for
	if((((mnu_syncopation{unknown} = 1) and (_sum_syncopations{unknown} > 0)) or (suggestions[i{unknown}, 4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 1)) or ((mnu_syncopation{unknown} = 2) and (_sum_syncopations{unknown} <= 4)))
	_redo{unknown} := 1
	end if
	if(((_too_many_double_notes{unknown} = 1) or (_disallow_rhythm{unknown} = 1)) or (_single_16th_on_1{unknown} = 1))
	_redo{unknown} := 1
	end if
	if((_syncopation_difference{unknown} = 1) or (_syncopation_after_break{unknown} = 1))
	_redo{unknown} := 1
	end if
	_note_len_counter{unknown} := 0
	if(structure_array[0]{unknown} # i{unknown})
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1
	if((suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 0) and (suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 1]{unknown} = - 1))
	suggestions[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := 1
	end if
	end for
	end if
	if(_redo{unknown} = 1)
	if(_redo_counter{unknown} < 128)
	console.print("Suggestion " & i{unknown} & " redo"){UserDefined, None}
	dec(i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	inc(_redo_counter{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	wait(10){Builtin, None}
	else
	console.print(i{unknown} & " reached redo limit"){UserDefined, None}
	_redo_counter{unknown} := 0
	end if
	else
	_redo_counter{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 4 - 1
	end for
end function

function melody.quantize(array : unknown, subarray : unknown, start : unknown, max : unknown)
	for ii{unknown} := start{unknown} to max{unknown} - 1
	if((array[subarray{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 1]{unknown} = - 1) and ((ii{unknown} mod 4) = 0))
	if(array[subarray{unknown}, ii{unknown} - 1, 1]{unknown} # - 1)
	array[subarray{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := array[subarray{unknown}, ii{unknown} - 1, 1]{unknown}
	array[subarray{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := 0
	array[subarray{unknown}, ii{unknown} - 1, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	array[subarray{unknown}, ii{unknown} - 1, 0]{unknown} := 1
	else
	if(array[subarray{unknown}, ii{unknown} + 1, 1]{unknown} # - 1)
	array[subarray{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := array[subarray{unknown}, ii{unknown} + 1, 1]{unknown}
	array[subarray{unknown}, ii{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := 0
	array[subarray{unknown}, ii{unknown} + 1, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	array[subarray{unknown}, ii{unknown} + 1, 0]{unknown} := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function generate_melody
	declare _iterator : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _seed : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _is_in_a : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _is_in_b : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _first_appearance : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _position : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _len : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 8 - 1
	if((current_structure_part{unknown} = - 1) or (structure_array[current_structure_part{unknown}]{unknown} = structure_array[i{unknown} / 2]{unknown}))
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to beats_per_bar{unknown} - 1
	melody_rates[i{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} := 4
	end for
	end if
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1
	for _i{unknown} := 0 to 4 - 1
	if((current_structure_part{unknown} = - 1) or (((structure_array[current_structure_part{unknown}]{unknown} = _i{unknown}) and (structure_array[i{unknown} / ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4)]{unknown} = _i{unknown})) and (((i{unknown} / ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4)) = current_structure_part{unknown}) or (btn_regenerate_theme{unknown} = 1))))
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := suggestions[structure_array[i{unknown} / ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4)]{unknown}, i{unknown} mod ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4), 0]{unknown}
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := suggestions[structure_array[i{unknown} / ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4)]{unknown}, i{unknown} mod ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4), 1]{unknown}
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 2]{unknown} := suggestions[structure_array[i{unknown} / ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4)]{unknown}, i{unknown} mod ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4), 2]{unknown}
	_first_appearance{unknown} := search[structure_array{unknown}, structure_array[i{unknown} / ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4)]{unknown}]
	if(_first_appearance{unknown} = (i{unknown} / ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4)))
	if(((melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 0) and ((i{unknown} mod 4) # 0)) and (int(tempo.internal_multiplier{unknown}){Builtin, None} = 1))
	_seed{unknown} := Rand(0, 99){UserDefined, None}
	if(sli_triplets{unknown} > _seed{unknown})
	melody_rates[i{unknown} / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), (i{unknown} mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown} := 3
	end if
	end if
	else
	_position{unknown} := (_first_appearance{unknown} * ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4)) + (i{unknown} mod ((2 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4))
	melody_rates[i{unknown} / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), (i{unknown} mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown} := melody_rates[_position{unknown} / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), (_position{unknown} mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown}
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end for
	if(int(tempo.internal_multiplier{unknown}){Builtin, None} = 1)
	for i{unknown} := 0 to ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1
	if((((i{unknown} mod 4) = 0) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 0)) and (i{unknown} < (((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 4)))
	if((((beats_per_bar{unknown} = 4) and ((((i{unknown} / 4) mod beats_per_bar{unknown}) = 0) or (((i{unknown} / 4) mod beats_per_bar{unknown}) = 2))) or ((beats_per_bar{unknown} = 3) and (((i{unknown} / 4) mod beats_per_bar{unknown}) = 0))) or ((beats_per_bar{unknown} = 5) and ((((i{unknown} / 4) mod beats_per_bar{unknown}) = 0) or (((i{unknown} / 4) mod beats_per_bar{unknown}) = 3))))
	if((((melody_rates[i{unknown} / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), (i{unknown} mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown} = 3) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 1, 0]{unknown} = 1)) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 2, 0]{unknown} = 0)) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 4, 0]{unknown} = 0))
	if((((melody_rates[(i{unknown} + 4) / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), ((i{unknown} + 4) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown} = 4) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 1, 0]{unknown} = 1)) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 2, 0]{unknown} = 1)) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 3, 0]{unknown} = 1))
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 1, 0]{unknown} := 0
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 1, 1]{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 4, 1]{unknown}
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 1, 2]{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 4, 2]{unknown}
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 4, 0]{unknown} := 1
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 4, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 4, 2]{unknown} := 0
	melody_rates[(i{unknown} + 4) / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), ((i{unknown} + 4) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown} := 3
	end if
	end if
	if(((((melody_rates[i{unknown} / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), (i{unknown} mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown} = 4) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 1, 0]{unknown} = 1)) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 2, 0]{unknown} = 1)) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 3, 0]{unknown} = 1)) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 4, 0]{unknown} = 0))
	if(((melody_rates[(i{unknown} + 4) / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), ((i{unknown} + 4) mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown} = 3) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 1, 0]{unknown} = 1)) and (melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 2, 0]{unknown} = 0))
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 2, 0]{unknown} := 0
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 2, 1]{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 4, 1]{unknown}
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 2, 2]{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 4, 2]{unknown}
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 4, 0]{unknown} := 1
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 4, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown} + 4, 2]{unknown} := 0
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 1, 0]{unknown} := 0
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 1, 1]{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 2, 1]{unknown}
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 1, 2]{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 2, 2]{unknown}
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 2, 0]{unknown} := 1
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 2, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (i{unknown} + 4) + 2, 2]{unknown} := 0
	melody_rates[i{unknown} / (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4), (i{unknown} mod (beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4)) / 4]{unknown} := 3
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end if
	if(current_structure_part{unknown} = - 1)
	melody.adapt_to_chords(0, melody{unknown}, current_segment{unknown}, ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	melody.remove_jumps(0, melody{unknown}, current_segment{unknown}, ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 2){UserDefined, None}
	call melody.make_mid_ending{UserDefined, None}
	call melody.make_ending{UserDefined, None}
	else
	for _iterator{unknown} := 0 to (8 / 2) - 1
	for _i{unknown} := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(((structure_array[current_structure_part{unknown}]{unknown} = _i{unknown}) and (structure_array[_iterator{unknown}]{unknown} = _i{unknown})) and (((_iterator{unknown} = current_structure_part{unknown}) or (current_structure_part{unknown} = - 1)) or (btn_regenerate_theme{unknown} = 1)))
	melody.adapt_to_chords((_iterator{unknown} * 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}, melody{unknown}, current_segment{unknown}, ((((_iterator{unknown} + 1) * 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1, 0){UserDefined, None}
	if(_iterator{unknown} = 1)
	call melody.make_mid_ending{UserDefined, None}
	else
	if(_iterator{unknown} = 3)
	call melody.make_ending{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	melody.remove_jumps((_iterator{unknown} * 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}, melody{unknown}, current_segment{unknown}, ((((_iterator{unknown} + 1) * 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 2){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end if
	melody.put_in_range(melody{unknown}, current_segment{unknown}, ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1){UserDefined, None}
	call empty_unused_values{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_export.update{UserDefined, None}
end function

function melody.adapt_to_chords(start : unknown, array : unknown, subarray : unknown, max : unknown, chord_offset : unknown)
	declare _root_pos : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _chord_pos : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _current_key.root : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _current_key.mode : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _current_key.tones : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _chord_hit : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _key_by_root : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _is_in_root : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _is_out_of_scale : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _random_dir : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _seed : unknown := Rand(0, 1000){UserDefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
	declare _last_pitch : unknown := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _last_chord.root : unknown := all_root_note_nums[root_key[0]{unknown}]{unknown} {Reuses: 0}
	declare _last_chord.mode : unknown := all_root_note_nums[root_key[1]{unknown}]{unknown} {Reuses: 0}
	declare _last_chord.tones : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _next_chord.mode : unknown := all_root_note_nums[root_key[1]{unknown}]{unknown} {Reuses: 0}
	declare _in_key : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _note_len : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _previously_dissonant : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _is_dissonant : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _jump_to_next_note : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _resolution_step : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _dissonances_in_theme : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	_root_pos{unknown} := Co5.get_pos(all_root_note_nums[mnu_root_key.key{unknown}]{unknown}, mnu_root_key.mode{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	for _i{unknown} := start{unknown} * 4 to max{unknown}
	if((array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} # - 1) and (array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 0))
	_chord_hit{unknown} := 0
	_chord_pos{unknown} := - 1
	_key_by_root{unknown} := 0
	_note_len{unknown} := note.get_length(array{unknown}, subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, max{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	_current_key.root{unknown} := chords[(_i{unknown} + chord_offset{unknown}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2), 0]{unknown}
	_current_key.mode{unknown} := chords[(_i{unknown} + chord_offset{unknown}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2), 1]{unknown}
	_current_key.tones{unknown} := chords[(_i{unknown} + chord_offset{unknown}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2), 3]{unknown}
	if((((_i{unknown} + chord_offset{unknown}) mod ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2)) = 0) and (_current_key.root{unknown} # - 1))
	_chord_hit{unknown} := 1
	end if
	if(_current_key.root{unknown} = - 1)
	_current_key.root{unknown} := _last_chord.root{unknown}
	_current_key.mode{unknown} := _last_chord.mode{unknown}
	_current_key.tones{unknown} := _last_chord.tones{unknown}
	end if
	_last_chord.root{unknown} := _current_key.root{unknown}
	_last_chord.mode{unknown} := _current_key.mode{unknown}
	_last_chord.tones{unknown} := _current_key.tones{unknown}
	_chord_pos{unknown} := Co5.get_pos(_current_key.root{unknown}, _current_key.mode{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	if((((_chord_pos{unknown} = _root_pos{unknown}) or (((_chord_pos{unknown} + 1) mod 12) = _root_pos{unknown})) or (((_chord_pos{unknown} - 1) mod 12) = _root_pos{unknown})) and (_chord_pos{unknown} # - 1))
	_key_by_root{unknown} := 1
	end if
	_in_key{unknown} := 0
	_is_out_of_scale{unknown} := 0
	_seed{unknown} := Rand(0, 1000){UserDefined, None}
	if(((_seed{unknown} > sli_prefer_scale_notes{unknown}) and (_previously_dissonant{unknown} = 0)) and (_note_len{unknown} <= 8))
	_is_out_of_scale{unknown} := 1
	end if
	_seed{unknown} := Rand(0, 1){UserDefined, None}
	if(_seed{unknown} = 1)
	_random_dir{unknown} := 1
	else
	_random_dir{unknown} := - 1
	end if
	error.counter{unknown} := 0
	while(_in_key{unknown} = 0) 
	inc(error.counter{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 7
	_is_dissonant{unknown} := 1
	_jump_to_next_note{unknown} := 0
	_resolution_step{unknown} := 0
	for iii{unknown} := 0 to 5
	if(ii{unknown} = chord.types[_current_key.tones{unknown}, iii{unknown} mod 7]{unknown})
	_is_dissonant{unknown} := 0
	_previously_dissonant{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end for
	if(_is_dissonant{unknown} = 1)
	_seed{unknown} := Rand(0, 1000){UserDefined, None}
	if((((((_seed{unknown} < sli_prefer_chord_tones{unknown}) or (_note_len{unknown} > 4)) or (_previously_dissonant{unknown} = 1)) or (abs(_last_pitch{unknown} - array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}){Builtin, None} > 2)) or (_chord_hit{unknown} = 1)) or (_dissonances_in_theme{unknown} > ((sli_prefer_chord_tones{unknown} + 1000) / 100)))
	_jump_to_next_note{unknown} := 1
	else
	_previously_dissonant{unknown} := 1
	_resolution_step{unknown} := - (modes[_current_key.mode{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} - modes[_current_key.mode{unknown}, (ii{unknown} + 1) mod 8]{unknown})
	if(abs(- (modes[_current_key.mode{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} - modes[_current_key.mode{unknown}, (ii{unknown} - 1) mod 8]{unknown})){Builtin, None} <= abs(_resolution_step{unknown}){Builtin, None})
	_resolution_step{unknown} := - (modes[_current_key.mode{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown} - modes[_current_key.mode{unknown}, (ii{unknown} - 1) mod 8]{unknown})
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(_is_out_of_scale{unknown} = 1)
	_jump_to_next_note{unknown} := 0
	end if
	if(_jump_to_next_note{unknown} = 0)
	if(((((_current_key.root{unknown} + modes[_current_key.mode{unknown}, ii{unknown}]{unknown}) mod 12) = (array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} mod 12)) and (array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} # _last_pitch{unknown})) or (_is_out_of_scale{unknown} = 1))
	_is_in_root{unknown} := 0
	if((((abs(_last_pitch{unknown} - array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}){Builtin, None} <= sli_max_interval{unknown}) or (sli_max_interval{unknown} > 12)) or (_last_pitch{unknown} = - 1)) and (_is_out_of_scale{unknown} = 0))
	_in_key{unknown} := 1
	_previously_dissonant{unknown} := 0
	if(_resolution_step{unknown} # 0)
	inc(_dissonances_in_theme{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	_next_chord.mode{unknown} := - 1
	if((((_i{unknown} + _note_len{unknown}) + chord_offset{unknown}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2)) < (8 * 2))
	_next_chord.mode{unknown} := chords[((_i{unknown} + _note_len{unknown}) + chord_offset{unknown}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2), 1]{unknown}
	end if
	if(_next_chord.mode{unknown} = - 1)
	_next_chord.mode{unknown} := _current_key.mode{unknown}
	end if
	array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown} + _note_len{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + _resolution_step{unknown}
	if(((abs(_resolution_step{unknown}){Builtin, None} > 1) and (_last_pitch{unknown} # (array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + _resolution_step{unknown}))) and (mnu_chromatic_approach{unknown} -> value = 1))
	if(((((_i{unknown} + chord_offset{unknown}) + _note_len{unknown}) mod ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2)) = 0) and (chords[((_i{unknown} + chord_offset{unknown}) + _note_len{unknown}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2), 0]{unknown} # - 1))
	int_buffer{unknown} := note.get_length(array{unknown}, subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown} + _note_len{unknown}, max{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	if(int_buffer{unknown} >= 4)
	array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + (_resolution_step{unknown} / abs(_resolution_step{unknown}){Builtin, None})
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(_is_out_of_scale{unknown} = 1)
	_in_key{unknown} := 1
	_seed{unknown} := Rand(0, 1000){UserDefined, None}
	if(_seed{unknown} > sli_prefer_scale_notes{unknown})
	_previously_dissonant{unknown} := 1
	end if
	if(array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} > array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown} + _note_len{unknown}, 1]{unknown})
	array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown} + _note_len{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} - 1
	else
	array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown} + _note_len{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + 1
	end if
	end if
	ii{unknown} := 8
	end if
	end if
	end for
	if(_in_key{unknown} = 0)
	array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + _random_dir{unknown}
	if((abs(_last_pitch{unknown} - array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}){Builtin, None} >= sli_max_interval{unknown}) and (_last_pitch{unknown} # - 1))
	if(array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} > _last_pitch{unknown})
	_random_dir{unknown} := - 1
	else
	if(array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} < _last_pitch{unknown})
	_random_dir{unknown} := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(error.counter{unknown} > 28)
	_in_key{unknown} := 1
	console.print("Error in " & subarray{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	message("***** Error *****"){Builtin, None}
	message(subarray{unknown} & " | " & _i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	message(array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end while
	_last_pitch{unknown} := array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}
	end if
	end for
end function

function melody.put_in_range(array : unknown, subarray : unknown, max : unknown)
	message("exec range"){Builtin, None}
	declare _error_protection : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for _i{unknown} := 0 to max{unknown}
	_error_protection{unknown} := 8
	if((array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} # - 1) and ((array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} < range.low{unknown}) or (array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} > range.high{unknown})))
	while((array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} < range.low{unknown}) and (_error_protection{unknown} > 0)) 
	array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + 12
	message("range pitched up " & _i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	dec(_error_protection{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	while((array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} > range.high{unknown}) and (_error_protection{unknown} > 0)) 
	array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} - 12
	message("range pitched down " & _i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	dec(_error_protection{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	if(_error_protection{unknown} < 1)
	message("error in array[" & i{unknown} & " | " & _i{unknown} & "]"){Builtin, None}
	console.print("error in array[" & i{unknown} & " | " & _i{unknown} & "]"){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function melody.remove_jumps(start : unknown, array : unknown, subarray : unknown, max : unknown)
	declare _prev_pitch : unknown := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _dist : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _seed : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for _i{unknown} := start{unknown} * 4 to max{unknown}
	if((array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} # - 1) and (sli_max_interval{unknown} < 13))
	_dist{unknown} := array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} - _prev_pitch{unknown}
	if((abs(_dist{unknown}){Builtin, None} > sli_max_interval{unknown}) and (_prev_pitch{unknown} # - 1))
	if((_dist{unknown} < 0) and (abs((array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + 12) - _prev_pitch{unknown}){Builtin, None} < _dist{unknown}))
	array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} + 12
	else
	if(abs((array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} - 12) - _prev_pitch{unknown}){Builtin, None} < _dist{unknown})
	array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} - 12
	end if
	end if
	_dist{unknown} := array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} - _prev_pitch{unknown}
	if(abs(_dist{unknown}){Builtin, None} > sli_max_interval{unknown})
	_seed{unknown} := 0
	if(_seed{unknown} <= sli_double_notes{unknown})
	array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := _prev_pitch{unknown}
	else
	array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	_prev_pitch{unknown} := array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}
	end if
	end for
end function

function melody.make_ending
	declare _offset : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _offset_breaker : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _octified : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _dist : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _note_before : unknown := 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _pitch_before : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _oct_offset : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	_offset_breaker{unknown} := 0
	for i{unknown} := 0 to beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4
	if(melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} # - 1)
	if(i{unknown} < 7)
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := 1
	else
	while((chords[(((((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}) - _offset{unknown}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2), 0]{unknown} = - 1) and (_offset_breaker{unknown} = 0)) 
	inc(_offset{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	if((((((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}) - _offset{unknown}) < 0)
	_offset_breaker{unknown} := 1
	end if
	end while
	if(_offset_breaker{unknown} = 0)
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := ((range.low{unknown} / 12) * 12) + chords[(((((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}) - _offset{unknown}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2), 0]{unknown}
	while(melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}) - _note_before{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 1) 
	inc(_note_before{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	_oct_offset{unknown} := 0
	_pitch_before{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}) - _note_before{unknown}, 1]{unknown}
	if((_pitch_before{unknown} - melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}) > 19)
	_oct_offset{unknown} := 12
	end if
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := (_pitch_before{unknown} - ((_pitch_before{unknown} - melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}) mod 12)) + _oct_offset{unknown}
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 2]{unknown} := 5
	if(chords[(2 * 8) - 1, 0]{unknown} # - 1)
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 8, 0]{unknown} := 0
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 8, 1]{unknown} := (((range.low{unknown} / 12) * 12) + chords[(2 * 8) - 1, 0]{unknown}) + modes[chords[2 * (8 / 2), 1]{unknown}, 0]{unknown}
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 8, 1]{unknown} := (_pitch_before{unknown} - ((_pitch_before{unknown} - melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 8, 1]{unknown}) mod 12)) + _oct_offset{unknown}
	end if
	if(melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} # _pitch_before{unknown})
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end if
	i{unknown} := beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function melody.make_mid_ending
	declare _offset : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _offset_breaker : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _note_before : unknown := 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _pitch_before : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _oct_offset : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare rand_mid_ending_note : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	_offset_breaker{unknown} := 0
	for i{unknown} := 0 to beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4
	if(melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} # - 1)
	if(i{unknown} < 7)
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := 1
	else
	while(((chords[((((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}) - _offset{unknown}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2), 0]{unknown} = - 1) or (_offset{unknown} > ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2))) and (_offset_breaker{unknown} = 0)) 
	inc(_offset{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	if(((((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}) - _offset{unknown}) < 0)
	_offset_breaker{unknown} := 1
	end if
	end while
	if(_offset_breaker{unknown} = 0)
	rand_mid_ending_note{unknown} := Rand(0, 2){UserDefined, None}
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := (((range.low{unknown} / 12) * 12) + chords[((((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}) - _offset{unknown}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2), 0]{unknown}) + modes[chords[((((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}) - _offset{unknown}) / ((4 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) / 2), 1]{unknown}, rand_mid_ending_note{unknown} * 2]{unknown}
	while(melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}) - _note_before{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 1) 
	inc(_note_before{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	_pitch_before{unknown} := melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}) - _note_before{unknown}, 1]{unknown}
	_oct_offset{unknown} := 0
	if((_pitch_before{unknown} - melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}) > 19)
	_oct_offset{unknown} := 12
	end if
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := (_pitch_before{unknown} - ((_pitch_before{unknown} - melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 1]{unknown}) mod 12)) + _oct_offset{unknown}
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 2]{unknown} := 5
	if(chords[(2 * (8 / 2)) - 1, 0]{unknown} # - 1)
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 8, 0]{unknown} := 0
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 8, 1]{unknown} := (((range.low{unknown} / 12) * 12) + chords[(2 * (8 / 2)) - 1, 0]{unknown}) + modes[chords[(2 * (8 / 2)) - 1, 1]{unknown}, rand_mid_ending_note{unknown} * 2]{unknown}
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 8, 1]{unknown} := (_pitch_before{unknown} - ((_pitch_before{unknown} - melody[current_segment{unknown}, (((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 8, 1]{unknown}) mod 12)) + _oct_offset{unknown}
	end if
	if(melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} # _pitch_before{unknown})
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, ((((8 / 2) * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1) - i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end if
	i{unknown} := beats_per_bar{unknown} * 4
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function melody.remove_short_notes(start : unknown, array : unknown, subarray : unknown, max : unknown)
	declare _len : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for _i{unknown} := start{unknown} * 4 to max{unknown}
	if(array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} # - 1)
	_len{unknown} := note.get_length(array{unknown}, subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown}, max{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	if(_len{unknown} < mnu_min_note_length{unknown})
	array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown} + _len{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := 1
	array[subarray{unknown}, _i{unknown} + _len{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function note.get_length(array : unknown, subarray : unknown, note : unknown, max_notes : unknown) -> result : unknown
	result{unknown} := 0
	declare _iterator : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	if(array[subarray{unknown}, note{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 0)
	while((result{unknown} = 0) and ((note{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}) <= max_notes{unknown})) 
	inc(_iterator{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	if(array[subarray{unknown}, note{unknown} + _iterator{unknown}, 0]{unknown} = 0)
	result{unknown} := _iterator{unknown}
	end if
	end while
	result{unknown} := _iterator{unknown}
	else
	message("invalid note value to get length from. " & subarray{unknown} & " - " & note{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function octify(note : unknown) -> result : unknown
	if(note{unknown} = 0)
	result{unknown} := 0
	else
	result{unknown} := octified_root_note_nums[note{unknown}]{unknown} + 1
	end if
end function

function mtx.normalize(mtx : unknown, dimension : unknown)
	declare _total : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i0{unknown} := 0 to dimension{unknown} - 1
	for i1{unknown} := 0 to dimension{unknown} - 1
	for i2{unknown} := 0 to dimension{unknown} - 1
	_total{unknown} := 0
	for i3{unknown} := 0 to dimension{unknown} - 1
	_total{unknown} := _total{unknown} + mtx[i0{unknown}, i1{unknown}, i2{unknown}, i3{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	if(_total{unknown} # 0)
	for i3{unknown} := 0 to dimension{unknown} - 1
	mtx[i0{unknown}, i1{unknown}, i2{unknown}, i3{unknown}]{unknown} := real_to_int(round(int_to_real(mtx[i0{unknown}, i1{unknown}, i2{unknown}, i3{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None} / (int_to_real(_total{unknown}){Builtin, None} / 1000)){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end for
end function

function mtx.combine(dest : unknown, source : unknown, mix : unknown, dimension : unknown)
	for i0{unknown} := 0 to dimension{unknown} - 1
	for i1{unknown} := 0 to dimension{unknown} - 1
	for i2{unknown} := 0 to dimension{unknown} - 1
	for i3{unknown} := 0 to dimension{unknown} - 1
	dest[i0{unknown}, i1{unknown}, i2{unknown}, i3{unknown}]{unknown} := ((dest[i0{unknown}, i1{unknown}, i2{unknown}, i3{unknown}]{unknown} * (1000 - mix{unknown})) + (source[i0{unknown}, i1{unknown}, i2{unknown}, i3{unknown}]{unknown} * mix{unknown})) / 1000
	end for
	end for
	end for
	end for
	mtx.normalize(dest{unknown}, dimension{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
end function

function array.cascade(array : unknown, newest_value : unknown)
	declare _iterator : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for _iterator{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[array{unknown}] - 2
	array[(num_elements[array{unknown}] - 1) - _iterator{unknown}]{unknown} := array[(num_elements[array{unknown}] - 2) - _iterator{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	array[0]{unknown} := newest_value{unknown}
end function

function array.cascade_inv(array : unknown, newest_value : unknown)
	declare _iterator : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for _iterator{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[array{unknown}] - 2
	array[_iterator{unknown}]{unknown} := array[_iterator{unknown} + 1]{unknown}
	end for
	array[num_elements[array{unknown}] - 1]{unknown} := newest_value{unknown}
end function

function generate_settings.load_preset
	wait_async(load_array_str(_rhythm.transition_matrix{unknown}, resources_path{string} & rtmx.file_name[generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 8]{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	message(load_array_str(_pitch.transition_matrix{unknown}, resources_path{string} & ptmx.file_name[generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 8]{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	mnu_rtmx_selection{unknown} -> value := generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 8]{unknown}
	message("loaded rtmx: " & resources_path{string} & rtmx.file_name[generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 8]{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(load_array_str(_pitch.transition_matrix{unknown}, resources_path{string} & ptmx.file_name[generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 9]{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	message(load_array_str(_pitch.transition_matrix{unknown}, resources_path{string} & ptmx.file_name[generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 9]{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	mnu_ptmx_selection{unknown} -> value := generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 9]{unknown}
	message("loaded ptmx: " & resources_path{string} & ptmx.file_name[generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 9]{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	sli_prefer_chord_tones{unknown} := generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 0]{unknown}
	sli_prefer_scale_notes{unknown} := generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 11]{unknown}
	sli_max_interval{unknown} := generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 1]{unknown}
	sli_double_notes{unknown} := generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 2]{unknown}
	mnu_min_note_length{unknown} := generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 3]{unknown}
	mnu_max_note_length{unknown} := generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 4]{unknown}
	mnu_syncopation{unknown} := generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 5]{unknown}
	sli_triplets{unknown} := generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 6]{unknown}
	mnu_chromatic_approach{unknown} := generate_settings.presets[generate_settings.current_preset{unknown}, 10]{unknown}
end function

function generate_settings.add_preset(id : unknown, name : unknown, rtmx : unknown, ptmx : unknown, chord_tones : unknown, scale_notes : unknown, max_interval : unknown, repeat_notes : unknown, min_length : unknown, max_length : unknown, syncopation : unknown, triplets : unknown, chromatic_approach : unknown)
	generate_settings.preset_names[id{unknown}]{unknown} := name{unknown}
	generate_settings.presets[id{unknown}, 8]{unknown} := rtmx{unknown}
	generate_settings.presets[id{unknown}, 9]{unknown} := ptmx{unknown}
	generate_settings.presets[id{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := chord_tones{unknown}
	generate_settings.presets[id{unknown}, 11]{unknown} := scale_notes{unknown}
	generate_settings.presets[id{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := max_interval{unknown}
	generate_settings.presets[id{unknown}, 2]{unknown} := repeat_notes{unknown}
	generate_settings.presets[id{unknown}, 3]{unknown} := min_length{unknown}
	generate_settings.presets[id{unknown}, 4]{unknown} := max_length{unknown}
	generate_settings.presets[id{unknown}, 5]{unknown} := syncopation{unknown}
	generate_settings.presets[id{unknown}, 6]{unknown} := triplets{unknown}
	generate_settings.presets[id{unknown}, 10]{unknown} := chromatic_approach{unknown}
end function

function generate_settings.open
	declare ani_id2 : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	btn_open_generate_settings{unknown} := 1
	ani_id2{unknown} := animation.position.start(generate_settings_display{unknown}, generate_settings_display{unknown} -> x, btn_open_generate_settings{unknown} -> y, generate_settings_display{unknown} -> x, btn_open_generate_settings{unknown} -> y + 30, 5, 3){UserDefined, None}
	wait(50 * 1000){Builtin, None}
	generate_settings_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_generate_settings.backdrop{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
end function

function generate_settings.close
	declare ani_id2 : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	btn_open_generate_settings{unknown} := 0
	if(generate_settings_display{unknown} -> hide # HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown})
	ani_id2{unknown} := animation.position.start(generate_settings_display{unknown}, generate_settings_display{unknown} -> x, btn_open_generate_settings{unknown} -> y + 30, generate_settings_display{unknown} -> x, btn_open_generate_settings{unknown} -> y, 5, 2){UserDefined, None}
	wait((250 * 1000) + 1){Builtin, None}
	end if
	animation.abort(ani_id2{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	generate_settings_display{unknown} -> y := (btn_open_generate_settings{unknown} -> y - 200) - 10
	generate_settings_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_generate_settings.backdrop{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
end function

end function

	info_box{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	end if
end function

	info_box{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
