function alert_box.open
	message("show alert box"){Builtin, None}
	alert_box{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
end function

	alert_box{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
end function

function meter.update
	host_manager.beats_per_bar_new{unknown} := beats_per_bar{unknown}
	host_manager.internal_multiplier_new{unknown} := tempo.internal_multiplier{unknown}
	if(mnu_beats_per_bar{unknown} # 99)
	host_manager.beats_per_bar_new{unknown} := meters.beats[mnu_beats_per_bar{unknown}]{unknown}
	host_manager.internal_multiplier_new{unknown} := meters.multiplier[mnu_beats_per_bar{unknown}]{unknown}
	end if
	if((host_manager.beats_per_bar_new{unknown} # beats_per_bar{unknown}) or (host_manager.internal_multiplier_new{unknown} # tempo.internal_multiplier{unknown}))
	if(melody.exists{unknown} = 1)
	if(global_vars.array[1]{unknown} = 1)
	alert_box.open{UserDefined, None}
	else
	beats_per_bar{unknown} := host_manager.beats_per_bar_new{unknown}
	tempo.internal_multiplier{unknown} := host_manager.internal_multiplier_new{unknown}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to ((8 * 7) * 4) - 1
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := - 1
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 2]{unknown} := 0
	melody[current_segment{unknown}, i{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := 0
	end for
	melody.exists{unknown} := 0
	call undo.flush{UserDefined, None}
	call tempo.update{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_edit_display.update_allround{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_main_display.update_bars{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_main_display.update_notes{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_edit_display.update_bars{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	else
	beats_per_bar{unknown} := host_manager.beats_per_bar_new{unknown}
	tempo.internal_multiplier{unknown} := host_manager.internal_multiplier_new{unknown}
	call undo.flush{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_edit_display.update_allround{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_main_display.update_bars{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_main_display.update_notes{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_edit_display.update_bars{UserDefined, None}
	mnu_beats_per_bar{unknown} := search[meters.beats{unknown}, beats_per_bar{unknown}]
	call tempo.update{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
end function

function tempo.update
	real_buffer{unknown} := tempo{unknown}
	tempo{unknown} := int_to_real(ms_to_ticks(60000000){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None} / 960
	midi_steps{unknown} := (1000 / ((tempo{unknown} * tempo.internal_multiplier{unknown}) / 60)) / int_to_real(4){Builtin, None}
	if(play_pos{unknown} # 0)
	play_pos{unknown} := int(round(real(play_pos{unknown}){Builtin, None} * (real_buffer{unknown} / tempo{unknown})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	end if
end function

function closest_bass_note(root : unknown, bass : unknown)
	return ((root{unknown} - ((root{unknown} mod 12) - bass{unknown})) - (12 * (signbit((root{unknown} mod 12) - bass{unknown}){Builtin, None} + eq(root{unknown} mod 12, bass{unknown}){UserDefined, None})))
end function

function legato.stop_all
	declare _iter : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _inst.id : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for _iter{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	_inst.id{unknown} := slot.loaded_sound[_iter{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(_inst.id{unknown} # - 1)
	if(instrument.type[_inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} = 2)
	legato_release(_iter{unknown}, instrument.last_played_note[_iter{unknown}]{unknown}, none{unknown}, leg.note_id[_iter{unknown}]{unknown}, leg.release_id{unknown}, instrument.start_group[_inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.dynamic_layers[_inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.rr_nums[_inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.trans_groups[_inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	else
	if(instrument.type[_inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	message("triggered " & - 1 & " w/ " & 0){Builtin, None}
	for inst.slot{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	inst.id{unknown} := slot.loaded_sound[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(inst.id{unknown} # - 1)
	instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} := (instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} + 1) mod instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}
	if((instrument.type[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} = 0) and (((with_lookahead{unknown} = 0) and (lookahead[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)) or (((lookahead_slot{unknown} = inst.slot{unknown}) and (with_lookahead{unknown} = 1)) and (lookahead[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} > 0))))
	if(- 1 > - 1)
	if((sustain.note_ids[inst.slot{unknown}, - 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1) and (instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1))
	note_off(sustain.note_ids[inst.slot{unknown}, instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	one_shot(inst.slot{unknown}, - 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, none{unknown}, 0, sustain.note_ids[inst.slot{unknown}, - 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.start_group[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}, - 1){UserDefined, None}
	if(btn_octave_doubling[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} -> value = 1)
	one_shot(inst.slot{unknown}, (- 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}) + 12, none{unknown}, 0, sustain.note_ids[inst.slot{unknown}, (- 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}) + 12]{unknown}, instrument.start_group[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}, - 1){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	else

	leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := play_note(- 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, clamp(0, 1, 127){UserDefined, None}, sus_s_start{unknown}, - 1){Builtin, None}
	redirect_output(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{unknown}, inst.slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{unknown}, 150000, 0){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{unknown}, DEFAULT_VAL.sus_fadeIn_time{unknown}, 2){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	for leg.i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 1, leg.i{unknown} + sus_group[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for leg.i{unknown} := 0 to (instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} * instrument.sustain_fx[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}) - 1
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 1, leg.i{unknown} + sus_fx_group[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	end if
	else
	if(1 = 1)
	last_note[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	is_attack[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1
	attack_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := play_note(- 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, min(clamp(0, CC[101]{unknown} - 20, CC[101]{unknown} + 20){UserDefined, None}, 127){UserDefined, None}, 0, 0){Builtin, None}
	redirect_output(attack_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{unknown}, inst.slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(attack_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(attack_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 1, atk_group[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} + instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} := (instrument.rr_cycle[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} + 1) mod instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}
	is_attack[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := ne(1){UserDefined, None}
	if(is_attack[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := play_note(- 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, 69, 250000, - 1){Builtin, None}
	redirect_output(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{unknown}, inst.slot{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	for leg.i{unknown} := 0 to instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	set_event_par_arr(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 1, atk_sus_group[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} + leg.i{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	end if
	else
	note_off(leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	leg.old_note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	last_transition[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := transition_id{unknown}
	last_note[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	none{unknown} := - 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	instrument.trigger_transition[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := 1
	else
	slot.triggered_lookahead[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1 + slot.note_offset[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	else
	if(with_lookahead{unknown} = 0)
	legato_release(inst.slot{unknown}, instrument.last_played_note[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, none{unknown}, leg.note_id[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown}, leg.release_id{unknown}, instrument.start_group[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.dynamic_layers[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.rr_nums[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}, instrument.trans_groups[inst.id{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	instrument.trigger_transition[inst.slot{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
	else
	if(instrument.type[_inst.id{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	note_off(sustain.note_ids[0, 0]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	message("triggered note off"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	instrument.last_played_note[_iter{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1
	last_note[_iter{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1
	instrument.trigger_transition[_iter{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end if
	end for
end function

function instrument.load(slot_id : unknown, id : unknown)
	declare _show_delay_comp : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare _empty_slot : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	slot.loaded_sound[slot_id{unknown}]{unknown} := id{unknown}
	message("load inst " & id{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	if(id{unknown} # - 1)
	btn_slot[slot_id{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := instrument.short_names[id{unknown}]{unknown}
	slot.delay[slot_id{unknown}]{unknown} := instrument.attack_delay_time[id{unknown}]{unknown}
	message("loaded delay: " & instrument.attack_delay_time[id{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	message("loaded range: " & instrument.range_low[id{unknown}]{unknown} & " - " & instrument.range_high[id{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	btn_slot[slot_id{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := "None"
	slot.delay[slot_id{unknown}]{unknown} := 0
	end if
	highest_delay{unknown} := 0
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	if(slot.delay[i{unknown}]{unknown} > highest_delay{unknown})
	highest_delay{unknown} := slot.delay[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	update_purge{UserDefined, None}
	call update_range{UserDefined, None}
	call order_slots{UserDefined, None}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	lookahead[i{unknown}]{unknown} := slot.delay[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	end for
	lbl_attack_delay_time[slot_id{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := highest_delay{unknown} - slot.delay[slot_id{unknown}]{unknown}
	loaded_legato{unknown} := 0
	for _i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	if(slot.loaded_sound[_i{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[_i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} = 2)
	if(_empty_slot{unknown} = 0)
	_show_delay_comp{unknown} := 1
	end if
	loaded_legato{unknown} := 1
	end if
	else
	_show_delay_comp{unknown} := 0
	_empty_slot{unknown} := 1
	end if
	end for
	if(_show_delay_comp{unknown} = 1)
	if(global_vars.array[0]{unknown} = 1)
	btn_delay_compensation{unknown} -> value := 1
	else
	if(global_vars.array[0]{unknown} = 0)
	btn_delay_compensation{unknown} -> value := 0
	else
	call info_box.open{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	end if
	else
	call info_box.close{UserDefined, None}
	end if
	legato.load_arrays{UserDefined, None}
end function

function instrument.reload_all
	declare _failsafe : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _iterator : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	_failsafe{unknown} := 0
	while((preset.is_loading{unknown} = 1) and (_failsafe{unknown} < 300)) 
	wait(100000){Builtin, None}
	inc(_failsafe{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end while
	for _iterator{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	instrument.load(_iterator{unknown}, slot.loaded_sound[_iterator{unknown}]{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	message("loaded slot " & _iterator{unknown} & "|" & slot.loaded_sound[_iterator{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
end function

function update_purge
	declare _is_loaded : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 512 - 1
	if(instrument.exists[i{unknown}]{unknown} = 1)
	_is_loaded{unknown} := 0
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	if(slot.loaded_sound[ii{unknown}]{unknown} = i{unknown})
	_is_loaded{unknown} := 1
	end if
	end for
	if(i{unknown} = preview_sound{unknown})
	_is_loaded{unknown} := 1
	end if
	for ii{unknown} := instrument.start_group[i{unknown}]{unknown} to (instrument.start_group[i{unknown}]{unknown} + instrument.num_groups[i{unknown}]{unknown}) - 1
	if(_is_loaded{unknown} = 0)
	purge_group(ii{unknown}, 0){Builtin, None}
	else
	purge_group(ii{unknown}, 1){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end for
end function

function update_range
	if(btn_range_auto{unknown} = 1)
	range.low{unknown} := 0
	range.high{unknown} := 127
	for _i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	if(slot.loaded_sound[_i{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)
	if(instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[_i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} > range.low{unknown})
	range.low{unknown} := instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[_i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	end if
	if(instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[_i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} < range.high{unknown})
	range.high{unknown} := instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[_i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	end if
	end if
	end for
	range.overshoot{unknown} := 0
	if((range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) >= 24)
	range.overshoot{unknown} := range.high{unknown} - ((range.low{unknown} + 24) - 1)
	range.high{unknown} := (range.low{unknown} + 24) - 1
	else
	if((range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) <= 12)
	range.high{unknown} := range.low{unknown} + 12
	end if
	end if
	range.high{unknown} := range.high{unknown} + (range.overshoot{unknown} / 2)
	range.low{unknown} := range.low{unknown} + (range.overshoot{unknown} / 2)
	btn_block_range{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	else
	range.low{unknown} := vlue_range_low{unknown}
	range.high{unknown} := vlue_range_high{unknown}
	if((range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) >= 24)
	if(last_touched{unknown} = get_ui_id(vlue_range_high{unknown}){Builtin, None})
	range.low{unknown} := range.high{unknown} - (24 - 1)
	else
	if(last_touched{unknown} = get_ui_id(vlue_range_low{unknown}){Builtin, None})
	range.high{unknown} := range.low{unknown} + (24 - 1)
	else
	message("range selection error: last touched = undefined"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if((range.high{unknown} - range.low{unknown}) <= 12)
	if(last_touched{unknown} = get_ui_id(vlue_range_high{unknown}){Builtin, None})
	range.low{unknown} := range.high{unknown} - 12
	else
	if(last_touched{unknown} = get_ui_id(vlue_range_low{unknown}){Builtin, None})
	range.high{unknown} := range.low{unknown} + 12
	else
	message("range selection error: last touched = undefined"){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	btn_block_range{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	vlue_range_high{unknown} := range.high{unknown}
	vlue_range_low{unknown} := range.low{unknown}
	call keycolor.update{UserDefined, None}
	melody.put_in_range(melody{unknown}, current_segment{unknown}, ((8 * beats_per_bar{unknown}) * 4) - 1){UserDefined, None}
	call midi_main_display.update_bars{UserDefined, None}
	call midi_main_display.update_notes{UserDefined, None}
end function

function keycolor.update
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 127
	set_key_color(i{unknown}, KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	if(slot.loaded_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)
	for ii{unknown} := instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - slot.note_offset[i{unknown}]{unknown} to instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - slot.note_offset[i{unknown}]{unknown}
	if(get_key_color(clamp(ii{unknown}, 0, 127){UserDefined, None}){Builtin, None} = KEY_COLOR_BLUE{unknown})
	set_key_color(clamp(ii{unknown}, 0, 127){UserDefined, None}, KEY_COLOR_CYAN{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	set_key_color(clamp(ii{unknown}, 0, 127){UserDefined, None}, KEY_COLOR_BLUE{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end for
	for i{unknown} := range.low{unknown} to range.high{unknown}
	if(get_key_color(i{unknown}){Builtin, None} = KEY_COLOR_CYAN{unknown})
	set_key_color(i{unknown}, KEY_COLOR_GREEN{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	else
	if(get_key_color(i{unknown}){Builtin, None} = KEY_COLOR_BLUE{unknown})
	set_key_color(i{unknown}, KEY_COLOR_ORANGE{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	if(search[slot.loaded_sound{unknown}, - 1] # - 1)
	set_key_color(i{unknown}, KEY_COLOR_GREEN{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	else
	set_key_color(i{unknown}, KEY_COLOR_RED{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function note_offset.update
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	slot.note_offset[i{unknown}]{unknown} := clamp(slot.note_offset[i{unknown}]{unknown}, - 4 * 12, 4 * 12){UserDefined, None}
	end for
	call update_range{UserDefined, None}
end function

function instrument_browser.update_scroll
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 8 - 1
	btn_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	if(instrument_browser.structure[current_category{unknown}, current_section{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)
	btn_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := instrument.names[instrument_browser.structure[current_category{unknown}, current_section{unknown}, i{unknown} + scroll_instr_offset{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	btn_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 0
	set_font_types(btn_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown}, fonts.regular_white{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	if(slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} = instrument_browser.structure[current_category{unknown}, current_section{unknown}, i{unknown} + scroll_instr_offset{unknown}]{unknown})
	btn_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 1
	else
	if(search[slot.loaded_sound{unknown}, instrument_browser.structure[current_category{unknown}, current_section{unknown}, i{unknown} + scroll_instr_offset{unknown}]{unknown}] # - 1)
	for ii{unknown} := 0 to num_elements[font.types{unknown}] - 1
	set_control_par(btn_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown}, font.types[ii{unknown}]{unknown}, fonts.regular_white[6]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	end if
	end if
	btn_sound[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	end if
	end for
end function

function instrument_browser.update
	declare _num_sounds : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	call read_slot_colors{UserDefined, None}
	lbl_horizontal_devider{unknown} -> picture_state := slot_colors[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}
	lbl_override_fx{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{unknown}
	if(btn_override_fx{unknown} = 1)
	lbl_override_fx{unknown} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[1]{unknown}
	end if
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 5 - 1
	btn_category[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 0
	end for
	btn_category[current_category{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 1
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 11 - 1
	btn_section[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 0
	end for
	btn_section[current_section{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 1
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 11 - 1
	btn_section[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	if(instrument_browser.section_order[i{unknown} + (11 * current_category{unknown})]{unknown} # - 1)
	btn_section[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> text := instrument_browser.section_names[instrument_browser.section_order[i{unknown} + (11 * current_category{unknown})]{unknown}]{unknown}
	btn_section[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	end if
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 16 - 1
	if(instrument_browser.structure[current_category{unknown}, current_section{unknown}, i{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1)
	inc(_num_sounds{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end for
	lead_handle_size{unknown} := int(round(real(brwsr_sli_scroll_height{unknown}){Builtin, None} / (real(_num_sounds{unknown}){Builtin, None} / real(8){Builtin, None})){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	message("new handlle size: " & brwsr_sli_scroll_height{unknown} & " / (" & _num_sounds{unknown} & " / " & 8 & ") = " & lead_handle_size{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	sli_lead_scrollhandle{unknown} -> height := lead_handle_size{unknown}
	sli_lead_scrollhandle{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	sli_lead_scrollbar{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	if(lead_handle_size{unknown} >= brwsr_sli_scroll_height{unknown})
	sli_lead_scrollhandle{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	sli_lead_scrollbar{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end if
	current_instr_num{unknown} := _num_sounds{unknown}
	call nks.update_all_labels{UserDefined, None}
	call instrument_browser.update_scroll{UserDefined, None}
end function

function instrument_browser.open
	declare _idx : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	btn_open_fx[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_open_fx[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> value := 0
	btn_solo[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_mute[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	end for
	_idx{unknown} := search[_instrument_browser.structure{unknown}, slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]
	if((_idx{unknown} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} # - 1))
	current_category{unknown} := (_idx{unknown} / 16) / 11
	current_section{unknown} := (_idx{unknown} / 16) mod 11
	else
	current_category{unknown} := 0
	current_section{unknown} := 0
	end if
	instrument_browser{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	sli_lead_scrollbar{unknown} := 1000000
	call instrument_browser.update{UserDefined, None}
end function

function instrument_browser.close
	instrument_browser{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2 - 1
	btn_open_fx[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_solo[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_mute[i{unknown}]{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	end for
end function

function order_slots
	slot.order[0]{unknown} := 0
	slot.order[1]{unknown} := 1
	if((highest_delay{unknown} - slot.delay[1]{unknown}) < (highest_delay{unknown} - slot.delay[0]{unknown}))
	slot.order[0]{unknown} := 1
	slot.order[1]{unknown} := 0
	end if
end function

function fill_section(cat : unknown, sec : unknown, a : unknown, b : unknown, c : unknown, d : unknown, e : unknown, f : unknown, g : unknown, h : unknown, i : unknown, j : unknown, k : unknown, l : unknown, m : unknown, n : unknown, o : unknown, p : unknown)
	instrument_browser.section_order[search[instrument_browser.section_order{unknown}, - 1, cat{unknown} * 11, ((cat{unknown} + 1) * 11) - 1]]{unknown} := sec{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 0]{unknown} := a{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 1]{unknown} := b{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 2]{unknown} := c{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 3]{unknown} := d{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 4]{unknown} := e{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 5]{unknown} := f{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 6]{unknown} := g{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 7]{unknown} := h{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 8]{unknown} := i{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 9]{unknown} := j{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 10]{unknown} := k{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 11]{unknown} := l{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 12]{unknown} := m{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 13]{unknown} := n{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 14]{unknown} := o{unknown}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{unknown}, section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}, 15]{unknown} := p{unknown}
	inc(section_iterator[cat{unknown}]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
end function

function sustain(slot_ : unknown, event_note : unknown, event_notes : unknown, event_velocity : unknown, note_id : unknown, start_group : unknown, num_dynamic_layers : unknown, num_rr : unknown)
	event_notes{unknown} := event_note{unknown}
	note_id{unknown} := play_note(event_note{unknown}, clamp(event_velocity{unknown}, 1, 127){UserDefined, None}, 0, - 1){Builtin, None}
	redirect_output(note_id{unknown}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{unknown}, slot_{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(note_id{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	for dyn{unknown} := 0 to num_dynamic_layers{unknown} - 1
	set_event_par_arr(note_id{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 1, (dyn{unknown} + start_group{unknown}) + 1){Builtin, None}
	end for
end function

function sustain_release(slot_ : unknown, release_note : unknown, event_notes : unknown, note_id : unknown, release_id : unknown, start_group : unknown, num_dynamic_layers : unknown, num_rr : unknown)
	if(note_id{unknown} # - 1)
	note_off(note_id{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	note_id{unknown} := - 1
	event_notes{unknown} := - 1
	end if
end function

function one_shot(slot_ : unknown, event_note : unknown, event_notes : unknown, event_velocity : unknown, note_id : unknown, start_group : unknown, num_rr : unknown, rr_counter : unknown, sample_duration : unknown)
	event_notes{unknown} := event_note{unknown}
	rr_counter{unknown} := (rr_counter{unknown} + 1) mod num_rr{unknown}
	note_id{unknown} := play_note(event_note{unknown}, clamp(event_velocity{unknown}, 1, 127){UserDefined, None}, 0, sample_duration{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	redirect_output(note_id{unknown}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{unknown}, slot_{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(note_id{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(note_id{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 1, (rr_counter{unknown} + start_group{unknown}) + 1){Builtin, None}
end function

function one_shot_release(slot_ : unknown, release_note : unknown, event_notes : unknown, note_id : unknown)
	note_id{unknown} := - 1
	event_notes{unknown} := - 1
end function

	if(slot.loaded_sound[0]{unknown} # - 1)

	array.copy(intervals{unknown}, s0.intervals{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	array.copy(trans_zone_ids{unknown}, s0.trans_zone_ids{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	array.copy(trans_zone_start{unknown}, s0.trans_zone_start{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	array.copy(trans_event_volume{unknown}, s0.trans_event_volume{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	array.copy(trans_wait_time{unknown}, s0.trans_wait_time{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	array.copy(trans_fadeIn_time{unknown}, s0.trans_fadeIn_time{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	array.copy(trans_fadeOut_time{unknown}, s0.trans_fadeOut_time{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	array.copy(sus_release_time{unknown}, s0.sus_release_time{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	array.copy(sus_fadeIn_time{unknown}, s0.sus_fadeIn_time{unknown}){UserDefined, None}

	message("test2 " & s0.trans_zone_ids[0]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	if(slot.loaded_sound[1]{unknown} # - 1)

	message("LOADED LEGATO ARRAYS FOR " & 1 & ": " & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]}){Builtin, None}

	wait_async(load_array_str(trans_fadeOut_time{unknown}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]} & "trans_fadeOut_time.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	wait_async(load_array_str(sus_release_time{unknown}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]} & "sus_release_time.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}

	wait_async(load_array_str(completed_elements{unknown}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[1]{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]} & "completed_elements.nka"){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
	array.copy(intervals{unknown}, s1.intervals{unknown}){UserDefined, None}

	array.copy(file_names_master{unknown}, s1.file_names_master{unknown}){UserDefined, None}

	message("test2 " & s1.trans_zone_ids[0]{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	legato.init_arrays{UserDefined, None}
end function

function legato.init_arrays
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2000 - 1
	if(s0.sus_release_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	s0.sus_release_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} := DEFAULT_VAL.sus_release_time{unknown}
	end if
	if(s0.trans_fadeIn_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	s0.trans_fadeIn_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} := DEFAULT_VAL.trans_fadeIn_time{unknown}
	end if
	if(s0.trans_fadeOut_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	s0.trans_fadeOut_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} := DEFAULT_VAL.trans_fadeOut_time{unknown}
	end if
	if(s0.trans_wait_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	s0.trans_wait_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} := DEFAULT_VAL.trans_wait_time{unknown}
	end if
	if(s0.sus_fadeIn_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	s0.sus_fadeIn_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} := DEFAULT_VAL.sus_fadeIn_time{unknown}
	end if
	if(s0.trans_zone_ids[i{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	s0.trans_zone_ids[i{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1
	end if
	end for
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2000 - 1
	if(s1.sus_release_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	s1.sus_release_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} := DEFAULT_VAL.sus_release_time{unknown}
	end if
	if(s1.trans_fadeIn_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	s1.trans_fadeIn_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} := DEFAULT_VAL.trans_fadeIn_time{unknown}
	end if
	if(s1.trans_fadeOut_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	s1.trans_fadeOut_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} := DEFAULT_VAL.trans_fadeOut_time{unknown}
	end if
	if(s1.trans_wait_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	s1.trans_wait_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} := DEFAULT_VAL.trans_wait_time{unknown}
	end if
	if(s1.sus_fadeIn_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	s1.sus_fadeIn_time[i{unknown}]{unknown} := DEFAULT_VAL.sus_fadeIn_time{unknown}
	end if
	if(s1.trans_zone_ids[i{unknown}]{unknown} = 0)
	s1.trans_zone_ids[i{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1
	end if
	end for
end function

function get_bit_id(event_id : unknown)
	return ((sh_left(lsb(abs(trans_group[c.slot{unknown}]{unknown} - get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{unknown}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_GROUP{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 14){Builtin, None} .or. sh_left(lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{unknown}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}, 7){Builtin, None}) .or. lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_id{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{unknown}){Builtin, None}, ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None})
end function

function get_trans_idx(event_id : unknown) -> result : unknown
	if(c.slot{unknown} = 0)
	if(search[s0.trans_zone_ids{unknown}, get_bit_id(event_id{unknown}){UserDefined, None}] = - 1)
	result{unknown} := search[s0.trans_zone_ids{unknown}, - 1]
	message("zid not found: " & get_bit_id(event_id{unknown}){UserDefined, None}){Builtin, None}
	else
	result{unknown} := search[s0.trans_zone_ids{unknown}, get_bit_id(event_id{unknown}){UserDefined, None}]
	end if
	end if
	if(c.slot{unknown} = 1)
	if(search[s1.trans_zone_ids{unknown}, get_bit_id(event_id{unknown}){UserDefined, None}] = - 1)
	result{unknown} := search[s1.trans_zone_ids{unknown}, - 1]
	message("zid not found: " & get_bit_id(event_id{unknown}){UserDefined, None}){Builtin, None}
	else
	result{unknown} := search[s1.trans_zone_ids{unknown}, get_bit_id(event_id{unknown}){UserDefined, None}]
	end if
	end if
end function

function legato_release(slot_ : unknown, release_note : unknown, event_notes : unknown, note_id : unknown, release_id : unknown, start_group : unknown, num_dynamic_layers : unknown, num_rr : unknown, trans_groups : unknown)
	if((note_held{unknown} = 0) and (note_id{unknown} # - 1))
	event_notes{unknown} := - 1
	message("play release note " & release_note{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	count{unknown} := 0
	if((is_attack[slot_{unknown}]{unknown} = 0) and (release_note{unknown} # - 1))
	release_id{unknown} := play_note(release_note{unknown}, 50, 0, 0){Builtin, None}
	redirect_output(release_id{unknown}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{unknown}, slot_{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(release_id{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	for key[6]{unknown} := 0 to num_dynamic_layers{unknown} - 1
	set_event_par_arr(release_id{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 1, (((((((((((key[6]{unknown} + start_group{unknown}) + title_groups{unknown}) + num_rr{unknown}) + title_groups{unknown}) + num_dynamic_layers{unknown}) + title_groups{unknown}) + num_dynamic_layers{unknown}) + title_groups{unknown}) + (num_dynamic_layers{unknown} * sustain_fx{unknown})) + title_groups{unknown}) + trans_groups{unknown}) + title_groups{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	end for
	end if
	if(note_id{unknown} # - 1)
	playpos{unknown} := clamp(get_event_par(note_id{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_PLAY_POS{unknown}){Builtin, None} / 10, 0, 140000){UserDefined, None}
	fade_out(note_id{unknown}, real_to_int(scale.range(int_to_real(playpos{unknown}){Builtin, None}, 0, 140000, 1, 230000){UserDefined, None}){Builtin, None}, 1){Builtin, None}
	change_vol(release_id{unknown}, - real_to_int(scale.range(int_to_real(playpos{unknown}){Builtin, None}, 0, 140000, 10000, 500){UserDefined, None}){Builtin, None}, 0){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
end function

function scan.samples
	declare zone_ids_master[2000] : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare trans_ids[2000] : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare u : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare v : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare w : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare zone_id : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} := 0 to 2000 - 1
	zone_ids_master[i{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1
	trans_ids[i{unknown}]{unknown} := - 1
	end for
	for u{unknown} := 0 to instrument.trans_groups[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} - 1
	for v{unknown} := instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown} to instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}
	w{unknown} := 1
	while(w{unknown} <= 120) 
	wait_longer{UserDefined, None}
	blip_note{unknown} := play_note(v{unknown}, w{unknown}, 0, - 1){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(blip_note{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	change_vol(blip_note{unknown}, - 2000000, 0){Builtin, None}
	set_event_par_arr(blip_note{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown}, 1, trans_group[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} + u{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	wait_longer{UserDefined, None}
	zone_id{unknown} := get_event_par(blip_note{unknown}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{unknown}){Builtin, None}
	message("check zone_id: " & zone_id{unknown} & " in group " & (trans_group[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown} + u{unknown})){Builtin, None}
	if((zone_id{unknown} # - 1) and (zone_id{unknown} # 0))
	if(search[zone_ids_master{unknown}, zone_id{unknown}] = - 1)
	trans_idx{unknown} := search[zone_ids_master{unknown}, - 1]
	if(1 = 1)
	zone_ids_master[trans_idx{unknown}]{unknown} := get_bit_id(blip_note{unknown}){UserDefined, None}
	else
	zone_ids_master[trans_idx{unknown}]{unknown} := zone_id{unknown}
	end if
	message("write " & trans_idx{unknown} & "|" & get_bit_id(blip_note{unknown}){UserDefined, None}){Builtin, None}
	end if
	end if
	fade_out(blip_note{unknown}, 0, 1){Builtin, None}
	w{unknown} := w{unknown} + 5
	end while
	wait_longer{UserDefined, None}
	end for
	wait_longer{UserDefined, None}
	end for
	save_array_str(zone_ids_master{int[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]} & "zone_ids_master.nka"){Builtin, None}
	message("resaved " & legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]} & "zone_ids_master.nka"){Builtin, None}
	save_array_str(zone_ids_master{int[]}, legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]} & "trans_zone_ids.nka"){Builtin, None}
	message("resaved " & legato_path{string} & legato_prefixes[instrument.legato_prefix_id[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{unknown}]{unknown}]{unknown}]{string[]} & "trans_zone_ids.nka"){Builtin, None}
end function

function wait_longer
	wait(900){Builtin, None}
end function

function global_vars.reset
	init_flag{unknown} := 1
	global_vars.array[0]{unknown} := - 1
	global_vars.array[1]{unknown} := 1
	delay_compensation_changed{unknown} := 0
end function

function global_vars.load
	wait_async(load_array_str(global_vars.array{unknown}, global_vars.array_path{unknown}){Builtin, None}){Builtin, None}
end function

function global_vars.save
	save_array_str(global_vars.array{unknown}, global_vars.array_path{unknown}){Builtin, None}
end function

function options_display.open
	btn_options_show_meter_warning{unknown} -> value := global_vars.array[1]{unknown}
	if(delay_compensation_changed{unknown} = 0)
	btn_delay_compensation{unknown} -> value := max(global_vars.array[0]{unknown}, 0){UserDefined, None}
	end if
	options_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown}
	btn_open_settings{unknown} := 1
end function

function options_display.close
	options_display{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown}
	btn_open_settings{unknown} := 0
end function
